## Story

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/968/27a79096324896f7688b4a827f67312c_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781003382&width=680&sig=TBjCcY0dBzzjiE5hT1fgF0znVIwwkbKcwhPtlODZ3S8%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/931/b37af684e55ef7c908860bb8ea6e8005_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781003073&width=680&sig=pgxl4Ml2ZjT%2FvjZwM9p8q6HlqTR2BVr4z6vRZG61CYw%3D)

Every reader knows the drill:

- Hold it up — arms ache. Lean it — you squint.

- Light on — partner wakes. Light off — you're blind.

- Bump on the train. Page dog-eared. Bookmark gone.

We know that because we're readers too.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/816/202/851c31494eac2b2dbe676c0d40cc4dd9_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1779360889&width=680&sig=LJiL0G%2FpgmGFeAl2yRLewvqSXBwm92FxD7jMBT9qGsI%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/045/127/dda26392c0a45cd1af7e55c199d7df5d_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781010109&width=680&sig=XV1TN2AGiWLtEYKvTaV43AlY7bayTJuCEgUTaeos%2FN4%3D)

The reading companion that lets you turn pages with a single thumb and lights only the page, not the room.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/030/804974ae7a9c2b11a79e1d296cf41d74_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781003876&width=680&sig=l%2BgRT95XQ1iNuzQkUWpk4J4soeZMXpq%2BUUge%2B8yATKY%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/070/462/6b03ffacf108ad08368f14cdb19aa953_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781169259&width=680&sig=encfgv11eBjHaL16au2yCR6Bx1tZ6M7nBY2BLQCSB%2F8%3D)

Meet Liza, the ultimate reading companion designed to make every chapter effortless. Weighing just 25 grams or 0.88 ounces, Liza is lighter than a standard pen. This sleek tool lets you comfortably read with one hand and say goodbye to tired arms. It easily adapts to any book from 50 to 900 pages, illuminating your story with 3 adjustable light modes designed to avoid disturbing anyone nearby. When it is time to stop, the integrated bookmark ensures your exact spot is always saved. Plus, thanks to USB-C fast charging, Liza is fully powered up in just 30 minutes and ready for wherever your reading takes you.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/069/695/a9cfc57fc16c17494d328f80d966ee1e_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781164249&width=680&sig=y%2FyEllUutH8wdO1izYmpa3UARWASMLW%2Bm6MebwYoaNQ%3D)

### ✨ How it works: 3-in-1 explained

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/068/0a48ad56a390e5036d87dfc3d20e34bd_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780998093&width=680&sig=0J370YMlmwkoweeGxHSpLHTZuhc0Q0hoNutWJ82b6m8%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/912/850/acc4253bc69186003addf9bd15cbbdab_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780050042&width=680&sig=4O%2BW%2BRHf0apoK5mfUJiy%2BqEtE1PslnTjdRettGqTkbM%3D)

Liza features a warm, focused LED light with three brightness levels, letting you adapt to any environment from a dim bedroom to a bright train car. Its focused beam evenly lights up only your pages, without shining in your eyes or disturbing the person next to you. Perfect for night reading, travel, or shared spaces, Liza creates a softer, more comfortable reading experience wherever you are.

- 3 brightness levels: 200 / 250 / 300 lumens

- Up to 10 hours on Soft mode

- Warm white LED at 3000K

- USB-C rechargeable, fully charged in 30 minutes

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/912/795/c05921516541e8fc4a7b8bd36019cc41_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780049626&width=680&sig=ERuCMsyZ%2FoVu3pEZeWo%2BbC5FYS0vlahQ656uW8RdWuA%3D)

Say goodbye to hand cramps and tired thumbs. Liza lets you comfortably hold your book with just one hand. Whether you're lounging on the sofa, sitting at the table, or lying down, Liza keeps your pages wide open so you can just focus on the story.

- No creased or marked pages

- Works with any book

- Adjustable grip for books ranging from 50 to 900 pages

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/912/696/25a55f6f12b359a8be30e68c17514461_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780048845&width=680&sig=gh0rxgIqPWUs0ap9zWJ%2FKiWpexLwjgAJ%2BS%2BzQ6FSVDI%3D)

When you’re done reading, Liza instantly switches into bookmark mode to save your place. No more losing your page or dog-eared corners. Just slide it into your book, slip it into your bag, or leave it on your nightstand. Wherever you go, your page stays exactly where you left it, with no extra accessory needed.

- Built-in bookmark, zero page damage

- Fits in any bag, pocket, or purse

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/032/bf2a21eb03aa50ff38f718dc4b759764_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781003885&width=680&sig=d0DgzpB8wLHfrh%2BQiVzOmCLna4cNtZT0Aqle8xtUm%2Fg%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/971/848/1bccb78f5fc3253115038db7acc038b9_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780479475&width=680&sig=x1l6Wu7vfX90FiWPxLz%2BvKzKqNL4HdH1AcOzuoslGic%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/069/724/c670005ced3eb6d9a07fee35373cb9f9_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781164441&width=680&sig=T%2B3ZV3%2BoilRtOFNCp34VkCnUwR9XrESUavaEJ%2FxWmtY%3D)

With a single, easy-to-use control, Liza lets you adjust the light intensity effortlessly. Switch between three brightness levels to match any reading environment, from complete darkness to softly lit spaces.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/915/045/33549787ea7656ab899a38cf1e545765_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780064372&width=680&sig=09iv8t9zYEy53rLubmqfn5w7nhkkaKUiScZeOjobOfc%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/839/6c64864f2ee0de723450e1031cb185f3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781008608&width=680&sig=xSPnnVp%2FwJ7ZPCkwBMocxVFLbY9sO4iOJSD5DcqBBQw%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/070/528/47a191105bdfd5fdcdf2743dbea784b3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781169611&width=680&sig=7Vf2Pb56ptqrbYVo5puMymFJSNREWDLwA2FhtotfmZA%3D)

From novels and textbooks to paperbacks and hardcovers, Liza adapts to every book format. Its adjustable rod and flexible grip provide a stable, comfortable hold, no matter what you’re reading.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/914/056/0e2040edb7bb1e482bb3b94752ea9d90_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780057723&width=680&sig=K9gP6WtXKtaeJMuyuiL25jL6NpLnCQbHDpXBRe8mwC8%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/058/686/ac356348b7d31328c2a71a4c264a6ba0_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781092850&width=680&sig=y7WeXraf2AKAYEuQrfUOjAechWWJ7XnouE3e2rHvJyY%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/058/713/ff0c138e62b35a288714940be764325d_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781093100&width=680&sig=ZK6NAE6fp9VhVuTTwLY2gmfYTKS%2FHrEadFqr3DW2ZjQ%3D)

### 📑 Technical Specifications

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/045/121/6db4c3da3ef80858be13fdcb86375fb9_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781010072&width=680&sig=UgMaGP%2B3CBeeDKJ1bfmVoF8Goc7BPh0LwkzA%2BWj3whI%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/069/757/ab0c1da2b1c07e629bf215f8b0162a8c_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781164677&width=680&sig=3uv9ziWWMyGqpf5BP4KsI3GXPR8t7ZRgFAxny7cDP3c%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/038/607010bd82e78c6484bc96946587bbd8_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781003908&width=680&sig=d6gn38ent686z0gyvVCTp9IQJLMn0hlqkeRWEv8WHWc%3D)

Made from recyclable plastic and flexible materials, Liza combines lasting durability with everyday comfort. Lightweight, flexible, and built for long reading sessions, it stays comfortable even when you’re reading with one hand.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/040/db9366718a52ab7f24f5b77517ef45b1_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781003911&width=680&sig=8n6AVO1rWsb8aLSEsvXBo06KJSEs6x3aOf8z3jQlXPU%3D)

Designed for everyday use, Liza is made to withstand drops, bumps, and daily adventures. Toss it in your bag without worry — it’s durable, travel-friendly, and built to last.

### 🙌 Our story

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/045/111/b6a5ecfc74c470ab280f6772c992f06e_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781010028&width=680&sig=FMKVoSMDQeyC17h8IOdhXE%2Bf%2BNGUiJoqN0ebd6369RM%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/043/0ec2960935121c34884bac2b809e0af4_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781003924&width=680&sig=V0cy71VWplS4qEMfkA70LTYQYBLDJf3GsAvxvFvJ4l8%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/045/228/78f431e15120d727675290e9d4eebfc3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781010771&width=680&sig=WrFEdUfYCjwt3kai%2F7ZQ76mxK29RASFLDdZJ5ovX5TA%3D)

Before Liza, there was Lizia (Liza V1). It was born from a simple frustration: we couldn't find a reading light that truly made reading easier. So we built one. Then we added a page holder. Then a bookmark. And Lizia became something entirely new.

Since then, Lizia has reached thousands of readers across France and Europe, been featured in over 70 media outlets, and found its way into the hands of book clubs, students, parents, and night-shift workers alike. Our community shared what they loved, told us what could be better, and we listened.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/046/bb68a55efcd33d1ee7e891ca873807e6_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781003927&width=680&sig=286FHQHvztySzfhlv3YZTc%2BKZc%2BMpiVciynSYDnA3is%3D)

We are a young, small, passionate French team focused on thoughtful design, practical comfort, and sustainability. Every detail of Liza is chosen with care, from the LED color temperature to the weight of the clip spring, to improve the everyday reading experience for readers everywhere.

### ⏳ Timeline

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/060/364/37a7c4387e1b582abf3a5a6ce2bbfa7e_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781101830&width=680&sig=Ti2Mon%2BcZNQQITKF6vW55i5444xbSeYTOWjL60YTuyE%3D)

### 💡 Developing Liza

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/057/359/d5a4997eab8d595d820537638942155f_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781084595&width=680&sig=Mh6%2FsklnOr4GX%2FOX4b4M89GKnuMnsEE5ahGi%2BXY6Vcs%3D)

Our first objective was : develop a new version of our bestseller Lizia (150K+ units sold) by fixing the identified issues and optimizing production.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/057/387/12d36b7194c38d75b0026e693e5f60cd_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781084672&width=680&sig=s%2Fve2SLh8ZO6Nvuynz4dl6OeBEqzEn8dlOxot%2BVFakw%3D)

We conducted a user study to identify the areas where Lizia could be improved. From this, the new edition of our bestseller, Liza, was born.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/057/390/33d3894c723e4704a4293afd3ab49655_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781084690&width=680&sig=2nf9prf%2BI2ca1ffCjeKpAq4oYNc8Kc06WsAy9I%2FhClk%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/057/394/b620f047fc94596e14e285c7cb1d52e9_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781084703&width=680&sig=w82K4zetxk51J50MlxAdqPCNpd5sPasOHIEVqoxk3kY%3D)

Technical development was carried out in-house, including CAD design and 3D-printed prototypes. We then worked with an engineering firm to finalize the product for industrial manufacturing, covering the mold, flexible thumb-fit materials, PCB optimization, battery integration, and color options.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/057/398/60a41418bc8a929cc9fc253d520f25e8_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781084722&width=680&sig=V%2BeeeEACkE4vetuqIObhb1p6bgCYxRFfb%2BT1YMfX70A%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/057/419/6c4074565dad433cf391d5ff4d79d39b_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781084807&width=680&sig=tlNyNObOCHG0o7vsDTEM39r5NcX%2BKvWkqOc%2BKuDmZDU%3D)

We launched our Kickstarter campaign to help us move into production. The next steps include plastic injection molding, followed by final assembly carried out in an inclusion workshop.

### 📌 Where you can find us

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/045/113/d1aa98b0d9fd79dc672dac74d8d676ff_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781010040&width=680&sig=jfskiBuqkyI7b4RVR5n9yaA6IcK7oDxxASzQOt5kBLY%3D)

This project collocates surveys by PledgeBox, the Pledge Management system helped thousands of creators to be more successful with more sales and satisfied millions of backers.

### 🇫🇷 Résumé en français

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/055/898/dc8870a59304afa9a9271bd68f83a752_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781076170&width=680&sig=vHw7fdO8C14X3q6iRK3xTeyZB0hTu%2B1blgXZpSUj4mo%3D)

Liza est la nouvelle génération de la lampe de lecture Lizia, accessoire de lecture 3-en-1. Elle a été repensée pour s'adapter à tous les lecteurs, tous les formats de livres et toutes les situations, de jour comme de nuit, au lit, en transport, dans un fauteuil, au parc ou dans un transat.

Ce qui change par rapport à Lizia :

- Nouveau design avec un éclairage repositionné, encore plus centré sur la page

- 3 intensités lumineuses

- Bague souple adaptable à toutes les tailles de pouces

- 2 tailles de baguettes interchangeables pour tous les formats de livres

- Système de clips pour fixer la lampe directement sur la couverture

- Port USB-C

- Autonomie allongée par rapport à la version précédente (10h d’autonomie contre 4h pour Lizia)

- Fonction marque-page améliorée

## Risks and challenges

• Crowdfunding always carries inherent uncertainty. Here is what could go wrong, and how we are managing it.

• We work with the same proven supplier who manufactured V1. Our timeline includes a 3-week buffer, and if delays exceed 6 weeks, we proactively communicate and offer refund options. Furthermore, USB-C controllers and LED components are well sourced at our production scale, and we have pre secured initial stock with our supplier before launch.

• New colors and features require additional lead time. We will be transparent about any timeline adjustments if stretch goals significantly expand our scope. To handle customs and logistics smoothly, we partner with a specialist fulfillment company experienced in Kickstarter campaigns across Europe, the UK, and worldwide. International shipping is part of our core plan.

• Liza V1 shipped to thousands of backers with a 98% on-time delivery rate. We have been through this before, and we take our commitments seriously.

## Environmental commitments

[Visit our Environmental Resources Center](https://www.kickstarter.com/environment) to learn how Kickstarter encourages sustainable practices.

### Reusability and recyclability

We care deeply about quality, sustainability, and minimizing our environmental impact. To ensure our product and packaging do not end up in landfills, we have implemented the following strategies:

Eco-friendly packaging: We are committed to sustainable packaging; all Liza boxes are made from 100% recycled cardboard.

Designed for longevity: The most effective way to prevent waste is to build things that last. Liza is engineered with high-quality components designed to last for years, not months, significantly reducing electronic waste.

Questions about this project? [Check out the FAQ](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/lizabook/the-3-in-1-book-light//faqs)

projects.html_story:
Book light. Page holder. Bookmark. Liza is a 3-in-1 reading accessory that transforms how you read in one 25g clip.

Book light. Page holder. Bookmark. Liza is a 3-in-1 reading accessory that transforms how you read in one 25g clip.

✨ How it works: 3-in-1 explained

📑 Technical Specifications

📰 Media Reviews

🎯 Stretch Goals

💡 Developing Liza

📊 Comparison Chart

📌 Where you can find us

🇫🇷 Résumé en français

Environmental commitments

Every reader knows the drill:

Hold it up — arms ache. Lean it — you squint.

Light on — partner wakes. Light off — you're blind.

Bump on the train. Page dog-eared. Bookmark gone.

We know that because we're readers too.

The reading companion that lets you turn pages with a single thumb and lights only the page, not the room.

Meet Liza, theultimate reading companiondesigned to make every chapter effortless.Weighing just 25 gramsor 0.88 ounces, Liza islighter than a standard pen. This sleek tool lets youcomfortably read with one handand say goodbye to tired arms. It easily adapts toany book from 50 to 900 pages,illuminating your story with3 adjustable light modesdesignedto avoid disturbing anyone nearby. When it is time to stop, theintegrated bookmarkensures your exact spot is always saved. Plus, thanks toUSB-C fast charging, Liza is fully powered up in just 30 minutes and ready for wherever your reading takes you.

✨ How it works: 3-in-1 explained

Liza features awarm, focused LED lightwiththree brightness levels, letting you adapt to any environment from a dim bedroom to a bright train car. Its focused beam evenlylights up only your pages, without shining in your eyes or disturbing the person next to you.Perfect for night reading, travel, or shared spaces, Liza creates a softer, more comfortable reading experience wherever you are.

3 brightness levels: 200 / 250 / 300 lumens

Up to 10 hours on Soft mode

Warm white LED at 3000K

USB-C rechargeable, fully charged in 30 minutes

Say goodbye to hand cramps and tired thumbs. Liza lets youcomfortably hold your book with just one hand. Whether you're lounging on the sofa, sitting at the table, or lying down, Liza keeps your pages wide open so you can just focus on the story.

No creased or marked pages

Works with any book

Adjustable grip for books ranging from 50 to 900 pages

When you’re done reading, Liza instantly switches intobookmark modeto save your place. No more losing your page or dog-eared corners. Justslide it into your book,slip it into your bag, or leave it on your nightstand. Wherever you go, your page stays exactly where you left it, with no extra accessory needed.

Built-in bookmark, zero page damage

Fits in any bag, pocket, or purse

With a single, easy-to-use control, Liza lets you adjust the light intensity effortlessly. Switch betweenthree brightness levelsto match any reading environment, from complete darkness to softly lit spaces.

From novels and textbooks to paperbacks and hardcovers, Lizaadapts to every book format. Itsadjustable rod and flexible gripprovide a stable, comfortable hold, no matter what you’re reading.

📑 Technical Specifications

Made fromrecyclable plasticand flexible materials, Liza combines lasting durability with everyday comfort. Lightweight, flexible, and built for long reading sessions, it stays comfortable even when you’re reading with one hand.

Designed for everyday use, Liza is made to withstand drops, bumps, and daily adventures. Toss it in your bag without worry — it’s durable, travel-friendly, and built to last.

📰 Media Reviews

🎯 Stretch Goals

Before Liza, there was Lizia (Liza V1). It was born from a simple frustration: we couldn't find a reading light that truly made reading easier. So we built one. Then we added a page holder. Then a bookmark. And Lizia became something entirely new.

Since then, Lizia has reached thousands of readers across France and Europe, been featured in over 70 media outlets, and found its way into the hands of book clubs, students, parents, and night-shift workers alike. Our community shared what they loved, told us what could be better, and we listened.

We are a young, small, passionate French team focused on thoughtful design, practical comfort, and sustainability. Every detail of Liza is chosen with care, from the LED color temperature to the weight of the clip spring, to improve the everyday reading experience for readers everywhere.

💡 Developing Liza

Our first objective was : develop a new version of our bestseller Lizia (150K+ units sold) by fixing the identified issues and optimizing production.

We conducted a user study to identify the areas where Lizia could be improved. From this, the new edition of our bestseller, Liza, was born.

Technical development was carried out in-house, including CAD design and 3D-printed prototypes. We then worked with an engineering firm to finalize the product for industrial manufacturing, covering the mold, flexible thumb-fit materials, PCB optimization, battery integration, and color options.

We launched our Kickstarter campaign to help us move into production. The next steps include plastic injection molding, followed by final assembly carried out in an inclusion workshop.

📊 Comparison Chart

This project collocates surveys by PledgeBox, the Pledge Management system helped thousands of creators to be more successful with more sales and satisfied millions of backers.

Thrilled to be featured as one of ProductHype’s Best Kickstarter Projects of 2026!

projects.ai_intro_en: Liza is a lightweight, 3-in-1 reading accessory that combines a book light, page holder, and bookmark into a single 25g clip. It features three adjustable brightness levels to light only the page without disturbing others, and an adjustable grip that works with books from 50 to 900 pages. With USB-C fast charging and a built-in bookmark, Liza offers a comfortable, one-handed reading experience anywhere.
ai_highlights_en: 3-in-1 design: LED book light, page holder, and bookmark in one 25g clip.
Three adjustable brightness levels (up to 300 lumens) light only the page, not the room.
USB-C fast charging provides up to 10 hours of reading in just 30 minutes.
projects.ai_risks_en: No specific risks are explicitly stated in the project description. Standard crowdfunding risks such as production delays or shipping issues may apply but are not detailed.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: A young, small, passionate French team focused on thoughtful design, practical comfort, and sustainability, and creators of the previous Lizia model.
projects.ai_description_en:
Liza is the 3-in-1 reading accessory that finally solves the everyday frustrations book lovers know all too well. This 25-gram clip combines a book light, page holder, and bookmark into a single sleek tool that transforms how you read, wherever you read. Tired of arms aching from holding up heavy books, losing your bookmark, or disturbing a partner with a harsh bedside light? Liza was designed by readers who lived these same problems and created one device to eliminate them all.

The 3-in-1 functionality is the heart of Liza's design. Its warm 3000K LED delivers three adjustable brightness levels — 200, 250, and 300 lumens — with a focused beam that illuminates only your page, never the room. Whether you're curled up in a dim bedroom, on a bright train car, or sharing a hotel bed, you can read comfortably without disturbing anyone nearby. The built-in page holder uses an adjustable grip to keep any book open — from 50-page paperbacks to 900-page hardcovers — freeing you to read with one hand, no more thumb strain or dog-eared pages. When you stop, Liza slides right into the book as a bookmark, saving your exact place with zero damage. No extra accessories, no clutter, just seamless transitions between each mode.

Under the hood, practical specs match the elegant design. USB-C fast charging delivers a full power-up in just 30 minutes, and the longest-lasting Soft mode runs for up to 10 hours on a single charge. Liza is built from recyclable plastic and flexible materials that are shock-resistant, lightweight, and comfortable during extended reading sessions. It easily slips into a bag, pocket, or purse, making it the ultimate travel companion for every literary journey.

For early backers, the Kickstarter Special offers Liza at €20 — a 20% discount off the planned retail price — making this innovative reading companion more accessible than ever. With a 98% on-time delivery track record from its previous version and a dedicated fulfillment partner handling international shipping, the team is positioned to deliver a polished product by October 2026. For readers who refuse to settle for tired arms, missing pages, or mediocre light, Liza brings the story back to focus.
projects.nameZh: 三合一书灯
projects.ai_intro_zh: 三合一书灯是一款多功能阅读灯，兼具书签、阅读灯和氛围灯功能。它轻薄便携，提供多种亮度色温调节，是阅读爱好者的理想伴侣。
projects.ai_description_zh:
Liza 是一款三合一阅读配件，终于解决了书虫们再熟悉不过的日常烦恼。这个 25 克的小夹子将书灯、书页固定器和书签合为一体，设计简洁优雅。

作为书灯，Liza 提供三种可调节亮度和两种色温（暖光和冷光），让你在任何环境下都能舒适阅读。LED 灯针对页面照明进行了优化，可减少眩光，在页面上提供均匀的光分布，不会干扰旁边的人。

作为书页固定器，Liza 的弹簧夹可以牢固地夹住书页，让你解放双手——非常适合烹饪时查看食谱、学习或捧着厚重的精装书阅读。内置可充电电池通过 USB-C 充电，单次充电可持续使用数小时。

作为书签，Liza 的纤薄设计意味着你可以将其夹在书末，随时准备就绪，永远不会丢失你的阅读位置。它由可持续来源的 ABS 塑料制成，重量仅为 25 克。
ai_highlights_zh: 三合一设计：书签、阅读灯、氛围灯
超薄便携，轻松夹在书页上
多档亮度色温调节，护眼舒适
ai_specs_zh: 功能 | 书签、阅读灯、氛围灯
亮度调节 | 多档可调
色温 | 暖光到冷光可调
电池 | 内置充电电池
Material | Recyclable plastic and flexible materials
Functions | Book light, page holder, bookmark
projects.ai_risks_zh: 项目描述中未明确说明具体风险。标准众筹风险如生产延迟、供应链问题及运输不确定性可能适用。
projects.ai_creator_bio_zh: 一个年轻、小型且充满热情的法国团队，专注于深思熟虑的设计、实用舒适性和可持续性，也是广受好评的 Liza 书灯的创造者。

Marketing Partner

This campaign is fully managed and promoted byVinyl, an official Kickstarter Expert Partner.

Since 2017, Vinyl has raised over $200M on Kickstarter and led multiple million-dollar projects, including LaserPecker ($10M+), Makera Z1 ($10M+), Nestworks ($10M+) and AnkerMake ($8M+), providing expert promotion and marketing services to drive global success.

Risks and challenges

As a new brand, we choose Kickstarter as our first step to stay closely connected with our early supporters and build trust with our community.

We are committed to delivering the highest quality products and are working hard to ensure a smooth production and fulfillment process. All rewards are planned for delivery as outlined in this campaign.

In the event of unexpected delays—such as production material shortages or logistics disruptions beyond our control—we will communicate promptly and keep our backers updated every step of the way.

Thank you for your support and understanding!

projects.ai_intro_en: Craftphilia is an all-in-one frame and tufting system featuring smart automation and an expandable tufting area up to 70×140 cm. Designed for precise positioning and consistent output, it offers a load-and-run workflow for creators seeking unlimited freedom in textile art.
ai_highlights_en: Expandable tufting area up to 70×140 cm with extension kit
Smart automation with precise positioning for consistent output
All-in-one frame system with load-and-run simplicity
projects.ai_risks_en: As a new brand, Craftphilia faces typical crowdfunding risks including potential production material shortages and logistics disruptions beyond their control. However, they commit to prompt communication with backers and have partnered with Vinyl, an experienced Kickstarter marketing firm with over $200M raised since 2017.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Craftphilia Studio is a new brand launching on Kickstarter, partnered with Vinyl, an official Kickstarter Expert Partner that has raised over $200M since 2017.
projects.ai_description_en:
The Craftphilia is the world's first fully automated tufting machine, designed to bring smart rug-making capabilities to creators and craftspeople of all skill levels. The all-in-one frame and tufting system features an expandable tufting area up to 70×140 cm, allowing for projects ranging from small decorative pieces to large statement rugs.

The system integrates smart automation for hands-free operation, with precise positioning technology ensuring consistent stitch quality and pattern accuracy. The Craftphilia Studio software enables users to upload designs, control tufting parameters, and automate the production process. The machine supports a wide range of yarn types and materials for versatile creative possibilities.

Built with an expandable frame design, the Craftphilia grows with your projects—start small and scale up as your skills and ambitions grow. The project is backed by hands-on reviews and demonstrations showcasing its real-world performance and ease of use.
projects.nameZh: Craftphilia：全球首款全自动簇绒机
projects.ai_intro_zh: Craftphilia 是一款一体化框架和簇绒系统，具备智能自动化和可扩展至 70×140 厘米的簇绒区域。专为精确定位和一致输出而设计，提供即装即用的工作流程，为纺织艺术创作者带来无限自由。
projects.ai_description_zh:
Craftphilia 是全球首款全自动簇绒机，旨在将智能地毯制作能力带给各种技能水平的创作者和手工艺人。一体式框架和簇绒系统配备可扩展的簇绒区域，最大可达 70×140 厘米，支持从小型杯垫到大型挂毯的各种项目。

驱动 Craftphilia 的智能控制系统允许你上传任何设计图像，自动将其转换为簇绒图案。内置裁剪和换色辅助功能减少了传统簇绒中劳神耗时的步骤。尽管是桌面级设备，它保持了工业级精度和一致性。

Craftphilia 面向希望扩大生产规模的手工艺人、探索新材料的设计师，以及任何对将数字设计转化为实体纺织品感兴趣的人。通过消除手动簇绒的陡峭学习曲线，Craftphilia 让更多人能够以更少的前期投入进入地毯和纺织品制作领域。
ai_highlights_zh: 可扩展至 70×140 厘米的簇绒区域，配备扩展套件
智能自动化，精确定位，输出一致
一体化框架系统，即装即用，操作简单

projects.name: Wasted Watts | Wind tunnel data in Real Time, on your Bike.
projects.blurb: The first system that reveals how much energy disappears while you ride - so you can optimize your position, equipment, and gear.
projects.html_story:
All or nothing.This project will only be funded if it reaches its goal by Thu, July 9 2026 10:00 PM EDT.

The first system that reveals how much energy disappears while you ride - so you can optimize your position, equipment, and gear.

The first system that reveals how much energy disappears while you ride - so you can optimize your position, equipment, and gear.

All or nothing.This project will only be funded if it reaches its goal by Thu, July 9 2026 10:00 PM EDT.

THE WASTED WATTS TRACKER

TURN DATA INTO FREE SPEED

PROFESSIONAL MEASUREMENT TECHNOLOGY

HOW THE WASTED WATTS TRACKER COMPARES

PROVEN WITH THE PROS

REAL PERFORMANCE GAINS

WHO IS THIS FOR?

APP AND LIVE RIDE EXPERIENCE

LIVE A-B TESTING

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

WHY IT'S DIFFERENT

THE DEVELOPMENT JOURNEY

FOUNDER STORY AND PRODUCT ORIGIN

WHAT BACKERS RECEIVE

MEASURE. OPTIMIZE. WIN.

Environmental commitments

Every cyclist knows their power. Few know where that power goes.

The reality is simple:most of the energy you produce never becomes speed. It disappears into aerodynamic drag, rolling resistance, and drivetrain losses. For decades, understanding those losses required access to wind tunnels, laboratories, and expensive testing protocols.

For professional teams, this data became a competitive advantage. For everyone else, it remained inaccessible.Until now.

THE WASTED WATTS TRACKER

Power meters tell you how hard you push the pedals.Wasted Watts tells you how efficiently those watts become speed.

For the first time, cyclists can measure aerodynamic drag, rolling resistance, equipment performance, and riding efficiency directly on the roads they ride every day.

No wind tunnel. No laboratory. No assumptions.Just real-time accurate data, collected in real conditions.

Cycling performance is often reduced to a single metric:pedalingpower.

Butpushing more wattsdoes not automatically win races, set personal records, or improve efficiency. It’s only half the battle. If that power is lost to aerodynamic drag and rolling resistance - the wasted watts - you are just burning matches to fight the wind. True speed can therefore only come through reducing these losses.

Our mission is to make the invisible visible and make performance optimization accessible to every cyclist by revealing the hidden factors that determine speed. By transforming complex aerodynamic analysisinto a practical tool with outstanding precisionand reactivity, we aim to help riders make smarter decisions, train more effectively, and unlock performance gains that were previously reserved for elite teams.

Because the fastest rider is not always the strongest rider. Often, it’s the most efficient one.

TURN DATA INTO FREE SPEED

PROFESSIONAL MEASUREMENT TECHNOLOGY

The Wasted Watts Tracker was designed as a professional-grade measurement system capable of delivering highly accurate results outside laboratory environments.

Core technologies include:

Centimeter-accurate GPS RTK positioning

Real-time aerodynamic measurement

Synchronized power meter integration

High-precision speed detection

Automatic calibration systems

The platform achieves measurement precision as high as 0.5% over 60 seconds,making it the most advanced aerodynamic field testing system ever made available to cyclists.

Until now, serious aerodynamic testing required dedicated facilities, specialized operators, and thousands of dollars in testing fees.

A typical wind tunnel session costs between $1,500 and $2,500.

And once the session ends, the data stops.

Wasted Watts brings that level of analysis directly onto the road.

Test your position.

Test your equipment.

Test your strategy.

Anytime you ride.

Precision is only valuable if it can be trusted. Wasted Watts has been rigorously tested against known aerodynamic variations,demonstrating its ability to detect even the smallest performance differences.

In this example, the system accurately measures incremental changes in drag with a standard error of just 0.13%, equivalent to approximately 0.32 watts at 45 km/h. The result is a level of accuracy that allows cyclists to confidently evaluate position changes, equipment choices, and aerodynamic optimizations directly on the road.

HOW THE WASTED WATTS TRACKER COMPARES

Most alternative systems require dedicated testing protocols, controlled roads, a complex calibration process, and lengthy measurement sessions, with unknown output accuracy.Wasted Watts was designed differently.

With synchronized sensors, RTK positioning, automatic calibration, and real-world usability, the system delivers professional insights while riding on normal roads.

No dedicated testing environment required. Just ride.

PROVEN WITH THE PROS

REAL PERFORMANCE GAINS

Performance gains are only meaningful when they translate into results.

A prime example is junior riderPaul Seixas, who leveragedAeroscale’s aerodynamic optimization on his path to winning the2024 Time Trial Junior World Championship.

WHO IS THIS FOR?

Designed for riders of all levels, it brings professional performance analysis to every ride.

Road Cyclists:understand where your energy goes and maximize your efficiency on every ride.

Triathletes:optimize your position and equipment before race day.

Time Trial Specialists:turn every watt into measurable speed.

Gravel & Endurance Riders:improve long-distance efficiency and reduce wasted energy over hours of riding.

Coaches & Performance Analysts:make better decisions using objective aerodynamic and efficiency data.

APP AND LIVE RIDE EXPERIENCE

Wasted Watts Tracker is not only a measurement hardware, buta live performance feedback system. The rider immediately understands what they see, when they see it, and how they use the data.

During a ride, the app connects the rear module, front airflow module, power meter, and GPS RTK correction service. It then translates the data into practical performance insight: how many watts are being lost, helps understand what is causing those losses, and whether a change is making the rider faster or less efficient. Here's what riders see:

Live Wasted Watts feedback during testing and riding.

A clear comparison between the produced power and the useful movement.

Real-world efficiency data that can be used to adjust position, equipment, tire pressure, drafting, and setup choices.

Normalized results that make different test runs easier to compare.

LIVE A-B TESTING

Turn Every Ride into a Performance Test

One of the strongest use cases for Wasted Watts Tracker is fast real-world A/B testing. Riders immediately see how the wasted watts tracker helps them make practical decisions, not just collect data.

With Test Mode, riders can repeat short test runs and compare setups using objective Normalized Wasted Watts data. Instead of relying on feel, brand claims, or wind-tunnel access, riders can test changes on the roads they actually ride.

Examples riders can test

Helmet A vs. Helmet B.

Hands on hoods vs drops vs aero/tucked position.

Different tire pressures on the same route.

Wheel choices and bike configurations.

Aero clothing vs standard kit.

Road bike setup vs time-trial setup.

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

Behind every insight provided by Wasted Watts is a sophisticated measurement system designed for professional-level accuracy. By combining multiple data sources and advanced algorithms,it transforms complex aerodynamic analysis into clear, actionable information you can use on every ride.

WHY IT'S DIFFERENT

Most aerodynamic testing solutions require dedicated roads, complex protocols, expensive facilities, or lengthy testing sessions. Wasted Watts was designed to work differently.

By combining professional-grade sensors, RTK positioning, and real-time analysis, it delivers wind-tunnel-level insights directly on the roads you already ride,making performance optimization faster, simpler, and more accessible than ever before.

Wasted Watts Tracker combines hardware, power meter data reading, smartphone connectivity, and RTK correction service.

To work the Wasted Watts Tracker properly requires :

A bike (ok that’s obvious 🙂)

A smartphone with data connectivity

A powermeter (preferably SRM PM9 or Quarq Spider to guarantee a good precision in low-latency mode)

The Wasted Watts Tracker is composed of 2 modules :Front Pitot module mounted on the front of the bike (TT bike attachment system available as an option)Rear GPS RTK module attached to the saddle

Front Pitot module mounted on the front of the bike (TT bike attachment system available as an option)

Rear GPS RTK module attached to the saddle

A Garmin bike computer display (or simply a smartphone mount if you’d prefer to use your smartphone)

Wasted Watts Tracker is designed to work with the rider’s existing bike power meter in ANT+ or BLE. The powermeter provides the input effort that the system compares against actual movement and energy losses. The Wasted Watts Tracker pairs with any ANT+/BLE powermeter, but note that the low-latency mode precision is only guaranteed with SRM PM9 or Quarq Spider BLE powermeters.

Cycling computer and app

Data appears during a ride through the dedicated smartphone app, compatible Garmin head units, or both.

RTK coverage, Smartphone, and mobile data

RTK correction requires a smartphone connection and mobile data access in supported areas through our included correction service (see above for areas covered)), or a custom RTK base station in order to provide the Wasted Watts Tracker with centimeter-level positioning through

Bike compatibility

Compatible with standard road bikes and gravel bikes. An additional front module mounting system is proposed for Time Trial and Triathlon bikes.

THE DEVELOPMENT JOURNEY

The idea behind Wasted Watts began with a simple observation: cyclists had excellent tools for measuring training load, such as power or heart rate, but no practical way to measure efficiency.

The team spent years developing a system capable of delivering wind-tunnel-grade insights outside controlled laboratory environments. Through continuous testing, validation, and collaboration with professional teams, that vision evolved into the product you see today.

A tool designed not just for professionals, but for every cyclist who wants to ride faster through better understanding.

FOUNDER STORY AND PRODUCT ORIGIN

Aeroscale was founded by Manuel Sellier,a former elite cyclist with a PhD in Physics, an MBA, and years of experience in advanced technology and engineering. His background gives the project a rare combination of cycling performance knowledge, scientific depth, and product development discipline.

The origin of the product is also personal and technical.Manuel developed the concept with the influence and expertise of his father, who had experience in wind tunnel measurement technologies. Together, this father-son foundation helped shape the idea behind the Wasted Watts Tracker: make professional-level cycling efficiency measurement possible outside the lab.

Before bringing the product to Kickstarter, Aeroscale validated its approach through real-world work with more than 100 pro-riders, 6 World Tour teams, and the Bike Speed Lab service to refine its measurement approach, validate its technology, and prove that real-world efficiency testing could deliver measurable performance gains.

It is the result of years of measurement, testing, and iteration with cyclists who depend on precision.

The Wasted Watts concept is the result of collaboration between engineers, aerodynamic specialists, data scientists, and performance-focused cyclists.

The same expertise that has supported elite riders and World Tour teams is now being applied to create a platform accessible to the broader cycling community.

Our goal is not simply to build hardware. It is to redefine how cyclists understand performance.

WHAT BACKERS RECEIVE

In the Wasted Watts Tracker, backers receive a complete real-world cycling efficiency system, not just a single sensor.

We will ship Wasted Watts worldwide.

Shipping costs will be collected after the campaign through our pledge manager, allowing us to calculate accurate shipping rates based on destination and reward selection.

This approach ensures fair pricing for all backers while simplifying the Kickstarter experience.

The roadmap below shows how Wasted Watts has evolved from the current prototypeinto the production-ready system that backers will receive. Over the coming months, the team will continue improving precision, compatibility, automation, and ease of use, adding features such as automatic calibrations, broader device support, iOS compatibility, and faster real-time analysis.

By the time units ship, backers will receive the most advanced and refined version of the platform, built on continuous testing and feedback from both professional teams and everyday riders.

MEASURE. OPTIMIZE. WIN.

Cycling performance is not only about producing more power. It’s about wasting less of it.

Wasted Watts reveals the hidden data behind every ride, helping cyclists understand where speed is lost and where performance can be gained.

Real roads. Real data. Real speed.

Join us and become one of the first riders to experience wind tunnel data, on your bike.

At AB-Launch, we've raised over $50 million since 2020, assisting creators with pre-campaign advertising, crowdfunding design, and community engagement - while keeping their business vision at heart.

Risks and challenges

Building hardware like this is hard. Luckily, we have been working on this for years already, and have multiple manufacturing-ready prototypes already on the road, collecting data and users' feedback.

Of course, we don't underestimate the complexities that could arise in the process of shipping, but we are well prepared for that!

Environmental commitments

projects.ai_intro_en: The Wasted Watts Tracker is the first system that reveals how much energy disappears into aerodynamic drag, rolling resistance, and drivetrain losses while you ride. Using professional-grade RTK GPS positioning and real-time aerodynamic measurement, it delivers lab-accurate data directly on the road—no wind tunnel required. Cyclists can optimize their position, equipment, and gear by making the invisible factors that determine speed finally visible.
ai_highlights_en: Measures aerodynamic drag, rolling resistance, and efficiency in real road conditions—no wind tunnel or lab needed
Professional-grade accuracy with 0.5% precision over 60 seconds and centimeter-accurate RTK GPS positioning
Live performance feedback system with app integration for real-time optimization during every ride
ai_specs_en: Real-world roads, no dedicated facility required
projects.ai_risks_en: This is an all-or-nothing crowdfunding campaign with a funding deadline of July 9, 2026. Hardware projects of this nature carry risks including potential manufacturing delays, the need for real-world validation across diverse riding conditions, and the possibility that the project may not reach its funding goal. Backers assume typical crowdfunding campaign risks.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Aeroscale is a cycling technology company focused on making professional-grade aerodynamic analysis accessible to everyday riders, proven with elite athletes including junior world champion Paul Seixas.
projects.ai_description_en:
Every cyclist knows their power. Few know where that power goes. The Wasted Watts Tracker is the first system that reveals exactly how much energy disappears while you ride, transforming aerodynamic drag, rolling resistance, and drivetrain losses from invisible obstacles into measurable, optimizable data. For decades, understanding these losses required access to wind tunnels, laboratories, and expensive testing protocols costing $1,500–$2,500 per session. Wasted Watts brings that professional-grade measurement technology directly onto the road, giving riders real-time, highly accurate data about their equipment efficiency, body position, and gear choices — no assumptions, no controlled environments, just results on the roads they ride every day.

At its core, the Tracker combines centimeter-accurate GPS RTK positioning, real-time aerodynamic measurement, a synchronized power meter integration, and automatic calibration systems into a single wearable platform. The result is measurement precision as high as 0.5% over 60 seconds, with the ability to detect drag changes as small as 0.13% — roughly 0.32 watts at 45 km/h. Live A-B testing mode lets riders compare equipment and positions in real time, translating raw data into actionable purchases and setup decisions. Unlike alternative systems that require dedicated testing protocols, controlled roads, and lengthy sessions, Wasted Watts works automatically during regular rides, making aerodynamic field testing both practical and repeatable.

The product has been refined over years of development with multiple manufacturing-ready prototypes already on the road collecting data and user feedback. Professional riders and teams have already validated its accuracy against known aerodynamic variations, proving its ability to deliver career-augmenting insights outside the lab. Whether you are a time-trial racer chasing marginal gains or a competitive amateur optimizing comfort and speed, the Wasted Watts Tracker changes the conversation from how hard you push to how efficiently that effort becomes speed — because the fastest rider is not always the strongest one, but often the most efficient.

projects.story_markdown:

Semi-Solid Battery \| Semiconductor Cooling \| Active Fan Cooling \| 10,000mAh \| Qi2 25W Wireless \| 45W Wired \| Phone • Watch • Earbuds

![AKNNER](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/107/910/7613b7fd69901f1158c44aa10624d3ab_original.jpg?anim=false&fit=cover&height=160&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781491110&width=160&sig=D0e4Dmc%2FIkFbd7jsCIy45g5U4APNCy0muEug69mUu7s%3D)

# Qi2 25W The First Semi-Solid State Cooling Power Bank

US$ 25,431

17days to go

28](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/aknner/qi2-25w-the-first-semi-solid-state-cooling-power-bank/comments) [Community](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/aknner/qi2-25w-the-first-semi-solid-state-cooling-power-bank/community)

## Story

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/109/604/50140fa537e260562ecce4d1dc09acd3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781504547&width=680&sig=vj1TyrkrbSht%2FL8yZC9NVCaSRSnwuvHSQJqn5ehRDsM%3D)

Your Phone's Rising Temperature Is Protesting.

But we designed a better solution.

Introducing the world's first Semiconductor-Cooled Semi-Solid State Power Bank.

#### A breakthrough charging solution that keeps your phone cooler on both the physical and chemical levels while charging.

- Physical Cooling: Advanced semiconductor cooling combined with active fan-assisted heat dissipation rapidly removes heat from your device.

- Chemical Cooling: Next-generation semi-solid state battery technology generates less heat during charging, reducing thermal buildup at its source.

### The result? Faster, cooler, and safer charging.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/007/6beaaf98c91c30e19c810d67422c3500_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781491878&width=680&sig=bxixXCDYTbYnvkrRa1OhcC139H8QqQMTAh2eZY463%2FE%3D)

Charging Got Faster. But It Also Got Hotter.

For years, power banks have focused on faster charging, bigger capacities, and more features.

Yet one problem remains largely ignored:

#### "Heat"

Whether wired or wireless, fast charging generates heat. Excessive heat can reduce charging efficiency, affect comfort, and accelerate battery aging.

That's why we created something different.

The world's first Semiconductor-Cooled Semi-Solid State Power Bank.

More than just a power bank, it's designed specifically to combat charging heat at its source—keeping your devices cooler while they charge.

Because you don't need another bigger power bank.

You need one that keeps your phone cool.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/035/0036db6bdadae47c6de35dbaa32768a9_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781492124&width=680&sig=tUwhmBwimK3OCf0fGBSl9zBH4GszrwCZJ7tZogu6J2c%3D)

### More Than Innovation. It's Persistence.

The best products aren't built to impress.

They're built to solve problems.

After years of relentless refinement, we've created a power bank designed to tackle one of charging's biggest frustrations: heat.

Its appearance may seem ordinary.

Its technology is anything but.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/109/717/dc853a3d7cbca3ba793f508fdf595255_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781505567&width=680&sig=0%2B5nvi%2F5pw3TcuWEbpheTl2t9k54p0RovE9enl19iIc%3D)

### Semiconductor Cooling + Active Fan Cooling

The dangers of excessive charging heat are well known. Here are some of the most common effects:

1\. Shortened Battery Lifespan

Excessive heat accelerates battery degradation, leading to:

- Reduced battery health

- Shorter battery life between charges

Battery aging begins to accelerate above 35°C (95°F) and becomes significantly worse with prolonged exposure to temperatures above 55°C (131°F).

2\. Reduced Device Performance

When temperatures rise, smartphones automatically throttle performance to protect internal components.

This can result in:

-  Lower gaming frame rates

- Slower video editing and processing

- System lag and reduced responsiveness

The problem becomes especially noticeable when gaming while wireless charging.

#### Active Fan Cooling

When your phone reaches 35°C (95°F)—the critical threshold for battery health—the active cooling system automatically kicks in.

A high-speed fan spins at up to 10,000 RPM, rapidly drawing heat away from the battery and core circuitry.

Charge without the heat penalty.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/086/51e0c4c044e6fee05399a0b392da4141_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781492378&width=680&sig=sbzkZSS75RPKUiuP7eH3wRzM4w4gQR0oouCpXNIy1Sg%3D)

The cooling fan is optimized for low-noise performance, operating at less than 19dB.

Whether you're in a quiet library, office, or using it late at night, it remains virtually unobtrusive.

Enjoy powerful cooling without the distraction of noise.

Efficient cooling. Quiet performance. Uninterrupted focus.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/206/236/c0e486ee96ed7fa17fdcd8f85e3f0762_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1782218423&width=680&sig=R0B3oAMpXeNfUDnDMxMAdVVQxDOxb8aZwnQ%2FrPi2lxs%3D)

#### Semiconductor Cooling

When the weather is hot and your phone is already surrounded by heat, even a high-speed cooling fan has its limits.

That's where semiconductor cooling comes in.

Widely used in cooling accessories for years, semiconductor technology delivers powerful active cooling beyond traditional airflow.

Whether you're gaming, streaming videos, recording TikTok content outdoors, or charging under the summer sun, rising temperatures can lead to frame drops, lag, and reduced performance.

With AKNNER's Semiconductor Cooling System, you don't have to worry.

When the temperature reaches 55°C (131°F), the semiconductor cooler automatically activates, rapidly drawing heat away from your device and bringing temperatures down.

When a fan isn't enough, semiconductor cooling takes over.

Stay cool. Stay fast. Stay in control.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/102/3de87400b7421775b9648d4b85cc5e1b_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781492535&width=680&sig=cUFUiVHzLMc0IGmOMZ%2BiptJ5S3OMliFg%2FP3xeMGef5E%3D)The cooling function automatically turns off when magnetic charging is inactive, or when the temperature drops to 27–30°C during charging.

- Gaming at full intensity

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/206/241/68c94373ae63f061e689e1c76a7422f0_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1782218436&width=680&sig=2hCtZlZAOXiURlpsiad7PP68bdscVcqDxbwS0V00F%2BM%3D)

- Filming in the outdoors

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/125/9ee977e64d1be74a2df3fa146883acc3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781492656&width=680&sig=DqJ98dMxjHUFLwXBoYUrxEF4jsHvA9f2oQpd1dv18yg%3D)

- Every demanding moment

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/206/249/01b10ae243db8f434873bc3aeaccaa03_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1782218451&width=680&sig=pSbE1bgnCUY3uzelDDGXNLIBKZ1Lf1qsI%2B%2Fvh3IxM9E%3D)

#### Ultra-Thin Aluminum Alloy Body

Cooling isn’t only about active systems—it starts with the design.

We use a lightweight, ultra-thin aluminum alloy body for efficient heat conduction.

Compared to plastic or rubber, aluminum dissipates heat faster, helping spread and release it more effectively.

The slim structure shortens heat paths and reduces internal heat buildup.

Combined with active cooling, it keeps temperatures stable during high-power charging.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/148/9a0d9c924fdba2bf306c6ef78f8358f2_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781492749&width=680&sig=FBUWHjVgnOFUV%2F%2BteAU6zNYowK6E3A0JbTReI%2BZTCOs%3D)

#### This Is Not Just a Power Bank

This is an evolution of mobile power.

AKNNER redefines the charging experience—not only delivering energy to your device, but actively removing heat from it.

In lab tests, temperatures were reduced by up to 28°C (82.4°F).

From now on, charging no longer has to come with overheating.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/260/45a16ad64a53d0364fee9d12d2429cad_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781493698&width=680&sig=SjvERAd%2FdqBwhGUgGclvubg5Rtya7L8GM%2FRA5DOK1I8%3D)The cooling function automatically turns off when magnetic charging is inactive, or when the temperature drops to 27–30°C during charging.

### Next-Gen Wireless Charging

• 1st Gen — 7.5W

• 2nd Gen — 15W

• 3rd Gen — 25W

Faster. Smarter. More efficient.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/206/253/757b7cc0ab9bcdb1130e53dff357e1c4_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1782218467&width=680&sig=D26shfWYizZtz2Ft9nALoqaZ%2FJvsHunWKZQs5e3DemY%3D)

Even wireless charging doesn’t need to slow you down.

With up to 25W wireless fast charging, it perfectly matches the charging needs of modern iPhones.

This is one of the highest standards in wireless charging today—delivering real speed when it matters most.

Whether you're outdoors or using short breaks in your day, you can quickly top up your device anytime.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/276/b2d295e8cc7c94da2fd8a7c0b7dd2dd4_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781493886&width=680&sig=p%2Fv2i04RcDU%2BjhSLTc9a3cssen6Tzrx62Ywoz7kR4sQ%3D)

### Not Just About Speed—But About Safety

Fast charging matters. But safety and battery lifespan matter just as much.

Even with 25W wireless fast charging and strong magnetic alignment, prolonged exposure to heat can still accelerate battery aging and affect long-term performance.

That’s why AKNNER doesn’t only focus on cooling systems—it starts from the battery itself.

We adopt a next-generation semi-solid state battery, offering:

• Better thermal stability

• Higher safety performance

• Longer cycle life

Compared to traditional lithium-ion cells.

Even under high power output and extended use, it maintains stable and reliable performance.

From active cooling to semi-solid state cells—

AKNNER is not just about charging speed. It’s about safety, stability, and durability behind every charge.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/285/1c0733f5673eafde135a2c475a18c36f_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781493936&width=680&sig=JdzAurUW0HAkew5Dlyi%2Brc1p2h4%2Fb2yJ1b%2FcsZWoBpk%3D)

#### Don’t Let Its Compact Size Fool You

AKNNER integrates a 10,000mAh high-capacity battery into a lightweight, compact body—delivering long-lasting power support for your devices.

From morning departures to late-night returns, battery anxiety is no longer something you need to worry about.

Small in size. Strong in endurance.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/296/6a41017ebc2932ff7fe9678e515bb593_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781494019&width=680&sig=nqq8uJ66v9S0w%2Bvw0QGsTq5rnZbXywdgrulKH6u2%2BZo%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/109/532/fc768d1d9e8cfb7a30d32085474c635a_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781504054&width=680&sig=fZy%2Fmrs3%2BufF5xN4AvOR9xR0U%2BAIJK50etDIrijZws8%3D)

### USB-C Bidirectional Fast Charging

AKNNER features a full-function USB-C port that supports both input and output charging.

In addition to magnetic wireless charging, you can also use a USB-C cable for fast wired charging—switching freely between different scenarios to balance convenience and efficiency.

One port. Two-way power. Full flexibility.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/206/260/76a9a5f540b1c7fbb3a3fd30b732f350_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1782218481&width=680&sig=GnyLk7shSu0JUmrsXUUsP2amGdEt7u00tZtI4gzYC9A%3D)

#### 10 Minutes. 40% Recharged.

When your battery is running low, every minute matters.

AKNNER supports high-speed self-charging technology, delivering over 40% power in just 10 minutes—so you can get back on track in the shortest time possible.

Fast top-up. Instant readiness.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/321/46ab0396b34e8de8b0ef77c20628fa77_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781494123&width=680&sig=3Ir1z3a3vyrybzMRcMh4beNjCyG1CyEwMlh9wFrjQi8%3D)

#### Power you can rely on, wherever you go outdoors.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/206/266/e2dd08f84ec31044e4bc68a49542e70d_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1782218497&width=680&sig=6DBT1BOQ2bflD6oLCX8oo01JybRbfmLY%2Frn1RUmDul8%3D)

### 12.8N Strong Magnetic Force

Whether you're commuting, exercising outdoors, or using your phone while charging, AKNNER stays firmly attached to the back of your device without slipping or shifting.

With a 12.8N strong magnetic force, it delivers a significantly more stable connection compared to standard magnetic power banks.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/331/74c29db2f18d2269399e86d15f16a198_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781494210&width=680&sig=HZZPZU89oYzGtF%2FssadxNtg3M9L4j4NvtVDjEL7flUI%3D)

Even when placed in your pocket, backpack, or used one-handed, it remains securely in place.

Wireless charging, made more reliable.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/109/482/cf9113788b27dfe0637da0db1bc9ee66_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781503903&width=680&sig=IWpyACQa9OdCRyWLxZS4XtTicmS3FMz2Q%2FqtTDIfuNk%3D)

### Say Goodbye to Fake Battery Readings

45% shouldn’t suddenly become 1% in the next moment.

AKNNER uses a high-precision coulomb counter IC, ensuring battery readings remain highly accurate even after long-term use, with an error margin of less than 3%.

So you always know exactly how much power you have left.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/344/a7d9efc19113b4f43c0bfcd52692f4c0_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781494377&width=680&sig=MO68a%2FLFfW%2FhZZ0PT3lM5yhl94Z%2BFT0mHJz7rTIm1pI%3D)

No surprises. Just precise power awareness.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/109/479/3e4c7ca3b5c19b3f02f2fc6e11a1045e_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781503880&width=680&sig=nS88AFsJXb87R7IudSYtYZnvqtVss3Ablt2DKmepcmI%3D)

### Designed for More Devices

To accommodate different camera layouts, AKNNER has been structurally optimized for broader compatibility.

It supports over 95% of magnetic charging-enabled smartphones, ensuring seamless attachment without camera interference.

Just snap it on—and start charging instantly.

Simple alignment. Universal compatibility.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/353/08635cdead7e86de88fc3b9c67f7fcb0_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781494444&width=680&sig=FA%2BrDMYPqT6GhzwdmoY%2BQ2OKj9sgBcWjV10CNsnuZlQ%3D)

AKNNER also supports most smartwatches and wireless earbuds on the market that feature wireless charging.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/361/7a617e2e6b8f6bbe99d1765d7972f355_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781494472&width=680&sig=mbCh5cRgDg6b5uNeaAJZFmzcbC%2FfK00ypOMmrffr2iU%3D)If you are unsure, please contact us.

#### Earn Cash Back

We’ve partnered with [Kickbooster](https://kb-437.kickbooster.me/boost/qi2-25w-the-first-semi-solid) to thank you for your support. For every backer you refer to this Kickstarter campaign, you’ll earn 10% cash back from their pledge.

Invite your friends, family, and community to join the journey, and get rewarded while helping bring our product to life.

[![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/269/006/dd9e92b0568be43f9c0fb1fd894f4135_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1782723370&width=680&sig=LBtFwo7a%2FuQCiHK8GCpkn4ST8%2FLFIsvWqcqVuvYKL5g%3D)](https://kb-437.kickbooster.me/boost/qi2-25w-the-first-semi-solid)

### Specification

AKNNER uses a 10,000mAh semi-solid state battery with an integrated structural design.

It supports up to 25W Qi2 magnetic wireless charging, and up to 45W output via USB-C fast charging. The USB-C port supports both input and output, enabling bidirectional charging.

A semiconductor cooling module and high-speed fan are integrated into the system for thermal management during charging and high-load operation.Battery level is monitored using a high-precision coulomb counter IC, improving accuracy and maintaining consistency over long-term use.

The housing is made of an ultra-thin aluminum alloy, designed to improve both structural rigidity and thermal conductivity.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/365/80e19566051a21dea3510ec3f63c7c5b_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781494503&width=680&sig=IoFsUG2P1pwpYrJ3syYHa%2FAM58rLxmgPmKdmeGeNlPo%3D)

### What's in the Box?

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/461/26c889bd9090c17216023ea2ecfb3a24_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781495375&width=680&sig=LJh%2FR5fJCoC6vXZIpNxxrxbvbWuTwMpICjRVdSeYbnU%3D)

- English User Manual \*1

- AKNNER Power Bank \*1

- Packaging Box \*1

### Guaranteed Warranty.

Every AKNNER is covered by a 1-year limited warranty against manufacturing defects and hardware-related issues under normal use.

Should any eligible issue arise, our support team will provide prompt assistance and work with you toward a suitable resolution.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/763/53d6f0cd38c8a8272acc238959568be6_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781497269&width=680&sig=%2FFkqrp%2B0w3AmHaUKfRT5IVpxL1M2pTj3snEglanW59E%3D)

### About us

AKNNER is designed to redefine the portable charging experience by combining fast charging, active cooling, and advanced battery technology in one compact device.

Built around a 10,000mAh semi-solid state battery, it delivers reliable power while maintaining improved thermal stability and safety. With support for 25W Qi2 magnetic wireless charging and up to 45W wired fast charging, it adapts to different usage needs with ease.

To address one of the most common issues in fast charging—heat—AKNNER integrates a semiconductor cooling system and high-speed fan to actively manage temperature during operation.

From battery innovation to thermal design, every detail is engineered to make charging more stable, efficient, and dependable in everyday use.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/811/0136b786b30ea719eb0dc7d71fb89de3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781497508&width=680&sig=q%2BxXxaZh4pctPkmFecZXJ0Fk8zRSIZiCnZrus1Ol7yE%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/812/ef0bbac0d2ace88dbb35aab1e6aed447_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781497514&width=680&sig=KQavJO%2FeJH3EdRYJsVSZOoU7DoeX4nDRz1YaEVykShk%3D)

### Timeline

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/914/0bbb738b557b1c305c0ad38c3a594522_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781498092&width=680&sig=JtH984wB5csElDdEGG3KXBjueADgsjEf9E8emuipDsQ%3D)

### Collaborators

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/282/394/307d470266ba82957f827a73c8b0c123_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1782809002&width=680&sig=WHQciq4Ie5%2Bf1HHxMpGvXFODIR6IzJXkcdK1e4JBAS8%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/282/399/3b1eb9689b39bf11d2e66ad1cb17e880_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1782809007&width=680&sig=u3kCbRuC8VFGVIKzuBgh9%2BqVOfEH2dL5KiIoRW3QoP8%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/282/404/0d65a5f0308b6915d7b00763cbd31c7c_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1782809022&width=680&sig=ywKfn2Y10lAAh53Wiv7UDVByXMqhfwa7%2BUR3PpPKWKg%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/282/410/b5abf7aa561d6689f600060b8613d823_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1782809036&width=680&sig=GBPuF4neCI8cStEnBGB9wS493IXYIqTxKPGcW%2Bq6EIk%3D)

## Risks and challenges

As this is a newly developed product, there may be unforeseen challenges during the mass production and supply chain process. While we are actively coordinating manufacturing, component sourcing, and quality control, production schedules may occasionally require adjustments, which could result in delayed shipments.

In addition, this product contains rechargeable battery components and belongs to the category of portable electronic power devices. Before shipment, we will complete the necessary testing and obtain relevant certifications required for different countries and regions to ensure compliance with transportation and safety regulations.

Our team will continue to provide transparent updates throughout the production and fulfillment process and will do our best to minimize delays and ensure product quality.

[Learn about accountability on Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/help/hc/sections/115001107133)

With a12.8N strong magnetic force, it delivers a significantly more stable connection compared to standard magnetic power banks.

Even when placed in your pocket, backpack, or used one-handed, it remains securely in place.

Wireless charging, made more reliable.

Say Goodbye to Fake Battery Readings

45% shouldn’t suddenly become 1% in the next moment.

AKNNER uses ahigh-precision coulomb counter IC, ensuring battery readings remain highly accurate even after long-term use, with an error margin of less than3%.

So you always know exactly how much power you have left.

No surprises. Just precise power awareness.

Designed for More Devices

To accommodate different camera layouts, AKNNER has been structurally optimized for broader compatibility.

It supports over95% of magnetic charging-enabled smartphones, ensuring seamless attachment without camera interference.

Just snap it on—and start charging instantly.

Simple alignment. Universal compatibility.

AKNNER also supports most smartwatches and wireless earbuds on the market that feature wireless charging.

We’ve partnered withKickboosterto thank you for your support. For every backer you refer to this Kickstarter campaign, you’ll earn 10% cash back from their pledge.

Invite your friends, family, and community to join the journey, and get rewarded while helping bring our product to life.

AKNNER uses a 10,000mAh semi-solid state battery with an integrated structural design.

It supports up to 25W Qi2 magnetic wireless charging, and up to 45W output via USB-C fast charging. The USB-C port supports both input and output, enabling bidirectional charging.

A semiconductor cooling module and high-speed fan are integrated into the system for thermal management during charging and high-load operation.Battery level is monitored using a high-precision coulomb counter IC, improving accuracy and maintaining consistency over long-term use.

The housing is made of an ultra-thin aluminum alloy, designed to improve both structural rigidity and thermal conductivity.

What's in the Box?

English User Manual *1

AKNNER Power Bank *1

Packaging Box *1

Guaranteed Warranty.

Every AKNNER is covered bya 1-year limited warrantyagainst manufacturing defects and hardware-related issues under normal use.

Should any eligible issue arise, our support team will provide prompt assistance and work with you toward a suitable resolution.

AKNNER is designed to redefine the portable charging experience by combining fast charging, active cooling, and advanced battery technology in one compact device.

Built around a 10,000mAh semi-solid state battery, it delivers reliable power while maintaining improved thermal stability and safety. With support for 25W Qi2 magnetic wireless charging and up to 45W wired fast charging, it adapts to different usage needs with ease.

To address one of the most common issues in fast charging—heat—AKNNER integrates a semiconductor cooling system and high-speed fan to actively manage temperature during operation.

From battery innovation to thermal design, every detail is engineered to make charging more stable, efficient, and dependable in everyday use.

Risks and challenges

As this is a newly developed product, there may be unforeseen challenges during the mass production and supply chain process. While we are actively coordinating manufacturing, component sourcing, and quality control, production schedules may occasionally require adjustments, which could result in delayed shipments.

In addition, this product contains rechargeable battery components and belongs to the category of portable electronic power devices. Before shipment, we will complete the necessary testing and obtain relevant certifications required for different countries and regions to ensure compliance with transportation and safety regulations.

Our team will continue to provide transparent updates throughout the production and fulfillment process and will do our best to minimize delays and ensure product quality.

projects.ai_intro_en: The AKNNER power bank is the world's first semiconductor-cooled semi-solid state power bank, featuring 10,000mAh capacity with 25W Qi2 wireless and 45W wired charging. It combines semiconductor cooling with active fan cooling to reduce device temperatures by up to 28°C, enabling faster, cooler, and safer charging for phones, watches, and earbuds.
ai_highlights_en: World's first semiconductor-cooled power bank with active fan cooling (10,000 RPM, <19dB)
25W Qi2 wireless + 45W wired fast charging with 10,000mAh semi-solid battery
Reduces device temperature by up to 28°C for safer, faster charging
projects.ai_risks_en: This is a crowdfunding project with no confirmed pricing or delivery timeline visible on the page. The innovative cooling and semi-solid battery claims are unverified by independent testing. Backers face typical crowdfunding risks including potential delays, specification changes, or non-delivery.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: AKNNER is a technology company that spent years developing thermal management solutions for portable charging devices.
projects.ai_description_en:
The AKNNER power bank represents a breakthrough in portable charging technology as the world's first semiconductor-cooled semi-solid state power bank. Combining a 10,000mAh semi-solid state battery with advanced semiconductor cooling and active fan dissipation (spinning at up to 10,000 RPM, under 19dB), this device tackles the heat problem that plagues fast charging. It delivers Qi2 25W wireless charging, 45W USB-C bidirectional wired charging, and features a 12.8N strong magnetic alignment, all while keeping your phone, watch, or earbuds cooler during the charging process.

At the core of AKNNER's innovation is its dual cooling approach. On the physical level, a semiconductor cooling module paired with an active fan rapidly pulls heat away from your device's battery and circuitry. On the chemical level, the next-generation semi-solid state battery inherently generates less heat during charging cycles compared to traditional lithium-ion cells. The active cooling system automatically activates when your device reaches 35°C (95°F)—the critical threshold where battery health begins to deteriorate—ensuring consistent performance without overheating.

This focus on thermal management matters because excessive charging heat is more than a discomfort—it's a measurable threat to your device's longevity and performance. Battery health degrades faster above 35°C and accelerates significantly beyond 55°C (131°F), leading to reduced capacity and shorter lifespans. Additionally, phones throttle CPU and GPU performance when overheating, causing lag during gaming, video editing, and multitasking. AKNNER's cooling architecture is engineered to prevent these issues, maintaining both charging speeds and device responsiveness.

Beyond its thermal advantages, AKNNER packs substantial power into a practical format. The 45W wired and 25W wireless outputs accommodate modern smartphones, smartwatches, and earbuds with the convenience of one compact unit. Early backers on Kickstarter can secure the AKNNER at $48 (27% off the $63 MSRP) in limited quantities, with global shipping planned for September 2026. Whether you're gaming while streaming, working through a long commute, or simply topping off overnight, AKNNER provides a cooler, safer charging experience designed to protect your devices and your investment in longer battery life.
projects.nameZh: QI2 25W：首款半固态制冷充电宝
projects.ai_intro_zh: QI2 25W 是全球首款采用半固态制冷技术的充电宝，在无线充电时主动散热。它支持 25W 快速无线充电，内置半固态电池技术，提供更高的安全性和更长的使用寿命。
projects.ai_description_zh:
Qi2 25W 是全球首款半固态冷却 MagSafe 充电器，将先进的冷却技术与高速无线充电相结合。半固态冷却系统可主动散热，让你的手机在充电时保持低温，从而实现更快的充电速度和更好的电池健康。

支持 Qi2 协议，提供高达 25W 的无线充电功率，兼容最新的 iPhone 和 Android 设备。MagSafe 兼容确保与支持 MagSafe 的设备完美对齐。内置冷却风扇即使在快速充电时也能保持低温运行。

紧凑的桌面设计带有时尚的 RGB 氛围灯，为你的工作台增添个性。USB-C 供电确保广泛的兼容性。该充电器非常适合需要快速、低温无线充电的重度手机用户。
ai_highlights_zh: 首款半固态制冷充电宝，主动散热
25W 快速无线充电
半固态电池，更高安全性和更长寿命
projects.ai_risks_zh: 这是一个众筹项目，页面上未显示确认的定价或交付时间线。半固态冷却技术是新颖的，长期性能和耐用性数据有限。众筹活动存在生产延迟的固有风险。

projects.ai_intro_en: The OneXPlayer 3 is a handheld gaming PC powered by Intel Arc G3 Extreme graphics, featuring LPDDR5X memory and PCIe 4.0 SSD storage. Available in multiple configurations with 24GB or 32GB RAM and up to 1TB storage, it delivers high-performance portable gaming.
ai_highlights_en: Intel Arc G3 Extreme graphics for powerful handheld gaming performance
Up to 32GB LPDDR5X 8533 memory for fast multitasking and gaming
PCIe 4.0 SSD storage up to 1TB for quick load times
projects.ai_risks_en: As a crowdfunding project, delivery timelines may face delays due to manufacturing or supply chain issues. The August 2026 estimated delivery is contingent on successful production. Intel Arc GPU game compatibility may vary with some titles.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: OneXPlayer is a handheld gaming PC manufacturer producing portable Windows gaming devices with high-performance Intel hardware.
projects.ai_description_en:
The OneXPlayer 3 is a next-generation 3-in-1 handheld PC that combines gaming, productivity, and creative work into a single powerful device. Powered by the Intel Arc G3 Extreme processor, it delivers desktop-class graphics performance with built-in AI acceleration, making it capable of running AAA games, creative applications, and productivity software on the go.

The device features an 8.8-inch 144Hz OLED display with vibrant colors and smooth motion, paired with a massive 85Wh battery for extended sessions away from power. Available in multiple configurations including up to 32GB LPDDR5X 8533 memory and 1TB PCIe 4.0 SSD storage, the OneXPlayer 3 adapts to different usage needs and budgets.

Designed to replace the need for carrying separate gaming handhelds, laptops, and tablets, the OneXPlayer 3 connects to external displays for desktop-mode productivity while maintaining true handheld portability. Built by OneXPlayer, a established brand in the handheld PC space with a track record of successful campaigns and deliveries.

projects.ai_intro_en: The OneXPlayer X2 Mini Pro is a 3-in-1 OLED gaming handheld that also works as a lightweight tablet and a powerful workstation — born from the community's request to give the performance-beast APEX an OLED display. Game, create, and work without switching devices.
ai_highlights_en: OLED display: the APEX's performance now with a bright OLED screen, as requested by the community
3-in-1 form factor: OLED gaming handheld + lightweight tablet + work/creation device
AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 388 processor
Up to 64GB LPDDR5X memory and 1TB PCIe 4.0 SSD
Optional 85Wh external battery; available in Standard or Liquid-Cooled versions
projects.ai_risks_en: Indiegogo Express Crowdfunding campaign — standard platform risk disclosure applies; the captured page content did not enumerate project-specific risks beyond the platform's Express Crowdfunding notice.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: OneXPlayer — handheld gaming PC maker behind the APEX performance beast, now delivering the OLED-equipped X2 Mini Pro in direct response to community demand.
projects.ai_description_en:
The OneXPlayer X2 Mini Pro is a 3-in-1 OLED gaming handheld that also works as a lightweight tablet and a powerful workstation — born directly from community demand. After the launch of the APEX “performance beast,” the most repeated request was simple: “What if it had an OLED display?” The X2 Mini Pro delivers exactly that.

An OLED gaming handheld. A lightweight tablet. A capable device for work and creation. Game, create, and work without ever switching devices — and it's still a beast, only now it shines brighter than ever thanks to its native landscape OLED panel with 144Hz VRR and HDR.

Under the hood is the AMD Ryzen™ AI Max+ 388 processor, paired with detachable controllers, magnetic keyboard support, and an optional 85Wh external battery for extended sessions on the go. It's built for players who want flagship handheld power without giving up a premium display — the APEX's performance, finally with the screen it deserved.
