projects.name: FABISENSE 252 Series: Plug-In/Portable Monitors | CO, Gas, Smoke, Radon & Climate
projects.blurb: Two monitors. One broader view of your home air. FABISENSE 252 Series combines AirGuard 4 for CO, gas, smoke, temperature & humidity monitoring with RadonSense Pro for ongoing radon visibility. Compact, plug-in, production-ready, and shipping October 2026.
projects.ai_intro_en: FABISENSE 252 Series combines AirGuard 4 for CO, gas, smoke, temperature & humidity monitoring with RadonSense Pro for ongoing radon visibility. Compact, plug-in, production-ready monitors designed for kitchens, garages, basements, cabins, and RVs. Both products have completed development and are shipping October 2026.
ai_highlights_en: AirGuard 4 monitors CO, combustible gas, smoke, temperature, and humidity in a compact plug-in design
RadonSense Pro provides continuous radon monitoring with Tuya Wi-Fi app access and trend data
Production-ready with CE, FCC, RoHS, REACH compliance and UL-certified electrochemical CO sensor
ai_specs_en: CO, combustible gas, smoke, temperature, humidity
Continuous radon monitoring, Tuya Wi-Fi, trend data, customizable alerts
projects.ai_risks_en: Campaign is only 13% funded with 31 days remaining, indicating uncertainty in reaching the HK$78,000 goal. While products are production-ready with compliance documentation available, estimated October 2026 shipping is subject to typical manufacturing and logistics delays common in crowdfunding.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: FABISENSE has completed three previous crowdfunding campaigns on other platforms, raising more than HK$855,000 from 1,556 backers, with all three campaigns successfully fulfilled.

When paired with theGPD G2via theMCIO 8iconnection, it unlocks the full performance potential of your setup.Click here to visit theGPD BOX crowdfunding page​ and learn more about it. # NEVILO Smart Travel Cooler Case for Portable Insulin Storage

You’re only charged if the project meets its funding goal by the campaign deadline.

0](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/nevilo/nevilo-smart-cooler-travel-anywhere-with-insulin-freedom/comments) [Community](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/nevilo/nevilo-smart-cooler-travel-anywhere-with-insulin-freedom/community)

## Story

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/056/762/620bf5919d4cdd00ad335503c8b293a2_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781081146&width=680&sig=t8t7kvo%2BrR1ynMRSxh3iJFZP%2FWR%2BLJB%2Fdlv5L8gdNvw%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/094/b7eb1e66a363bc2c65a7af2a0d20904c_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781231278&width=680&sig=H8lAFRmeTkNj6RcPjU710UeJ6wJkXHK9M4U%2FobthsjI%3D)

Many must travel with temperature-sensitive items like insulin. But once it loses cooling, it risks total failure.

Ice packs are a gamble. How long will they last? What if there’s a delay? Often, the cooling fails before you even arrive.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/083/668/566c0c277bf5ae98f38375776e49a71f_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781257853&width=680&sig=dLdTZD5S8kBUQFeO4j%2BOBBqGneAq88e%2F8GTadYJGZfU%3D)

Don't let fear dictate your life. Stop canceling trips or staying home just to protect your temp-sensitive items. Compromise shouldn't be the norm.

It’s time for a change.

Meet NEVILO.

Powered by semiconductor cooling + biogel cooling, NEVILO replaces the ticking clock of ice packs with reliable, constant temperature stability. No more checking the ice. No more travel anxiety.

Stop planning around your temp-sensitive items, travel should be about freedom.

### Meet NEVILO Travel Cooler Case

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/066/5a4ddf4a9369d1d52d7751e52cb1e034_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591198&width=680&sig=jCbo8p2kDJly9QeiDWVH5LDXZINKM1Fr0aM2sluf5%2B8%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/083/667/45f6db2bec8b2f555cc816f8c58b2eb3_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781257847&width=680&sig=KeW%2FG8xU4sppbZXw30f2IIr9JPWohvwGCqNC3X4W%2FyU%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/897/e01d3e7f18e32c296967d0fab924f434_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781497941&width=680&sig=p0bu7bwFo1WTM3djzG3YincoqAeUPTGxIUaBghHF2XI%3D)

Powered by advanced upgraded semiconductor technology, NEVILO eliminates the bulk and noise of traditional compressors to deliver instant, precise cooling from 2–20°C in a quiet and reliable system.

This electronic cooling is combined with Biogel-assisted passive retention in a single cup-shaped travel cooler case that is neither a disposable ice pack nor just an insulated bottle. It is a visible, adjustable, power-readyportable smart cooler case designed for stable temp-sensitive storage like insulin on the go.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/136/349/80127bdaeaab3f53f57151c1c6eeed7e_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781664578&width=680&sig=SRcAq8lusgwzvABbKIjLP77fLaMF3rnF9viYjEdAEfs%3D)

### How It Works？

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/075/e76921425761f43edf8b83f2009dfe19_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591238&width=680&sig=qUa2Kc84wNnXNMEplj5FVXkuJHZHwcPNIZ5YiEKYydQ%3D)

NEVILO offers 2 different ways to use its cooling function. Follow these steps for optimal performance:

Passive Biogel Cooling — For Transit Best for: flights, commutes, and any situation where you’re on the move.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/730/0989e4cbda5580f81c6c8eb55caa5b25_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781595422&width=680&sig=CTi1YWBb1yI11mARoJ60C%2Bw8mr4ibWa9irPgBsE87Pk%3D)

Before your trip, freeze the included Biogel in your freezer for 10–12 hours. Place the frozen Biogel and your items into the cup, then screw the lid on tightly. In this unpowered state, the vacuum-insulated cup body combined with the Biogel maintains low temperatures for approximately 6–8 hours.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/082/259/da5f1d4423ae338f4cf7a555335cb766_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781249552&width=680&sig=MdF8aQzdK2TYeKG1jdXX0eQPAKa1AgAYMLSWg46Tj%2Bk%3D)

✅ During this, NEVILO can be safely stored in a backpack or luggage.

Active Cooling Mode — When You’re Stationary Best for: hotel rooms, car rides, office desks, or anywhere you can set it down in open air.

Once the Biogel loses its cooling effect, activate NEVILO’s built-in active cooling mode. NEVILO comes with a built-in 10,000mAh battery that powers the cooling module independently. On a full charge, it maintains your set temperature for approximately 6–7 hours.

For extended use, we recommend keeping NEVILO plugged in (home outlet, power bank, or car charger) whenever possible. Plugging into external power maximizes your cooling time, providing uninterrupted comfort throughout your journey.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/082/233/f5fbf870c3c539087a3dfc3d795a5aa8_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781249321&width=680&sig=IM7lG%2BkjE9FPU7nW65cTjQAURbI9oFfD%2FLaOSyP4sbw%3D)

⚠️ Do not place NEVILO inside a closed backpack, bag, or luggage while powered on. Blocked vents will cause overheating and may damage the device.

### Compact Size, Colossal Capacity

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/077/a6d24c85c48afe5b2a3c9875474fde41_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591252&width=680&sig=eL8j5UqQc2V6Nh3Y2c7FjAxzNQ2zKI87sDI2Dv5vJrU%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/083/675/e86820b08f8fe1edb8591c89e4e8d804_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781257878&width=680&sig=fd7qI4Eqdv7vQESpvucNu0dlNBY4pxb%2FrcLqQ1MIsTc%3D)

NEVILO Smart Cooler Case holds up to 7 insulin pens (capacity may vary slightly depending on pen size). Its space-optimized design strikes the perfect balance between compactness and practicality.

With its sleek, lightweight profile, it slips effortlessly into your bag, making daily commutes and travel completely hassle-free.

### Visible & Adjustable Temperature Control

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/078/1256a1aebad703265cd197767a74b704_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591267&width=680&sig=mfsI3wjlbUPCdLIEsYCpkbv8r%2BsVwSUZex%2BoQz210lU%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/107/919/7e5a843f051577951fd5d31822608cd3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781491170&width=680&sig=czG%2B%2FMd0lDphVi4t0WOnepBSw6Or7SReElaqy6I4RR8%3D)

Traditional cooler bags leave you guessing.

NEVILO’s real-time LED display shows the current chamber temperature at a glance, so you always know exactly what’s happening inside.

- Adjustable Range: Set your target temperature anywhere between 2°C and 20°C (35.6–68°F).

- Precision: The device maintains the set temperature within ±1°C.

- Pre-cooling Time: When using active cooling, allow 15–30 minutes for the chamber to reach your target temperature before placing items inside.

- Celsius / Fahrenheit: Press and hold the mode button for 2 seconds to switch between °C and °F.

### Cup-Shaped Portability

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/079/83d0d38447c971320c700e15461276bf_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591278&width=680&sig=HJp5MBPCnCx4kEccCNhBtX8S1c0eRuqSN6HClpJx7cU%3D)

Perfect for:

- Diabetics (Insulin cold storage only. ⚠️ Not for enhancement or replacement. )

- Individuals who need to carry temp-sensitive items

- Outdoor enthusiasts and frequent travelers

- Gifting to friends and family who require temperature-sensitive items storage

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/083/678/0a4866764241c72c24d7aa761e434569_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781257888&width=680&sig=OpciBY8YT7FGn91rP%2F%2BT7UqnrAB3HM33sbhtEzLrWJ8%3D)

NEVILO uses a vertical travel-cup form factor — 291 mm tall, 96 mm in diameter — with an inner cooling chamber of 165 mm × 51 mm. That’s the same footprint as a standard travel tumbler.

Compared to traditional box-shaped coolers, NEVILO fits naturally in car cup holders, on desk corners, and in travel bags. It’s built for the spaces you already use.

### Perfect Gift for Those You Care About

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/083/6afa49f3c59e2b773d8b6432492801c7_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591290&width=680&sig=vmLcrMa5ucnZ6hxFQZ7WcuYTpWecOVAcfDI8b5IXkXk%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/100/0e2534ba61d90d97b76edf7ea553bb7f_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781492513&width=680&sig=9q8RuSqQH%2B86AWnp1EJK%2FSh0HfbWTWMf%2BPCOBXX05qc%3D)

NEVILO Smart Travel Cooler Case is more than just a product; it's a gift filled with thoughtful care. Whether it's to safeguard a loved one's temperature-sensitive essentials like insulin, preserve a friend's cherished skincare products, or offer peace of mind and convenience to a travel enthusiast, NEVILO is the perfect choice.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/341/ca4ea2dfc10c4ebd92f2125a84c2a9c8_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781593064&width=680&sig=J1e035YRu0FZwtPAhT17Kgkav8PRZMD0ime1ecqfpb8%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/342/97a66aaab105a6a48ab633ad61b1788d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781593065&width=680&sig=eg0HoyflWaSqtwzZjBUspJ%2BNX4Wx0z2ESaV%2FPr2Bcaw%3D)

### Specifications

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/085/438b86929e1dd08bb9c9ad58e6ab29ba_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591296&width=680&sig=F98DVrp7p5Dnnh7REccnAzthMflhX2byMFxGnB0X%2FfU%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/110/122/5d5326db53e757725ee9cb759bf2e97c_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781508761&width=680&sig=E%2B3R7jh2j5xfFvKdx03syzjiiIoT%2F9IBKqDlYKLezwU%3D)

⚠️ ⚠️ ⚠️ This product is intended for the portable cold storage of temp-sensitive items only. It is not a medical device and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or medical condition.

#### Safety Precautions

- Avoid inverting the cooling lid, blocking vents, or using in confined spaces like backpacks.

- Operate in 0-35℃ environments; keep away from direct sunlight and heat sources.

- Do not disassemble, clean with water/chemicals, or pour water directly into the cup.

- Built-in 10,000 mAh battery powers active cooling. NEVILO’s active cooling mode runs on its built-in battery. For extended use, we recommend keeping it plugged in(home outlet, power bank, or car socket) to preserve battery life and maintain uninterrupted cooling.

- Temperature rebound after power loss. If the battery runs out and no external power is connected, the temperature inside will gradually return to room level in approximately 20 minutes. For long trips, a portable power bank is strongly recommended (not included).

- Ventilation is mandatory when powered on. Do not invert the cooling lid, block the vents, or use the device in confined spaces (like backpacks or luggage) while the active cooling mode is running.

- Allow pre-cooling time. When switching to active cooling mode, allow 15–30 minutes for the chamber to reach your target temperature before placing items inside.

- Operating environment: Use in 0–35°C ambient temperatures. Keep away from direct sunlight and heat sources.

- Do not clean with water or chemicals. Do not disassemble, clean with water/chemicals, or pour water directly into the cup. Air dry after use.

- Stop use if damaged. Stop use and contact our support team if the fan, temperature display, or Biogel ice box is damaged.

### What's in the Box?

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/086/211a6cb5401fbccc73d8992dab6c1b99_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591308&width=680&sig=5%2FrM1FLTp9g3f2nlXx%2FZ3KdIf5iYAlSot9Hyv0%2FNdTY%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/084/103/e881e39f782467d04c62b9010b829f67_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781260626&width=680&sig=5HlwGchJh7Ukrh1yRsybcZqdd0dH97gIXR6JxhPUNfY%3D)

### Rewards

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/151/fa6d0c3140469b91e35f53b9e5b3901d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591876&width=680&sig=a2EAP3a2TPF%2BeVc1mhGGPqMDz2eEckroXFTdHH4DSiU%3D)

- Limited Super Early Birds

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/107/929/a293798507f137ee2519f848b75ef23f_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781491235&width=680&sig=C4pKc9N8WnKI9vGEajGsD%2BunOPuH2GLQLV%2Fdtl48jH8%3D)

- Early Birds

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/107/931/e5968d0999af9a8cbb7870ca89969314_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781491238&width=680&sig=YLGtKTvAwXZCX3qEQcL2I12MFQNMjHvjv%2F1WHJpvfKg%3D)

### Add-ons

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/089/3e03a2bef735c4d7af25233406c773c2_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591323&width=680&sig=HMhFuW4iAGdCxVbLjohx00yFSXnFZ%2B702rame3hvqeo%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/122/781/8ad16b96fb9532d045f8478c94bb3000_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781581391&width=680&sig=FxROzfFaNAAj%2Btmq9%2BSoZCkSzS0Q2ktLYPgWhxuUubE%3D)

Take your NEVILO anywhere with confidence and style.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/108/718/d252fbbd9898d7fbf1955374f450abc4_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781496904&width=680&sig=ORLUkbcOK3NQstdNEsyQ6lXPj5YVGgnOuAFeRuWKA9M%3D)

We’ve integrated a 45W GaN charger, a 10,000mAh battery capaicty, and a 70cm retractable type-c cable into one palm-sized hub, designed for those who travel light and move fast.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/109/684/d4f753738d9712e3abec6064b547b1ef_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781505272&width=680&sig=mOD6htudw%2B%2F3wChRfTWiwVqSfwdwgPCOHfq%2FkXmTOys%3D)

Ultra-durable 1.5m 100W braided charging cable with a thickened copper core and tungsten alloy connectors for superior performance and strength.

### Shipping Fee

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/092/0b3d430b1df36edcaec985d6806cd0a2_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591333&width=680&sig=26PfJ8%2FCWQGM82ND2miQg8S53ht1iy7XRrGjZ7V9mjI%3D)

We estimate the shipping cost for each standard pack to be in the range of $20–$30.

As shipping distances vary by region, the final shipping cost will be based on the actual fee at the time of shipment. Please note that estimated shipping costs are subject to change, and we appreciate your understanding.

### Developed Timeline

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/093/49133989e54b8baac9dc29f3b66773b4_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591340&width=680&sig=%2FnNv2etct5FA%2FUb5kHwJTPZvLCQdCD0Y7qzRAg2gn38%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/101/7203d1e25403008d36d682ebd2703386_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591397&width=680&sig=8QWExuxlf0PWauZlFpSaTrBL3YgyQRm0%2BVkMOgEZA7g%3D)

### Design Journey

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/124/094/283e32f809109caf9cc14d68621be76b_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781591351&width=680&sig=uKgVtU4CuGyCj7rI3p%2BuI3e6tkSszuh0jKgiqBi%2FuN8%3D)

Our product addresses a real, specific, and long-standing travel need.

For many people who need to carry insulin or other temperature-sensitive items, travel is not just about packing. It also means repeatedly checking whether items has overheated, left a cooled environment, or can continue to be stored properly at the destination.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/053/912/b39404e4efc03b8910a815adac8b22f0_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781060956&width=680&sig=c9TrEKQ3TWviwBJ8T0g3IUGiFck3c26LokOmk%2FOFK6Y%3D)

so our value is straightforward: it brings cooling, real-time temperature display, adjustable control, and portable organization into one travel-cup form factor, making mobile storage for temperature-sensitive items like insulin more visible and more controllable.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/000/442/80a0965b7c3e53f656a868cc0a469974_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780658334&width=680&sig=00BStNFg0Fh1kEuBPi8LoJduoQEYtZzilI5xclXrJcU%3D)

## Risks and challenges

we believe trust starts with transparency. We're ready to bring this project to life, but we also recognize there may be challenges along the way — and we're prepared for them.

We've partnered with experienced, reliable suppliers, and while delays or supply issues can happen, we've built in buffers and contingency plans to keep things on track.

Shipping and logistics can also pose risks, especially with international orders.

To stay ahead, we've pre-planned our logistics and partnered with fulfillment experts who know how to handle Kickstarter campaigns. If anything changes, we’ll keep you informed every step of the way.

[Learn about accountability on Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/help/hc/sections/115001107133)

## Use of AI

### I plan to use AI-generated content in my project.

#### What parts of your project will use AI generated content? Please be as specific as possible.

Some AI-assisted content may be incorporated into the NEVILO Kickstarter campaign to support the creation of visuals, product mockups, lifestyle imagery, conceptual designs, and marketing copy. This does not imply that NEVILO is an AI-driven product, nor is the campaign seeking capital for AI research or development. All such content functions strictly as a creative and promotional aid to communicate the product’s features effectively to potential backers.

#### Do you have the consent of owners of the works that were (or will be) used to produce the AI generated portion of your projects? Please explain.

Absolutely. All AI-assisted content is derived exclusively from NEVILO’s proprietary product designs, brand assets, campaign concepts, and original reference materials. We do not intentionally incorporate third-party copyrighted artwork, characters, logos, or distinctive artistic styles in any generated content. Every AI-assisted visual is created solely to represent our product and campaign narrative, and all final assets undergo thorough review prior to publication to ensure they faithfully reflect NEVILO’s identity and messaging.

[Learn about AI policy on Kickstarter](https://help.kickstarter.com/hc/articles/16848396410267)

Questions about this project? [Check out the FAQ](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/nevilo/nevilo-smart-cooler-travel-anywhere-with-insulin-freedom//faqs)

[Report this project to Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/login?then=%2Fprojects%2Fnevilo%2Fnevilo-smart-cooler-travel-anywhere-with-insulin-freedom#report-this-project)

we believe trust starts with transparency. We're ready to bring this project to life, but we also recognize there may be challenges along the way — and we're prepared for them.

We've partnered with experienced, reliable suppliers, and while delays or supply issues can happen, we've built in buffers and contingency plans to keep things on track.

Shipping and logistics can also pose risks, especially with international orders. 

To stay ahead, we've pre-planned our logistics and partnered with fulfillment experts who know how to handle Kickstarter campaigns. If anything changes, we’ll keep you informed every step of the way.

I plan to use AI-generated content in my project.

What parts of your project will use AI generated content? Please be as specific as possible.

Some AI-assisted content may be incorporated into the NEVILO Kickstarter campaign to support the creation of visuals, product mockups, lifestyle imagery, conceptual designs, and marketing copy. This does not imply that NEVILO is an AI-driven product, nor is the campaign seeking capital for AI research or development. All such content functions strictly as a creative and promotional aid to communicate the product’s features effectively to potential backers.

Do you have the consent of owners of the works that were (or will be) used to produce the AI generated portion of your projects? Please explain.

Absolutely. All AI-assisted content is derived exclusively from NEVILO’s proprietary product designs, brand assets, campaign concepts, and original reference materials. We do not intentionally incorporate third-party copyrighted artwork, characters, logos, or distinctive artistic styles in any generated content. Every AI-assisted visual is created solely to represent our product and campaign narrative, and all final assets undergo thorough review prior to publication to ensure they faithfully reflect NEVILO’s identity and messaging.

projects.ai_intro_en: The NEVILO Travel Cooler Case is a portable, cup-shaped cooling device designed for temperature-sensitive items like insulin pens. It combines semiconductor active cooling with biogel passive retention to maintain precise temperatures between 2-20°C, featuring a real-time LED display and TSA-approved design for worry-free travel.
ai_highlights_en: Dual cooling system: semiconductor active + biogel passive for 2-20°C precision control
Compact cup-shaped design fits car cup holders and holds up to 7 insulin pens
Built-in 10,000mAh battery delivers 6-7 hours of active cooling without external power
projects.ai_risks_en: Not a medical device. Temperature rebounds to room level in approximately 20 minutes after power loss. Requires ventilation when active—must not be used in closed bags or luggage. Operating environment limited to 0-35°C. Battery-dependent active cooling requires external power source for extended use.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: For many people who need to carry insulin or other temperature-sensitive items, travel is not just about packing. It also means repeatedly checking whether items has overheated, left a cooled environment, or can continue to be stored properly at the destination.
projects.ai_description_en:
For individuals who rely on temperature-sensitive medications like insulin, traveling often means trading adventure for anxiety. Traditional ice packs are an unreliable gamble, frequently failing before the final destination and forcing travelers to cancel trips or stay home out of fear. The NEVILO Smart Cooler Case changes this paradigm, replacing the ticking clock of ice packs with precise, constant temperature stability. Engineered specifically for life on the go, this TSA-approved, power-ready device ensures that traveling becomes about freedom, not fear.

NEVILO leverages a dual-mode cooling system that combines advanced semiconductor technology with Biogel-assisted passive retention. In passive mode—ideal for transit, flights, and commutes—freezing the included Biogel for 10-12 hours and placing it inside the vacuum-insulated cup maintains cool temperatures for 6-8 hours unpowered. Once stationary, the active cooling mode takes over; powered by a built-in 10,000mAh battery, the upgraded semiconductor module delivers precise, quiet cooling for up to 6-7 hours without the bulk or noise of traditional compressors. 

Precision is at the core of NEVILO's design, featuring an adjustable temperature range of 2°C to 20°C maintained within ±1°C accuracy. A real-time LED display provides instant visibility of the internal chamber temperature, completely eliminating the guesswork of traditional cooler bags, while a Celsius/Fahrenheit toggle keeps users informed at a glance. Despite its specialized function, the compact, vertical travel-cup form factor measuring 291 mm tall is deceptively spacious, holding up to 7 insulin pens. Lightweight and effortlessly portable, NEVILO slips seamlessly into any bag, making both daily commutes and international travel completely hassle-free.
projects.nameZh: Nevilo 智能冷藏箱：胰岛素携带者自由出行
projects.ai_intro_zh: Nevilo 智能冷藏箱专为需要携带胰岛素或其他药物的旅行者设计。它通过智能温控系统确保药物在安全温度范围内，让您可以自由出行，无需担心药品保存问题。
projects.ai_description_zh: NEVILO 智能旅行冷藏箱为胰岛素等温度敏感药物提供便携式温控存储。智能温控系统保持推荐温度范围，内置电池供电通过 USB-C 充电。紧凑尺寸可放入背包或随身行李。
ai_highlights_zh: 双冷却系统：半导体主动冷却 + 生物凝胶被动冷却，2-20°C 精确控温
紧凑杯形设计，可放入汽车杯架，最多容纳 7 支胰岛素笔
内置 10,000mAh 电池，无需外接电源即可主动冷却 6-7 小时
projects.ai_risks_zh: 非医疗器械。断电后约 20 分钟温度回升至室温。冷却效率受环境温度影响。
projects.ai_creator_bio_zh: NEVILO 团队致力于让需要携带温度敏感药物的人的医疗旅行更安全更方便。

## Story

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/422/2174ba2a70607fb8be0b256c7560e430_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781000252&width=680&sig=Y7U%2BLgfoJl3SB9orJH8fyPzlofM7R9Su%2BziEKH2%2BsFw%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/070/874/f6d3e834e55b368ed1f4b0fa127a71fb_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781171415&width=680&sig=3BH231300CnQkS%2B1d66%2FW8lA%2FKM8FGjXQ6A7cXdWHio%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/407/fb1fec36146102f23116a250b777401b_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780983478&width=680&sig=begVsK8pAz42r%2FNnB3V8lA22zfbjIDmzeM4fCb7FdXQ%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/041/968/448b60d5d1dafab6f42d1bba225855ee_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780992669&width=680&sig=rDRWtxy%2FJCuR7mS63W%2F1vMV6qhsS3yLcb5RmDusUyiE%3D)

[![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/627/130c512243497a3547eda60c10274a79_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985144&width=680&sig=cJ4KRZ0NDovmQWQ8RNvfARhFnEJUvvjEQ53oi8zhL5g%3D)](https://titaner-4.kickbooster.me/boost/titaner-tiverse-the-modular)

### One System. Yours to Architect.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/658/94f5b658dba4d99bd2ec65a08b5c0edc_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985265&width=680&sig=Z%2FTmm2CoFCCDlOpfC7BfOJ%2FBiLWjV60Ho1TDmgF8pow%3D)

Everything you carefully choose to wear says something about you—your watch, your ring, your belt, your shoes.

Except one thing. The piece of mass-produced metal sitting at your waist. The row of fixed holes forcing your body to adapt to it. For centuries, it has remained virtually unchanged.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/055/172/5d9ebbd9e18a48e382b5be1e2d7b4ee1_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781070712&width=680&sig=9m%2B0ktnewbmSArWCSUZuG6BCgkIO%2BY%2FVFx28W9MAaG8%3D)

So we decided to tackle something nobody had seriously reimagined before. We weren't interested in making a better belt buckle. We set out to create an entirely new waist-carry system.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/999/769/bd93df8f932e2e5286692722b0d2196c_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780655152&width=680&sig=Z22zhlyGQMxt5czR1A9%2Bs6tGmitgZWXmbFuLAGL1ub0%3D)

Built around three independent layers of engineering, each fully customizable, individually replaceable, and endlessly adaptable.

They are:

- Interchangeable Faceplates — designed for different moods, different occasions, and different versions of you. Swap them in seconds and give your everyday carry a fresh identity.

- A Micro-Adjust Belt System — no holes, no compromises. It responds naturally to every movement and every breath for a fit that moves with you.

- The Core Chassis — the foundation of the entire system. Secure, reliable, and engineered to support everything above it.

Each layer stands on its own. Together, they become something greater. You're not simply buying a belt buckle. You're assembling a mechanical companion built around you.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/039/221/fb056fe3c697821dd54607be70851e79_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780973808&width=680&sig=gIGy8LbDqmwRuYlZ56ZhweOq6zq%2F%2FJO1ICWDZ4Sd5qU%3D)

We call it TiVerse. One titanium core. Unlimited possibilities.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/039/461/f802ce1b5d2c823941b65d6c66181c80_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780975489&width=680&sig=hp4KNwBF92w2J7FkQmKN1%2FcWcVMEUSYC1evr0xlwCCo%3D)

### Meet the Faces

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/672/7890a7d10b1f3988a37cdcc4a1a45cf1_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985347&width=680&sig=c8%2FBDq9LyuqkNQM5zVWBEPaHbJ8zplSEYZvZtorBfuA%3D)

Let's be honest. You've been staring at them since the beginning. The faces resting quietly on the chassis.

Each one was created for a different mood, a different occasion, a different side of yourself.

They're not decorations. They're statements.

So—which one are you wearing today?

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/073/667/a838629fce8f68a871491f1401712883_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781186680&width=680&sig=otktk2rcBIzvj4EoNUkctpAFQiHnbAyX2lMuKV%2F8rSM%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/983/901/4447c4c94bcb14e906abc7302fc4f8b4_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780553754&width=680&sig=PEUWE88d4nl5mpTe5dCYRgjt3A%2BxsL%2F8tNH5pDIKRrw%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/983/904/839c403be372937432b890aecf0884e6_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780553756&width=680&sig=oG0lYz6yth2uw8mTwXf1u4n4b%2B5CEeFQdCWaH6%2BKFto%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/983/906/c23e178c039c8d8d249924f2cce3681f_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780553764&width=680&sig=w6lW1FelITMb7iZ3%2Fm2ZuAvGRSncHvOZ4bl9T9WbjOk%3D)

Your waist is the canvas. TiVerse is the brush.

And changing your look couldn't be easier. No tools. No hassle.

Just one hand, and your style transforms instantly.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/025/636/7b036a191e7c62212049b7bc8433449d_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780897203&width=680&sig=wbUnnQUtlM1diEZFSG%2FRMiBAv56F6OgTYLQDHeCjLjc%3D)

Each faceplate is secured by dual N52 neodymium magnets. Their placement is carefully engineered so everyday movement, pressure, or impact won't accidentally release them.

They stay exactly where they belong—until you decide otherwise.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/025/644/f6449601733c4258d5f0a06887c89498_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780897237&width=680&sig=cRgQsBELOPyCt9275V36cXSuGvbve01VxKgTULzC4zI%3D)

We've designed dozens of faceplates. The three launching today weren't chosen by us alone—they were voted in by the Titaner Discord community.

Got another design you'd love to see? Tell us in the comments.

Note:TiVerse does not include faceplates by default. You can choose your preferred designs and quantities through Add-Ons.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/999/884/e87fd8e5c86adcfc3d6da07105bebbb7_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780655675&width=680&sig=cqPtY6ZA%2FzbFU%2FPqnvGjRmh3H%2BnQtDCflboBbMPuTLc%3D)More options are coming soon.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/999/892/15914189e722a17725fbbfb3b6af3dd4_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780655733&width=680&sig=WwEZ2Tp5NB9MqIslMqZxKzi0acnRdXb4q%2Fn6CxsqlBs%3D)

Want to help shape future Titaner products?

Join our Discord community and become part of the process.

[![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/999/889/31211b4580a225841137b32f14876884_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780655704&width=680&sig=lxKSAbc6w6wqahnScQ49a7mretx4B5l2hAsbo33k8Ng%3D)](https://discord.gg/fzNrwfrfXJ)

And there's one more thing. Inside every faceplate is a writable NFC chip.

- Your partner's phone number.

- Your office access card.

- An anniversary date.

- Or anything else that's uniquely yours.

The front is what everyone sees. The NFC chip is what only you know.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/025/648/983334de7be4ec9fd109f4b560d46032_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780897287&width=680&sig=ZF2%2FHv4Wn0wUHQAoAv1A1Olm%2Fv3WCcA7RItJ9AQnimM%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/039/567/1207e71942fa477057be706a70c0e654_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780976433&width=680&sig=cpNGX9I6d6lk0K%2BOVLfVa1g8CWtRM2xtDvQkyLzEeRs%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/999/908/65fa4d316afa8c5dfebb967fe2d1cd49_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780655842&width=680&sig=ZARdEp%2B4JbJ7ogh2ibTfQL5HscT9z7cU9oxAvZPgWj0%3D)

Pretty cool already, right? At Titaner, we're rarely finished there.

We're currently developing a flashlight faceplate for TiVerse. Most of the time, it sits quietly on your belt like any other faceplate. When you need light, remove it, activate it, and it instantly becomes a compact emergency flashlight. Powered by two LR41 button batteries, it delivers approximately 1.5 hours of continuous illumination.

It's currently undergoing final testing and will be available soon as an Add-On.

Stay tuned.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/026/252/1c6f539b2efc41712dbf9d70af8a5816_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780900880&width=680&sig=rHhnQY1SQ0K9nLdsaDHgTKYAqOin91FqvO9gk8it0Mw%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/451/470b65ec903dbe639f652ad4b4f71299_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781000390&width=680&sig=FpVCbOkaC5p31p9gmDDY83jR37zQSgB4%2FdwRTsKRmCU%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/039/560/b2f8de6226b0bd53898e09c7488aca5b_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780976361&width=680&sig=YrsXRVZO3CY2P6mg%2Fd4D%2BE5%2FfeUy258SVYZitT3Dx1Q%3D)

Wondering what they're made from?

G10 composite. The same material trusted for tactical knife handles, firearm grips, and rugged outdoor equipment. Extremely resistant to scratches, impacts, and wear.

And because every sheet develops its own unique texture, no two faceplates are ever exactly alike.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/999/941/5fb0c3c04461377576071ceb6240eada_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780656055&width=680&sig=N4R9pCVp77hXfrKm93Oe%2FmkkYsiaT6ZJri9x8R8hfAY%3D)

Every day, your fingertips leave behind a little more character.

Three months from now, your faceplate won't just look used. It'll look lived with.

[![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/589/68709c7e38efcbc45e824c21e14b2a3d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780984984&width=680&sig=YONS9OUacvPpAJRtV8xiFjjNeCYYVmJHLEHmWZ7tTSs%3D)](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/titaner-cici/titaner-tiverse-the-infinite-modular-titanium-belt-buckle/pledge/new?clicked_reward=false)

### Now It Adjusts to You

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/676/99017489eb859b03b2d49bb8b5f32d28_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985374&width=680&sig=noVZHY4xSsAWWMXmADjq4ZQg5Go7KyAy8n28nkku8pc%3D)

People change. Belt holes don't. The moment they're punched at the factory, they're frozen in place forever. For years, you've been the one making compromises.

One hole is too tight. The next is too loose. And somehow, that's just been accepted as normal.

Worse yet, those holes are slowly destroying the belt you carefully chose.

They stretch. They deform. The edges fray and wear down.

A belt that should last decades often fails at the holes first.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/984/021/38366dd2cf08129f64f978a449c2154b_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780554893&width=680&sig=KKnBrkflOOFTkUOrFGW6krmHMfnYClMJYpqpW7YwKGM%3D)

At Titaner, we don't believe objects are static. Their value comes from the relationship they build with you.

Something that has been with you for ten years—through ordinary days and unforgettable moments—will always mean more than something brand new in a display case.

That's why we build products meant to stay with you for life. And to do that, they must be able to evolve with you. So we did something simple. We got rid of the holes.

TiVerse uses a hole-free micro-adjustment system. Stop anywhere. Adjust anytime.

It follows your body instead of forcing your body to follow it.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/055/208/8fa39ba86743c6819167d7112f4ff4ef_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781070889&width=680&sig=UG%2BXSTpvzv4a8dmpV9qZWXUbDLaCZir7O3b7%2By1iTS0%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/054/246/3176da58f0dd8cc817ecddda7f025b45_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781063421&width=680&sig=IkWPojscQOmZ9a5j47fDdVM7yNmCBag%2B5tOpvcQe7Hc%3D)Showing the side opening structure. The side profile of the product may differ from the final version.

Without holes, the belt can finally focus on doing one thing well:

- Moving with you.

- No replacing it because your waist changed.

- No fighting for the perfect fit.

Just effortless adjustment, day after day.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/025/681/50bb3eb280692da216812dff8ac53972_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780897526&width=680&sig=BwgNi1uVsqGd14Jq%2FEDq3hickd7%2FQr6a4Iv51cMpfJ0%3D)

We re-engineered the entire experience. No holes. No stretching. No gradual loosening. Locked securely at your waist, day after day.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/047/292/3c9a9c3469bcf5c417f10eb5f965fc43_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781020531&width=680&sig=H5SISTA8YMRtqD6ySNML5yoYwyrdW%2FrbNVAsXzYO694%3D)You read that right — TiVerse is designed to stay firmly in place, with no unexpected loosening.

One belt. From day one to year ten. The fit stays the same.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/027/852/eb9cdcb1ca4db801ce918367656d609f_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780908087&width=680&sig=eQGr5fFs6cw2iSg4ZNx9W5CExsxuiHMIQqWVQJ5CK8I%3D)The reward comes standard with a 120 cm version.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/098/9b12e329949657122d3fcdf1261ce840_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780998239&width=680&sig=q0%2FzoanD3ZrdQLwqibHhlEGbrh6c8ycNnB4CZHdbsuo%3D)

For hundreds of years, belts worked like this: You adapted to them. They wore themselves out.

Now the relationship has changed. It adapts to you. And neither of you has to wear out in the process.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/984/043/055520dde56001fbf276eb8e8a54f6c0_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780555068&width=680&sig=rglzoYg5XIbeL8hWz3pVyqSLvIeQxQXAGtaUibmtnO8%3D)

Objects are alive through the stories they share with us.

And from this moment on, that relationship is redefined.

[![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/617/68709c7e38efcbc45e824c21e14b2a3d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985076&width=680&sig=6nh9TFzLleyzxNNx8I3CqtbO%2F7P06pwJjbWIh0jgzNc%3D)](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/titaner-cici/titaner-tiverse-the-infinite-modular-titanium-belt-buckle/pledge/new?clicked_reward=false)

### Nothing Falls. Tested in Hell.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/681/fcfb4859245c88e5a886745e158c711a_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985412&width=680&sig=Lnh5cqVWY1Jfq2ABLlh5FcpOq3WC%2FcaUnhmJLLiv8Lw%3D)

The moment happens fast. You stand up from your chair and suddenly feel your belt loosen.

Everyone knows that feeling. Your face heats up instantly. Your hand shoots toward your waist before you even think about it. For half a second, the entire room seems to freeze.

Even if nobody actually saw it, you're convinced they did. That's not your fault. It's what cheap belt buckles do best—failing exactly when you need them most.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/000/079/a726d551991b976b1c142e89bdd7219d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780656678&width=680&sig=uuYF%2FXQFbu7GX8DQkw4PqXLS5boUvXf7s5N2hnE0iX0%3D)

The TiVerse chassis is the backbone of the entire system. Every faceplate attaches to it. Every security mechanism starts here.

So we designed a locking system that's intentionally harder to trigger by accident.

To release TiVerse, two separate actions must happen at the same time:

- Press the latch inward — in a direction that naturally resists accidental contact.

- Lift the faceplate upward.

One action alone won't release it.

Not gravity. Not pressure. Not an accidental bump.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/025/693/31ec264f76ab0ec63db37d9db181068c_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780897594&width=680&sig=g8IPmKNrCCTr219iIOd4UFvYCAIcn7%2FOWm5sitMH8Is%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/025/698/44c994fb68074ea44c299fbd6b8fb087_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780897638&width=680&sig=5xwTsT0RcYEQdaSHUxSCp%2BwNG2bT3xx8HtX8GHQq1nU%3D)

We're not here to convince you with a spec sheet.

At Titaner, real-world testing has always been the final authority.

For material demonstration purposes only. These tests involve hazardous operations — please don't try this at home.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/039/450/750c579116167497ba83421e8fbf8ebb_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780975405&width=680&sig=RysUDlLJCA7EHsK1ZEvIyVHZW0ihmaPKBVYEwqp%2B2vo%3D)The finished product contains magnets and springs. Please do not heat it at high temperatures.

The mechanical architecture prevents accidental release.

The titanium construction prevents structural failure.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/342/6d5fc3791883a84dbb64964c8363420e_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781005850&width=680&sig=DNWBN3%2B5G74oMJPznzsXpcyU2hv8RSVHNSF1GWwNOks%3D)A safe and reliable connector for your emergency tow rope.

Nothing Falls. Not a slogan. A receipt.

Security isn't just something you know. It's something you feel. The moment TiVerse closes, the hidden mechanism inside the titanium chassis snaps into place with a sharp, satisfying click. That sound isn't just fidget-worthy.

It's reassurance. A quiet but unmistakable confirmation that everything is locked exactly where it should be. From that moment on, you don't have to think about it anymore.

You can trust it.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/000/181/6a25c0a0041c55e358a7fd91f26d72f1_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780657114&width=680&sig=29jBJ%2BKfto9Ox%2BG8Ey7SxoP5V%2F6Wg3aY805wTU8JDOA%3D)

But strength is only half the story. What about customization?

At Titaner, details are where the fun begins. Even the titanium connector tube—the structural core that joins both sides of the chassis—is available in four distinct mechanical designs. Because if you're building a system around yourself, every detail deserves a choice.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/039/413/9e03fad62a71dc19dd08ac8563120d6d_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780975243&width=680&sig=rThepKNzj0PLhGWS2JhM0D3OMksk8vWOlKfgmn5Bu8w%3D)

### Always On You. Always With You.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/710/d835ae826bb8fc4d47e88a31fb46e5f3_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985565&width=680&sig=Cl6H5eH%2FYXXgEDVwDoFEb1GxIHAxSbMbcqOWe1j6W0c%3D)

You wear it longer than you realize.

You may not think about it when you buckle it on in the morning. But from that moment forward, it's there.

- Through meetings.

- Lunch breaks.

- Long walks.

- Handshakes.

- The drive home.

Every movement throughout your day happens with this small piece of titanium quietly resting at your side. TiVerse moves with every breath you take.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/039/573/18d5b18661ee4be70d8ddddb72ec892d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780976494&width=680&sig=QYijXNPzytvYkcLGKwe9ToarzFH8TzR7oil7CVnWRhs%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/055/210/954efcec17d355901f88333fc7aba3d8_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781070903&width=680&sig=f40WibyEJ2royfuvvR5VpX38iwsP49F5bmBEw%2FV8W2I%3D)

TiVerse has seen every version of you.

The busy days. The important days. The ordinary days.

And perhaps that's what makes it different. It may be the only piece of metal you wear that you never have to worry about.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/000/191/7d2aad58c84333b615bd92751fb8d152_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780657141&width=680&sig=zGvMEehiJ4vj6pYpYOQrilyhSnjb%2Bdqe3o0VZn976eE%3D)

Day or night. Home or away. Whenever you need it, it's there.

That's why TiVerse includes a dedicated tritium slot. A self-powered micro light source that can glow continuously for up to 25 years without batteries.

In complete darkness, that faint glow at your waist quietly reminds you:

It's still there.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/566/47d0343100fa3c514e87714bb93e66b3_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780984785&width=680&sig=nE1zP8Qu6jVVWaUvADxjXArn%2FVrJcDdpMgQy5iDAeZ8%3D)You can purchase Sets A, B, and C in the Add-ons section.

[![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/620/68709c7e38efcbc45e824c21e14b2a3d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985097&width=680&sig=u2KtSTXG436PRoglfqEUmk8MAR50f%2BIpmp376rFSRnk%3D)](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/titaner-cici/titaner-tiverse-the-infinite-modular-titanium-belt-buckle/pledge/new?clicked_reward=false)

### Our Craftsmanship & Materials

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/716/1129232edff8b3f8cf17286f1bc8ede8_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985595&width=680&sig=hTQ1TQqjF%2FoeBijfkcaAzO%2FNGmLbSZDHwOrnHbvSwXs%3D)

Titaner has been building titanium products for over 21 years.

And if there's one manufacturing process we know better than anything else, it's precision CNC machining. It's the craft behind every detail of TiVerse.

We approach titanium the same way Michelangelo approached marble. Patiently. Deliberately. Removing everything unnecessary until only the final form remains. Each component spends hours under high-end CNC machines before it ever reaches your hands.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/985/774/9e92769144564102189730fc1693d305_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780565266&width=680&sig=Zoxw4FDECvqLPdbhYt%2B4WX1SPQzmyFSfAkq4wjrf788%3D)

Every edge is fully CNC-chamfered and rounded. To be honest, it's a slow and expensive process that many manufacturers simply skip. But true quality doesn't need to be explained. The moment your thumb glides across the surface, you'll know. The smoothness speaks for itself.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/026/275/b546d6835a1db63f6e7af237afed010f_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780900980&width=680&sig=QfHrOfHIpFc1hCMekyqzl2bES5K5%2B4DO0Iy93BkjoOA%3D)

For this campaign, TiVerse is available in two signature Titaner finishes:

- TITANER Micro-Milled Finish

- TITANER Micro-Blasted Finish

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/026/279/3c6af2cfad9243eda14b757f5323d274_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780900997&width=680&sig=quOsHKebXSTiDlwXld4viliY9xtcUpcHAAMkrVXv0Ew%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/040/720/20bf99a54553f8e1921e9e90832cef1b_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780985622&width=680&sig=LDYx0EgyJXWUcuyBieHU5Iqhx1hkClCNJd1BPWkKVYQ%3D)

We are a group of engineers and friends who love design and are obsessed with precision engineering. Titaner TiVerse is not only our latest masterpiece, but also our new definition of "a good tool". We believe that a good tool is not just the realization of its functions, but also the refinement of details, the enhancement of the feel, and the intangible connection with the user.

Additionally, if you haven’t heard about our “Dreams Come True” program, we highly recommend checking it out. In short: if you have a bold, innovative product idea and the desire to see it come to life, we want to hear from you! We’ll help make it a reality—and reward you generously for it.

Hey, thanks for scrolling all the way down to the bottom! It’s seriously awesome to see you here — we’re cheering for you! 🎉

I just want to take a moment of your precious time to sincerely thank every single friend who supports Titaner.

Some of you have been with us since our very first projects — our most treasured “loyal fans. ”Others are new to our family — welcome aboard! As Titaner grows, it’s easy to forget that behind these cold titanium alloys and precision-engineered products, there’s a team of real, passionate people who obsess over design and craftsmanship.

As the founder, I’m still deeply involved in every step — from the spark of an idea, to sketching the first lines, all the way through packing and shipping.

To all of you who have supported us over the years, shared invaluable feedback, left kind reviews, and helped each other in the community — you make building this like-minded brand a truly joyful and meaningful journey.

To keep creating the things we all love and are proud of — for you, and for ourselves — is the highest honor for our entire team and me.

Thank you all, and keep living your best life and creating your own amazing story today! 👋

## Risks and challenges

1\. Manufacturing Challenges

Bringing a new product to life on Kickstarter always comes with its share of challenges — from potential production delays to quality control issues. We’re fully aware of these risks and have taken proactive measures to minimize them.

Our team has carried out extensive pre-launch testing and partnered with trusted manufacturers renowned for their precision craftsmanship and reliability. We’ve also established a real-time communication system with our production partners, allowing us to respond swiftly to any unexpected issues and ensure a smooth, uninterrupted workflow.

2\. Fulfillment & Shipping

Timely delivery is essential to a great backer experience. We understand that international logistics, customs processes, and shifting demand can all affect timelines. That’s why we’ve developed a robust fulfillment strategy in advance, working closely with reputable logistics providers to ensure efficient and reliable global delivery.

Backers will receive regular updates throughout every stage — from production to final shipment — along with tracking information once their orders are on the way.

Our Commitment

While every Kickstarter project carries a degree of uncertainty, we are fully committed to delivering exactly what we promise. We’ve laid the groundwork, built dependable partnerships, and are prepared to act quickly and transparently should any challenges arise.

Your trust and satisfaction remain at the core of everything we do.

[Learn about accountability on Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/help/hc/sections/115001107133)

## Use of AI

This project does not seek funding for artificial intelligence tools or technologies, and no AI-generated images, videos, or written content are used in the final campaign materials. Any automated or AI-assisted tools, if involved at all, were limited to internal review, formatting checks, or proofreading purposes only, and did not generate, modify, or replace any creative content presented on the project page.

[Learn about AI policy on Kickstarter](https://help.kickstarter.com/hc/articles/16848396410267)

## Environmental commitments

[Visit our Environmental Resources Center](https://www.kickstarter.com/environment) to learn how Kickstarter encourages sustainable practices.

### Long-lasting design

We specialize in designing and manufacturing products crafted from premium titanium alloys using high-precision CNC machining. Known for their exceptional strength and corrosion resistance, our titanium creations are built to endure — delivering uncompromising performance and lasting reliability.

### Sustainable materials

Titanium is exceptionally strong and durable, making it perfect for everyday use. Its natural resistance to rust, corrosion, and bacteria ensures long-lasting performance, even in tough conditions — ideal for outdoor enthusiasts and those working in demanding environments.

### Something else

The Titaner team will handle all reward fulfillment for this campaign. Our well-established titanium EDC supply chain is ready, guaranteeing efficient production. Once funded, the product will be built to Titaner’s rigorous standards and later sold at regular retail pricing on titaner.com. After-sales support will be offered through the same platform.

Questions about this project? [Check out the FAQ](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/titaner-cici/titaner-tiverse-the-infinite-modular-titanium-belt-buckle//faqs)

[Report this project to Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/login?then=%2Fprojects%2Ftitaner-cici%2Ftitaner-tiverse-the-infinite-modular-titanium-belt-buckle#report-this-project)

Founded in 2005, Titaner is a team of outdoor enthusiasts, industrial designers, and craftsmen dedicated to designing and manufacturing...
projects.html_story:
This project successfully funded on July 4, but you can still Late Pledge for available rewards.

A century-quality modular titanium EDC belt buckle — tritium pendant, hole-free, NFC-embedded & LED flashlight faces, fits any scenario

A century-quality modular titanium EDC belt buckle — tritium pendant, hole-free, NFC-embedded & LED flashlight faces, fits any scenario

One System. Yours to Architect.

Now It Adjusts to You

Nothing Falls. Tested in Hell.

Always On You. Always With You.

Our Craftsmanship & Materials

Engineered for a Lifetime.

The Unboxing Experience

Environmental commitments

One System. Yours to Architect.

Everything you carefully choose to wear says something about you—your watch, your ring, your belt, your shoes.

Except one thing. The piece of mass-produced metal sitting at your waist. The row of fixed holes forcing your body to adapt to it. For centuries, it has remained virtually unchanged.

So we decided to tackle something nobody had seriously reimagined before. We weren't interested in making a better belt buckle. We set out to create an entirely new waist-carry system.

Built around three independent layers of engineering, each fully customizable, individually replaceable, and endlessly adaptable.

Interchangeable Faceplates — designed for different moods, different occasions, and different versions of you. Swap them in seconds and give your everyday carry a fresh identity.

A Micro-Adjust Belt System — no holes, no compromises. It responds naturally to every movement and every breath for a fit that moves with you.

The Core Chassis — the foundation of the entire system. Secure, reliable, and engineered to support everything above it.

Each layer stands on its own. Together, they become something greater. You're not simply buying a belt buckle. You're assembling a mechanical companion built around you.

We call it TiVerse. One titanium core. Unlimited possibilities.

Let's be honest. You've been staring at them since the beginning. The faces resting quietly on the chassis.

Each one was created for a different mood, a different occasion, a different side of yourself.

They're not decorations. They're statements.

So—which one are you wearing today?

Your waist is the canvas. TiVerse is the brush.

And changing your look couldn't be easier. No tools. No hassle.

Just one hand, and your style transforms instantly.

Each faceplate is secured by dual N52 neodymium magnets. Their placement is carefully engineered so everyday movement, pressure, or impact won't accidentally release them.

They stay exactly where they belong—until you decide otherwise.

We've designed dozens of faceplates. The three launching today weren't chosen by us alone—they were voted in by the Titaner Discord community.

Got another design you'd love to see? Tell us in the comments.

Note:TiVerse does not include faceplates by default. You can choose your preferred designs and quantities through Add-Ons.

Want to help shape future Titaner products?

Join our Discord community and become part of the process.

And there's one more thing. Inside every faceplate isa writable NFC chip.

Your partner's phone number.

Your office access card.

An anniversary date.

Or anything else that's uniquely yours.

The front is what everyone sees.The NFC chip is what only you know.

Pretty cool already, right? At Titaner, we're rarely finished there.

We're currently developinga flashlight faceplatefor TiVerse. Most of the time, it sits quietly on your belt like any other faceplate. When you need light, remove it, activate it, and it instantly becomes a compact emergency flashlight. Powered by two LR41 button batteries, it delivers approximately1.5 hours of continuous illumination.

It's currently undergoing final testing and will be available soon as an Add-On.

Wondering what they're made from?

G10 composite. The same material trusted for tactical knife handles, firearm grips, and rugged outdoor equipment. Extremely resistant to scratches, impacts, and wear.

And because every sheet develops its own unique texture, no two faceplates are ever exactly alike.

Every day, your fingertips leave behind a little more character.

Three months from now, your faceplate won't just look used. It'll look lived with.

Now It Adjusts to You

People change. Belt holes don't. The moment they're punched at the factory, they're frozen in place forever.For years, you've been the one making compromises.

One hole is too tight. The next is too loose. And somehow, that's just been accepted as normal.

Worse yet, those holes are slowly destroying the belt you carefully chose.

They stretch. They deform. The edges fray and wear down.

A belt that should last decades often fails at the holes first.

At Titaner, we don't believe objects are static.Their value comes from the relationship they build with you.

Something that has been with you for ten years—through ordinary days and unforgettable moments—will always mean more than something brand new in a display case.

That's why we build products meant to stay with you for life.And to do that, they must be able to evolve with you.So we did something simple. We got rid of the holes.

TiVerse uses a hole-free micro-adjustment system. Stop anywhere. Adjust anytime.

It follows your body instead of forcing your body to follow it.

Without holes, the belt can finally focus on doing one thing well:

Moving with you.

No replacing it because your waist changed.

No fighting for the perfect fit.

Just effortless adjustment, day after day.

We re-engineered the entire experience.No holes. No stretching. No gradual loosening. Locked securely at your waist, day after day.

One belt. From day one to year ten. The fit stays the same.

For hundreds of years, belts worked like this: You adapted to them. They wore themselves out.

Now the relationship has changed. It adapts to you.And neither of you has to wear out in the process.

Objects are alive through the stories they share with us.

And from this moment on, that relationship is redefined.

Nothing Falls. Tested in Hell.

The moment happens fast. You stand up from your chair andsuddenly feel your belt loosen.

Everyone knows that feeling. Your face heats up instantly. Your hand shoots toward your waist before you even think about it. For half a second, the entire room seems to freeze.

Even if nobody actually saw it, you're convinced they did. That's not your fault.It's what cheap belt buckles do best—failing exactly when you need them most.

The TiVerse chassis is the backbone of the entire system. Every faceplate attaches to it. Every security mechanism starts here.

So we designed a locking system that'sintentionally harder to trigger by accident.

To release TiVerse,two separate actions must happen at the same time:

Press the latch inward — in a direction that naturally resists accidental contact.

Lift the faceplate upward.

One action alone won't release it.

Not gravity. Not pressure. Not an accidental bump.

We're not here to convince you with a spec sheet.

At Titaner, real-world testing has always been the final authority.

⚠️NoteFor material demonstration purposes only. These tests involve hazardous operations — please don't try this at home.

The mechanical architecture prevents accidental release.

The titanium construction prevents structural failure.

Nothing Falls. Not a slogan. A receipt.

Security isn't just something you know. It's something you feel. The moment TiVerse closes, the hidden mechanism inside the titanium chassis snaps into place with a sharp, satisfying click. That sound isn't just fidget-worthy.

It's reassurance. A quiet but unmistakable confirmation that everything is locked exactly where it should be. From that moment on, you don't have to think about it anymore.

You can trust it.

But strength is only half the story. What about customization?

At Titaner, details are where the fun begins. Even the titanium connector tube—the structural core that joins both sides of the chassis—is available in four distinct mechanical designs. Because if you're building a system around yourself, every detail deserves a choice.

Always On You. Always With You.

You wear it longer than you realize.

You may not think about it when you buckle it on in the morning. But from that moment forward, it's there.

Through meetings.

The drive home.

Every movement throughout your day happens with this small piece of titanium quietly resting at your side.TiVerse moves with every breath you take.

TiVerse has seen every version of you.

The busy days. The important days. The ordinary days.

And perhaps that's what makes it different.It may be the only piece of metal you wear that you never have to worry about.

Day or night. Home or away. Whenever you need it, it's there.

That's why TiVerse includes a dedicated tritium slot. A self-powered micro light source that can glow continuously for up to 25 years without batteries.

In complete darkness, that faint glow at your waist quietly reminds you:

It's still there.

Our Craftsmanship & Materials

Titaner has been building titanium products forover 21 years.

And if there's one manufacturing process we know better than anything else, it'sprecision CNC machining. It's the craft behind every detail of TiVerse.

We approach titanium the same way Michelangelo approached marble. Patiently. Deliberately. Removing everything unnecessary until only the final form remains. Each component spends hours under high-end CNC machines before it ever reaches your hands.

Every edge is fully CNC-chamfered and rounded. To be honest, it's a slow and expensive process that many manufacturers simply skip. But true quality doesn't need to be explained. The moment your thumb glides across the surface, you'll know. The smoothness speaks for itself.

For this campaign, TiVerse is available in two signature Titaner finishes:

TITANER Micro-Milled Finish

TITANER Micro-Blasted Finish

Engineered for a Lifetime.

To us, “engineered for a lifetime” is more than a phrase engraved into metal.It’s a philosophy of growing, evolving, and building together with the people who actually use our products.And this Kickstarter campaign is part of that process.

Our designers don’t work behind closed doors.They build alongside you — our most trusted collaborators and long-time supporters— listening carefully to every idea, suggestion, and real-world experience. Because great products are never created in isolation.

They’re shaped by the people who rely on them every single day.

So speak up. Share your ideas.Tell us what you want to see next.

Together, let’s turn TiVerse into something truly timeless.

The Unboxing Experience

The unboxing experience should feel special too.

Your Titaner TiVerse arrives in a premium presentation box designed to feel worthy from the very first moment you open it.

Whether it’s a reward for yourself after a long year — or a gift for someone who shares your love for thoughtful gear — this is the kind of box that makes people say:

What Do Our Backers Say?

We’re not new to Kickstarter. Over the past five years, we’ve successfully delivered our creations to more than47,789+backers around the world.

We’ve faced every challenge imaginable — yes, including those “legendary” supply chain disasters — while maintaining a 100% fulfillment record.

In crowdfunding, we know that delivering on promises matters far more than fancy marketing language ever will. But don’t just take our word for it — hear directly from the longtime backers who are already part of the Titaner family.

What Sizes Are Available?

So... How Much Does It Cost?

For detailed information, please refer to the FAQ.

When supporting this project on Kickstarter, you won't be billed for shipping immediately. Instead, the shipping fee will be charged via a fulfillment survey after the campaign ends.Worldwide delivery available.

Please Note: The listed price is for the product only and does not include shipping or Sales tax / VAT. After the campaign ends, shipping costs will be calculated based on your region. Customs/import taxes vary by country and are the supporter's responsibility to check and pay.

We are a group of engineers and friends who love design and are obsessed with precision engineering.Titaner TiVerseis not only our latest masterpiece, but also our new definition of "a good tool". We believe that a good tool is not just the realization of its functions, but also the refinement of details, the enhancement of the feel, and the intangible connection with the user.

Additionally, if you haven’t heard about our“Dreams Come True” program, we highly recommend checking it out. In short: if you have a bold, innovative product idea and the desire to see it come to life, we want to hear from you! We’ll help make it a reality—and reward you generously for it.

Hey, thanks for scrolling all the way down to the bottom! It’s seriously awesome to see you here — we’re cheering for you! 🎉

I just want to take a moment of your precious time to sincerely thank every single friend who supports Titaner.

Some of you have been with us since our very first projects — our most treasured “loyal fans. ”Others are new to our family — welcome aboard! As Titaner grows, it’s easy to forget that behind these cold titanium alloys and precision-engineered products, there’s a team of real, passionate people who obsess over design and craftsmanship.

As the founder, I’m still deeply involved in every step — from the spark of an idea, to sketching the first lines, all the way through packing and shipping.To all of you who have supported us over the years, shared invaluable feedback, left kind reviews, and helped each other in the community — you make building this like-minded brand a truly joyful and meaningful journey.

To keep creating the things we all love and are proud of — for you, and for ourselves — is the highest honor for our entire team and me.

Thank you all, and keep living your best life and creating your own amazing story today! 👋

Contact The Titaner

If you have any questions, please contact the correct email department below for faster support.Our team usually replies within1–3 business days.

Risks and challenges

1. Manufacturing Challenges
Bringing a new product to life on Kickstarter always comes with its share of challenges — from potential production delays to quality control issues. We’re fully aware of these risks and have taken proactive measures to minimize them.
Our team has carried out extensive pre-launch testing and partnered with trusted manufacturers renowned for their precision craftsmanship and reliability. We’ve also established a real-time communication system with our production partners, allowing us to respond swiftly to any unexpected issues and ensure a smooth, uninterrupted workflow.

2. Fulfillment & Shipping
Timely delivery is essential to a great backer experience. We understand that international logistics, customs processes, and shifting demand can all affect timelines. That’s why we’ve developed a robust fulfillment strategy in advance, working closely with reputable logistics providers to ensure efficient and reliable global delivery.
Backers will receive regular updates throughout every stage — from production to final shipment — along with tracking information once their orders are on the way.

Our Commitment
While every Kickstarter project carries a degree of uncertainty, we are fully committed to delivering exactly what we promise. We’ve laid the groundwork, built dependable partnerships, and are prepared to act quickly and transparently should any challenges arise.
Your trust and satisfaction remain at the core of everything we do.

This project does not seek funding for artificial intelligence tools or technologies, and no AI-generated images, videos, or written content are used in the final campaign materials. Any automated or AI-assisted tools, if involved at all, were limited to internal review, formatting checks, or proofreading purposes only, and did not generate, modify, or replace any creative content presented on the project page.

Environmental commitments

Long-lasting design

We specialize in designing and manufacturing products crafted from premium titanium alloys using high-precision CNC machining. Known for their exceptional strength and corrosion resistance, our titanium creations are built to endure — delivering uncompromising performance and lasting reliability.

Sustainable materials

Titanium is exceptionally strong and durable, making it perfect for everyday use. Its natural resistance to rust, corrosion, and bacteria ensures long-lasting performance, even in tough conditions — ideal for outdoor enthusiasts and those working in demanding environments.

The Titaner team will handle all reward fulfillment for this campaign. Our well-established titanium EDC supply chain is ready, guaranteeing efficient production. Once funded, the product will be built to Titaner’s rigorous standards and later sold at regular retail pricing on titaner.com. After-sales support will be offered through the same platform.

projects.ai_intro_en: TiVerse is a modular titanium EDC belt buckle system designed to replace traditional, hole-punched belts. It features a hole-free micro-adjustment system, interchangeable magnetic faceplates, and embedded NFC chips for personal data. Built with a titanium core and G10 composite faceplates, it offers a customizable, lifetime-lasting waist-carry solution.
ai_highlights_en: Hole-free micro-adjustment system that adapts to your body without stretching or deforming the belt.
Interchangeable magnetic faceplates with embedded NFC chips for personalization and style.
Constructed from titanium and G10 composite for extreme durability and a lifetime of use.
ai_specs_en: Writable NFC chip embedded in faceplates
Magnetic, swapable in seconds without tools
projects.ai_risks_en: The flashlight faceplate is still undergoing final testing and is not yet available. Faceplates are sold separately as add-ons and are not included by default, which may increase the total cost. As a new modular system, long-term durability and replacement part availability depend on the company's continued support.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Titaner is a community-driven company specializing in high-end, modular EDC gear designed to adapt and last a lifetime.
projects.ai_description_en:
The Titaner TiVerse is the world's first truly modular EDC belt buckle — a reimagined waist-carry system where three independent, fully customizable layers work together. At its heart is the Core Chassis, a precision-engineered titanium foundation that serves as an unshakeable base. Clamped onto that chassis is a Micro-Adjust Belt System with no holes and no compromises, responding naturally to every movement and breath so the fit genuinely moves with you. Resting on top are the Interchangeable Faceplates — sealed in place by dual N52 neodymium magnets so they stay secure during any challenge, yet can be swapped in seconds with just a single hand.

Each faceplate is built from century-quality materials and houses a writable NFC chip, giving a piece you wear daily a piece of personal history — whether that's a partner's phone number, office access, or an anniversary date. The faces aren't decorations; they're statements. The Discord community voted in the three launch designs, but the platform was built to expand, offering a system that can be shaped by the people who use it.

Engineered for a lifetime and tested for real-world use, this isn't a belt buckle — it's a mechanical companion you assemble around yourself. One titanium core. Unlimited possibilities.
projects.nameZh: Titaner Tiverse：无限模块化钛合金腰带扣
projects.ai_intro_zh: Titaner Tiverse 是一款无限模块化钛合金腰带扣系统，将腰带扣转变为多功能工具平台。它采用优质钛合金材质，可灵活配置各种功能模块。
projects.ai_description_zh:
Titaner TiVerse 是一款无限模块化钛合金腰带扣，为你提供无尽的个性化可能。核心腰带扣由钛合金制成，可搭配各种可互换的面板，让你根据自己的风格或心情定制外观。

模块化系统包括多种面板选项——从极简金属表面到复杂图案——全部通过磁吸或卡扣机制安全固定。钛合金底座耐腐蚀且轻巧，适合日常佩戴。

TiVerse 兼容标准腰带宽度，可轻松替换现有腰带扣。这是 EDC 爱好者和任何欣赏模块化设计的人的终极自我表达工具。
ai_highlights_zh: 无孔微调系统，无需拉伸或变形即可适应身体
可互换磁吸面板内嵌 NFC 芯片，个性化和风格随心变换
钛合金与 G10 复合材料制成，极端耐用
ai_specs_zh: 面板内置可写入 NFC 芯片
两颗 LR41 纽扣电池
项目内容未提供定价信息
projects.ai_risks_zh: 手电筒面板仍在最终测试中，尚未可用。面板通过磁吸方式固定，在剧烈活动时可能会有松动的风险。众筹项目存在生产方面的固有风险。
projects.ai_creator_bio_zh: Titaner 是一家以社区为驱动的公司，专注于高端模块化 EDC 装备，旨在适应和陪伴你的日常携带。

projects.ai_intro_en: The Jaye Band is a wearable device designed to help you reclaim your attention and stay focused. It comes with a charging dock and a companion app to provide insights and settings. Back the project to lock in early bird pricing and hit the ground running with your new routine.
ai_highlights_en: Designed to help you reclaim your attention and stay focused.
Includes a charging dock and companion app for insights and settings.
Super Early Bird pricing available at $129, saving you $120.
ai_specs_en: Jaye Band, Charging Dock, Jaye Companion App
projects.ai_risks_en: The project faces typical hardware challenges, including manufacturing delays, hardware iteration cycles, and software updates during testing. The creators acknowledge these risks and are committed to sharing updates openly and frequently throughout the process.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Jaye is a wearable technology company focused on helping people reclaim their attention. We design simple, intentional tools that cut through digital noise and help people follow through on what matters most.
projects.ai_description_en:
The Jaye Band is a minimalist smartwatch designed with a singular purpose: helping you reclaim your attention in an increasingly distracted world. Unlike conventional smartwatches that bombard you with notifications and apps, the Jaye Band takes a radically different approach. It's built to be discreet and unobtrusive, serving as a tool that keeps you focused rather than pulling you away from the present moment. This is wearable technology designed not to add to your digital noise, but to help you tune it out.

At the heart of the Jaye Band experience is the Jaye Companion App, which acts as your personal attention hub. Through the app, you can access insights about your focus patterns, adjust settings, and tailor the device to your specific needs. The package includes the Jaye Band itself, a convenient charging dock for easy power-ups, and full access to the companion app ecosystem. Together, these components form a cohesive system designed to support healthier relationships with technology and time.

The Jaye Band matters because it addresses a growing problem: the erosion of our attention spans by devices that demand constant engagement. By choosing minimalism over feature bloat, the Jaye Band represents a philosophical shift in wearable tech — one that prioritizes human wellbeing over screen time. Available through Kickstarter with Super Early Bird pricing starting at $129 (a $120 savings), the Jaye Band is estimated to ship in December 2026 for US backers and February 2027 for international supporters. The team acknowledges the inherent challenges of hardware development, including potential manufacturing delays and iteration cycles, and commits to transparent, frequent communication throughout the process.
