### 👥 \| Team

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/011/055/be9ef7d57e7e7c52623f89db7bda8da2_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780746424&width=680&sig=KHnYADDaHJvrL7sq8oFQd1%2B%2FQPNc%2BQIuwgCfgtO%2BKI8%3D)

Memoir was founded by Ashwin Radhakrishna and Mohan Kashivasi, who together bring more than four decades of experience building embedded systems, connected devices, and consumer technology products. Backed by a multidisciplinary team spanning hardware engineering, firmware, software, mechanical design, manufacturing, and product experience, Memoir is being developed end-to-end by the people building it.

The team brings expertise from leading technology companies including Qualcomm, Broadcom, Freescale, and STMicroelectronics, and has collectively contributed to the development and shipment of millions of connected devices used around the world. This experience helps ensure that Memoir is not only thoughtfully designed, but also engineered, tested, and prepared for reliable production at scale.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/271/353/69d200138757f4e59edd175d44235f22_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1782739160&width=680&sig=zwpJ%2Fd%2FFY5rhsDqKB8OYzfOmDznLa5QRYTlxosIvEvc%3D)

Over the past year, we've transformed Memoir from an idea into a fully functional product through multiple prototype iterations, extensive testing, and continuous refinement across hardware, software, and user experience.

Memoir represents thousands of engineering hours, countless design iterations, and a relentless focus on creating a display experience that feels more natural, beautiful, and thoughtfully integrated into everyday living. Today, we're excited to bring Memoir to life with the support of the Kickstarter community.

#### Behind the scenes of how Memoir was built

Frame-Integrated PCB Testing

All three MEMOIR frame sizes undergoing live bench testing with the custom PCB mounted directly within each unit, validating power stability, display performance, and hardware integration ahead of manufacturing production.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/058/385/edf14ffd2db4c25141e3e9e09fafb205_original.webp?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781090645&width=680&sig=0tlnu5OQx8To4jJIy1MnRYR5q5xYNCui%2F5SPJrvFAI8%3D)

Injection Moulding Preparation

Our mechanical frame design is undergoing iterative 3D print validation to finalize geometry, internal mounting points, and manufacturability ahead of injection mould production.

### Marketing Partner

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/070/680/21f16e499a3f137d1b835f5b273804f2_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781170446&width=680&sig=0M6HMQg%2Bx%2BpjEj4n8PRdk7n5n0b7p17yXxQQnPvV0Ig%3D)

This campaign is designed and managed by DEZZIO Crowdfunding, a full-service crowdfunding marketing agency helping creators launch, fund, and scale innovative products.

From market validation and lead generation to email marketing, advertising, PR, influencer outreach, creative production, and campaign management, DEZZIO provides end-to-end crowdfunding solutions designed to maximize campaign performance and build lasting brands.

#### Shipping

We plan to ship Memoir worldwide. Approximate shipping costs for major regions are listed below for reference. Final shipping charges will be collected after the Kickstarter campaign ends through our pledge manager, allowing us to provide the most accurate shipping rates based on your destination and current carrier costs.

Please note that the estimated shipping amounts shown below are subject to change and may vary at the time of fulfillment.

Backers are responsible for any applicable import duties, VAT, GST, customs fees, or other local taxes required by their country or region upon delivery. These charges are not included in your Kickstarter pledge or the estimated shipping costs and may be collected by your local customs authority or delivery carrier.

We will keep all backers informed throughout the fulfillment process and provide final shipping details before collecting shipping payments.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/094/380/ffeb72639b5045c48c39bddd7b47fdbf_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781346235&width=680&sig=lPt9X1fh9GQHdGnkOOiAoODJ9MEja37wHj22LjRZgQY%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/084/200/c722cd704410a3b6a283579d0e5e9f43_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781261401&width=680&sig=%2BEQ0IzK1nolQuepc4SE%2FOVaG4EgqpbSL3jS0Pbg1CiY%3D)

This project collocates surveys by PledgeBox, the Pledge Management system helped thousands of creators to be more successful with more sales and satisfied millions of backers.

## Risks and challenges

We're incredibly excited to bring Memoir to Kickstarter, and we're confident in our ability to deliver.

Unlike many crowdfunding projects, Memoir is not just a concept or early-stage prototype. The core hardware, firmware, software, cloud infrastructure, and mobile application have already been developed and validated through multiple prototype iterations. Our focus is now on scaling production and delivering a polished product to our backers.

That said, manufacturing hardware always comes with some level of risk.

The most likely challenge we may encounter is related to component procurement, supplier lead times, or quality control during production. Memoir relies on premium display modules and carefully selected electronic components, and while we've established relationships with experienced manufacturing partners and suppliers, occasional delays can occur due to component availability, production scheduling, or quality assurance requirements.

If any issue arises, our priority will always be quality over speed. Rather than shipping a product that doesn't meet our standards, we'll take the necessary time to resolve the issue and ensure every Memoir frame delivers the experience we've promised.

The good news is that the most challenging part of the journey-product development-is already behind us. With a working product, validated prototypes, established suppliers, and an experienced engineering team, we believe the remaining risks are manageable and primarily related to manufacturing timelines rather than product feasibility.

Our commitment is simple: transparent communication, regular updates, and a relentless focus on quality.

No shortcuts. No surprises. Just Memoir, made right.

Health and Wellness Product Disclaimer: This project and its rewards are not a replacement for medication, medical treatment, or a doctor's examination. Kickstarter does not endorse or verify the veracity of any claims made on project pages, and is not responsible for any opinion, advice, information, or statements made by third parties, including creators. Projects on Kickstarter do not claim to diagnose, treat, or cure any medical condition. The Creator is solely responsible for complying with industry standards and applicable laws, including product safety standards.

[Learn about accountability on Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/help/hc/sections/115001107133)

## Use of AI

Thoughtfully Integrated AI

Memoir is first and foremost a beautiful way to display and relive your favorite memories. To make that experience even more creative and personalized, the Memoir companion app includes optional AI-powered editing tools.

These features help you transform, enhance, and reimagine your photos before sending them to your Memoir display. Depending on your needs, AI can help:

Replace or enhance backgrounds

Create artistic styles such as sketch, watercolor, oil painting, or cartoon-inspired artwork

Restore and colorize old photographs

Remove unwanted objects or distractions

Generate professional-looking portraits and headshots

Combine and enhance multiple images

Improve lighting, clarity, and overall image quality

Every image is automatically optimized for Memoir's color E-Ink display, ensuring visuals look crisp, vibrant, and natural on the frame.

We use trusted third-party AI technologies to power these capabilities and do not train our own AI models using customer content. Your photos remain yours, and our goal is simply to provide creative tools that help bring your memories to life in new and meaningful ways.

While AI can help create stunning visuals, it remains entirely optional. Memoir delivers a beautiful experience whether you use AI-enhanced images or simply display the photos and moments you already love.

[Learn about AI policy on Kickstarter](https://help.kickstarter.com/hc/articles/16848396410267)

Questions about this project? [Check out the FAQ](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/698611014/memoir-a-paper-like-e-ink-digital-frame//faqs)

[Report this project to Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/login?then=%2Fprojects%2F698611014%2Fmemoir-a-paper-like-e-ink-digital-frame#report-this-project)

ZyvoraLabs is building thoughtful, distraction-free technology for modern homes designed to promote focus, creativity, learning, and mindful...

projects.ai_intro_en: Memoir is a paper-like E-Ink digital frame for displaying photos, artwork, and memories. It's wireless, portable, features a long-lasting battery, and works with iOS and Android. Available in 3 sizes with instant updates from your phone and AI features.
ai_highlights_en: Paper-like E-Ink display with TrueTone™ technology for a natural, glare-free viewing experience
Wireless, lightweight, and portable with long-lasting battery and instant phone updates
Available in 3 sizes with AI features, designed as a thoughtful gift for modern homes
projects.ai_risks_en: Primary risks involve component procurement, supplier lead times, and quality control during manufacturing. The team has working prototypes, validated hardware/software, and established supplier relationships. They prioritize quality over speed and will delay shipment rather than compromise standards.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Founded by Ashwin Radhakrishna and Mohan Kashivasi with 40+ years combined experience in embedded systems and connected devices, backed by engineers from Qualcomm, Broadcom, Freescale, and STMicroelectronics.
projects.ai_description_en:
Memoir is a paper-like E-Ink digital frame that displays photos, artwork, and curated moments with a calm, natural aesthetic designed for modern living. Available in three sizes — Small (7.3"), Medium (13.3"), and Large — each frame features the Memoir TrueTone™ Display, a screen engineered to mimic the look and feel of printed paper. Unlike traditional digital displays, Memoir runs wirelessly with no visible cables and is powered by a long-lasting battery, making it truly portable. Whether mounted on a wall, placed on a bedside table, or attached to a fridge with the included magnet, the frame is designed to move seamlessly throughout your home and life.

Each Memoir frame is easy to update instantly from your smartphone via a dedicated mobile app compatible with both iOS and Android. The product also incorporates AI features that enhance the user experience, though specific capabilities are not detailed in the provided content. The frames are lightweight and built to feel like wall art while remaining subtle enough to blend into any space. With its combination of portability, elegant design, and effortless connectivity, Memoir aims to make displaying cherished memories as natural as hanging a physical photograph.

Memoir is backed by an experienced team with over four decades of combined expertise in embedded systems, connected devices, and consumer technology, with backgrounds spanning Qualcomm, Broadcom, Freescale, and STMicroelectronics. The product has already been developed and validated through multiple prototype iterations, with hardware, firmware, software, cloud infrastructure, and the mobile application all complete. The remaining focus is on scaling production, with the team prioritizing quality over speed and maintaining transparent communication with backers throughout the process.

projects.name: DISCORE: 9-in-1 DVD Drive Hub for Creators, Ports & Storage
projects.blurb: DISCORE | 9-in-1 Optical Drive Hub with SD/TF Card Reader, USB Expansion, CD/DVD Burning & Plug-and-Play Connectivity
projects.html_story:
DISCORE | 9-in-1 Optical Drive Hub with SD/TF Card Reader, USB Expansion, CD/DVD Burning & Plug-and-Play Connectivity

DISCORE | 9-in-1 Optical Drive Hub with SD/TF Card Reader, USB Expansion, CD/DVD Burning & Plug-and-Play Connectivity

9-in-1 Expansion Ports

Driver-Free Plug and Play

Dual Card Slots with High-Speed Read & Write

One Docking Station, a Desk Freed from Cables

Keep a Physical Warmth tor Your Data

Preserve Your Data in a Physical Form

Spend More Time Creating

Aluminum - light & strong

Smooth Access at Your Fingertips

Stable Reading, Built for Everyday Use

Why Choose Discore

Factory Showcase

Environmental commitments

Modern laptops are becoming thinner and more portable, but many familiar ports are quietly disappearing —USB-A,SD card slots,optical drives, and more. Devices may look cleaner than ever, yet everyday connectivity often depends on a growing collection of adapters and cables, making workflows feel fragmented and less intuitive.

That led us to ask a simple question:What if these essential functions could come together again in one streamlined device?

DISCORE combines aUSB hub,SD/TF card reader, andexternal optical driveinto asingle compact workstation. One device handles multiple expansion needs, helping reduce cable clutter and minimizing the need for extra accessories in your bag or on your desk.

More than just additional ports, DISCORE is designed to create a cleaner, more focused workspace experience — helping your setup feel simpler, your workflow smoother, and your creative moments less interrupted by small distractions.

9-in-1 Expansion Ports

DISCORE features a minimalist white aluminum-alloy design with a slim and lightweight form factor. It includes4 USB-A ports,1 USB-C port, a built-inCD/DVDoptical drive, and dualSD / TF card slotswith support for high-speed10Gbpsdata transfer.

IntegratedUSB-CandUSB-Aconnection cables allow convenient compatibility with both modern and traditional deviceswithout requiring additional adapters.

Driver-Free Plug and Play

Connect DISCORE, insert a disc, drag in your files, and start burning. Withplug-and-playsetup, creating CDs or DVDs is quick, simple, and hassle-free.

Let the device handle the complexity, so your workflow stays simple.

Featuring bothUSB-CandUSB-Aconnectivity, DISCORE works with both modern USB-C devices and traditional USB-A computers without requiring extra adapters.

Dual Card Slots with High-Speed Read & Write

Insert your camera'sSDcard or your drone'smicroSDcard directly into DISCORE for quick and convenient file transfers. Fewer accessories, fewer cables, and a smoother workflow.Powered byUSB 3.2 Gen 2with up to10Gbpsbandwidth for fast, reliable performance.

One Docking Station, a Desk Freed from Cables

No more juggling multiple cables and adapters for different devices. DISCORE brings commonly used ports together inone streamlined hub, helping reduce desk clutter and simplify everyday connectivity.The result is a cleaner workspace and a smoother workflow, with faster access, easier transfers, and less interruption between tasks.

Keep a Physical Warmth tor Your Data

Compared with a typical hub, DISCORE carries a sense of familiarity from the optical media era. It connects more than ports and storage —it reconnects moments, memories, and archived content from the past.

Old discs that have been sitting unused for years can be accessed again, bringing photos, videos, documents, and personal archives back into view.

DISCORE is more than an external optical drive.It serves as a bridge between past and present, helping stored memories become accessible once again.

Preserve Your Data in a Physical Form

As cloud storage becomes part of everyday life, more and more data exists only in digital spaces we cannot physically see. At the same time, many people are paying closer attention to long-term storage andindependent backupsfor important files.

DISCORE supportsCD and DVD burning, making it easy to archive contracts, family videos, graduation projects, and other valuable content. Once recorded, your files can be stored asa physical backupthat remains independently accessible.

Some memories and important files simply feel more meaningful when preserved

Spend More Time Creating

For photographers, designers, and video creators, interruptions can easily break creative flow. In many cases, it’s not the creative work itself that slows things down, but the constant switching between devices, adapters, and card readers.

DISCOREcombines direct SD / TF access, multiple USB expansion ports, and optical disc archiving in one device, helping streamline file transfers, backups, and everyday workflows.Less time managing accessories,more time focused on creating. Clean workspace, quieter workflow.

Aluminum - light & strong

Crafted with a silver-white aluminum-alloy enclosure, DISCORE is lightweight, durable, and resistant to everyday scratches while offering efficient heat dissipation.

Even during disc burning or high-speed dual-card transfers, the device maintains stable and smooth performance.

Smooth Access at Your Fingertips

After connecting DISCORE to your computer, you can open the drive tray either by pressing the physical button on the device or directly through your system interface.

With a press of the hardware button, the tray slides out smoothly and cleanly, while also making routine cleaning more convenient. Insert the disc, slide the tray back in, and enjoy a simple, satisfying mechanical interaction with every use.

Stable Reading, Built for Everyday Use

The built-in optical drive features a vibration-reducing and dust-resistant internal structure to help minimize operating noise and reduce dust intrusion. Rubber support feet on the bottom provide added stability during data transfers and disc burning sessions.

Why Choose Discore

Compatible with major operating systems includingWindows,macOS,Linux, andChrome OS.

Also supports iPadOS and Android devices withOTGfunctionality, allowing connection with iPad Pro, Android tablets, and smartphones for accessing disc content, transferring photos, and managing files.

Back on Desktop

Factory Showcase

Risks and challenges

As with any hardware product, there are potential risks including supply chain delays, component availability, and compatibility issues across different devices. We are working with reliable suppliers, conducting ongoing testing, and building buffer time into our schedule to minimize these risks. Our team is committed to communicating openly if any challenges arise.

Environmental commitments

Long-lasting design

We maximize the life of our product by using durable materials, designing for easy maintenance, and ensuring key parts are replaceable. The removable grill plate, charcoal tray, and silicone feet can be cleaned or replaced without throwing away the whole unit. We also run extended durability tests on heat resistance, structural stability, and electrical components. Our goal is to build a product that lasts through years of outdoor use, not just a few seasons.

Reusability and recyclability

We are committed to reducing waste by using recyclable and minimal packaging. All cardboard and paper inserts are made from recycled materials and can be recycled again. We avoid plastic foam and single-use plastics wherever possible. For the product itself, we design key components to be replaceable and repairable, so users don't have to throw away the whole unit when one part wears out. At the end of its life, the metal parts, silicone, and electronics can be separated and recycled through local e-waste or metal recycling programs.

Sustainable materials

We focus on using low-impact materials for our VDC and docking station. The outer casing is made from recycled and recyclable aluminum, which is durable and widely accepted in recycling programs. We avoid adding unnecessary coatings or mixed materials that complicate recycling. The internal circuit boards are manufactured following industry standards to reduce waste. For packaging, we use recycled cardboard and paper-based inserts, with no plastic foam or single-use plastics. Our goal is to keep material impact low while maintaining product quality and reliability.

Environmentally friendly factories

When choosing a factory, we focus on manufacturing experience, quality control, material sourcing, production capacity, and communication. We look for partners with a proven track record in electronics production, strong quality assurance processes, and the ability to meet our delivery timeline.

Sustainable Distribution

We factor sustainability into our delivery plan by working with fulfillment partners that use recyclable or minimal packaging and optimize shipping routes to reduce carbon emissions. We avoid unnecessary plastic wrap and foam inserts, and we consolidate shipments whenever possible to lower the overall environmental impact.

Make a pledge without a reward

Back it because you believe in it.

Support the project for no reward, just because it speaks to you.

projects.ai_intro_en: DISCORE is a 9-in-1 optical drive hub that combines a USB hub, SD/TF card reader, and external optical drive into a single compact workstation. It features 4 USB-A ports, 1 USB-C port, a built-in CD/DVD optical drive, and dual SD/TF card slots with 10Gbps data transfer support. The device helps reduce cable clutter and simplifies everyday connectivity for modern laptops.
ai_highlights_en: 9-in-1 expansion with USB hub, card reader, and optical drive in one compact device
High-speed 10Gbps data transfer with USB 3.2 Gen 2 and dual SD/TF card slots
Driver-free plug-and-play with USB-C and USB-A connectivity for all devices

projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Our team has experience in hardware development, product design, and manufacturing. We saw the need for a reliable VDC and docking station solution that combines stable power delivery with simple connectivity. Together, we handle everything from circuit design to production, with the goal of delivering a product that just works.
projects.ai_description_en:
DISCORE is a 9-in-1 optical drive hub designed for creators who need versatile connectivity without the cable clutter. This compact, white aluminum-alloy device combines a USB hub, SD/TF card reader, and external CD/DVD drive into a single streamlined workstation. With 4 USB-A ports, 1 USB-C port, a built-in optical drive, and dual card slots supporting up to 10Gbps data transfer via USB 3.2 Gen 2, DISCORE handles multiple expansion needs through one integrated solution. Both USB-C and USB-A connection cables are built in, so it works with modern laptops and traditional computers without requiring extra adapters.

For photographers, designers, and video creators, DISCORE is built to keep creative momentum going. Insert a camera SD card or drone microSD directly into the hub for quick, high-speed file transfers — no additional card readers needed. The CD/DVD burning capability lets users archive contracts, family videos, graduation projects, and other important files as physical backups that remain independently accessible. A plug-and-play, driver-free design means connecting the device, inserting a disc, and dragging in files is all it takes to start burning, keeping the workflow simple and frustration-free. This helps reduce the constant device-switching and adapter-juggling that tends to interrupt creative flow.

projects.name: NexScope: Handheld & Desktop Digital Microscope
projects.blurb: See more comfortably with a 4.6-inch screen, handheld freedom, desktop stability, up to 1000X magnification, and 1080P recording.
projects.html_story:
See more comfortably with a 4.6-inch screen, handheld freedom, desktop stability, up to 1000X magnification, and 1080P recording.

See more comfortably with a 4.6-inch screen, handheld freedom, desktop stability, up to 1000X magnification, and 1080P recording.

Discover the World from a New Perspective

Dual-Mode Design,Seamless Scene Switching

Clear & Comfortable Large Display

Explore the Microscopic World in Greater Detail

See 1000x More, Discover New Possibilities

Quick Focus Adjustment for Detailed Observation

See Familiar Objects in a Different Way

Dual LED Lighting System

Compact and Lightweight for Everyday Carry

Capture and Save Your Discoveries with Ease

Large-Screen Connectivity, Plug and Play

Viewing Adjustable for Comfort

Simple One-Button Operation

Micrecopic Exploration Made Easy

Environmental commitments

We believe that curiosity about the microscopic world shouldn't be limited by bulky equipment or eye strain. That's why we created NexScope—a digital microscope designed to make exploration more comfortable, intuitive, and accessible.

Discover the World from a New Perspective

More than just a microscope, NexScope is a gateway to discovery. Equipped with a 4.6-inch IPS eye-friendly display, a 12MP image sensor, 1080P video recording, a detachable dual-mode design, and expandable storage up to 512GB, it is built to support exploration both indoors and outdoors.

Dual-Mode Design,Seamless Scene Switching

Insert the microscope into the stable base for hands-free observation. Combined with dual-zone LED illumination and adjustable brightness levels, it is ideal for extended observation sessions and detailed inspection tasks.

Detach the main unit and take it wherever curiosity leads. Observe plant textures, inspect collectibles, examine crafts, or explore hard-to-reach surfaces with greater flexibility.One device. Two ways to explore.

Clear & Comfortable Large Display

Traditional microscopes often require users to bend forward and look through a small eyepiece for extended periods. Over time, this can lead to discomfort and fatigue.

NexScope features a built-in 4.6-inch IPS display that allows you to observe comfortably while sitting or standing naturally. The enlarged live view makes observation more enjoyable and accessible for users of all ages.

With 1080P resolution and a smooth 60Hz refresh rate, image movement remains fluid when adjusting focus or examining moving subjects.

Explore the Microscopic World in Greater Detail

With a magnification range from 100x to 1000x, NexScope allows you to explore both larger structures and intricate details.Whether viewing overall patterns or focusing on fine textures, switching between magnification levels is simple and intuitive.

See 1000x More, Discover New Possibilities

Plant Leaves:Under magnification, leaves reveal intricate vein structures and natural patterns that are difficult to appreciate with the naked eye.

Textile Fibers:Observe the woven structures and fiber arrangements that contribute to the texture and characteristics of different fabrics.

Quick Focus Adjustment for Detailed Observation

A smooth hybrid zoom and focusing system allows for precise image adjustment. Each turn of the focus control reveals additional layers of detail, helping you explore subjects with greater confidence.

See Familiar Objects in a Different Way

Electronic Components:Inspect solder joints, circuit traces, and small components with greater clarity, making it useful for electronics observation and educational applications.

Coins and Collectibles:Examine engravings, textures, and surface details that reflect craftsmanship and wear over time.

Dual LED Lighting System

In microscopy, lighting can be just as important as magnification. That's why NexScope features two independent illumination systems designed for different observation needs.

Eight LEDs surround the lens to provide even illumination with reduced shadows, making it suitable for observing the surfaces of opaque objects in handheld mode.The integrated base light shines upward through transparent or semi-transparent samples, making it useful for observing specimens such as plant sections, insect wings, and other thin materials.

Both lighting systems offer six adjustable brightness levels, allowing you to fine-tune illumination and contrast according to your sample and environment.

Designed for exploration without frequent recharging, NexScope combines a 4000mAh charging base with a 3000mAh handheld battery to provide up to 10 hours of operation. From detailed desktop inspections to outdoor discoveries, it keeps you observing longer with fewer interruptions.

Both the microscope and charging base feature USB-C ports, allowing them to share charging cables commonly used for phones, tablets, and other electronic devices.The device also supports operation while connected to power, helping you continue your observations when charging is needed.

Compact and Lightweight for Everyday Carry

Compact and lightweight, the handheld unit is designed for comfortable one-handed operation.Slip it into a tool bag, backpack pocket, or jacket pocket and take microscopic exploration beyond the desk.

Without being limited by cables or fixed workstations, NexScope allows you to bring observation directly to the subject rather than bringing the subject to the microscope.

Imagine discovering a patch of vibrant moss growing on a damp rock during a hike.Simply remove the handheld unit from the base and observe directly in handheld mode. On the 4.6-inch IPS display, tiny spore capsules, delicate textures, and fine surface details become easier to examine and appreciate.

Capture and Save Your Discoveries with Ease

NexScope features a 12MP image sensor capable of capturing photos at resolutions up to 4032 × 3024 pixels.For moving subjects, it supports smooth 1080P video recording at 60fps, helping preserve observations with clarity and detail.

Photos and videos can be saved directly to a TF card with support for capacities up to 512GB. Built-in playback allows convenient review of your captured content anytime.

Large-Screen Connectivity, Plug and Play

Connect NexScope directly to Mac or Windows computers without installing additional software or drivers.Simply plug in the device to view real-time images on a larger display, making demonstrations, presentations, and collaborative observation more convenient.

Compatible with both macOS and Windows systems, NexScope supports image viewing, photo capture, and video recording through a straightforward user experience.With its USB-C connection, it can work seamlessly with laptops, monitors, projectors, tablets, and other compatible devices for real-time sharing and group viewing.

Viewing Adjustable for Comfort

The display offers five adjustable brightness levels, helping maintain clear visibility across a variety of lighting environments, from bright workspaces to dimmer observation areas.Its adjustable screen angle allows flexible viewing positions whether you are sitting, standing, recording notes, or performing quick inspections.

The observation stand features adjustable height control that works together with the manual focusing system.A simple adjustment helps accommodate specimens of different sizes and thicknesses, making it easier to achieve sharp focus across a wide range of observation tasks.The system also supports 17 interface languages, providing a user-friendly experience for users around the world.

Simple One-Button Operation

Essential controls are integrated into an intuitive interface designed for everyday use.Quick adjustments can be made with a simple press, while the streamlined layout helps users get started with minimal setup and a short learning curve.

Micrecopic Exploration Made Easy

NexScope helps transform scientific curiosity into hands-on discovery.Whether exploring leaves at the kitchen table, examining everyday objects, or observing small specimens together, it creates new opportunities for learning, discussion, and shared experiences.

With magnification options suitable for examining fine details, NexScope can help reveal solder joints, surface conditions, and other small features that may be difficult to see with the naked eye.From coin engravings to ceramic textures and fine craftsmanship details, NexScope provides a closer look at the characteristics that make every collection unique.With stable focusing and photo capture capabilities, preserving and sharing those details becomes simple and convenient.

Estimated shipping begins in September 2026.After the campaign ends, backers will receive a survey via PledgeBox to confirm their shipping address, select any applicable options or add-ons, and pay shipping fees before fulfillment begins.

Risks and challenges

Hardware innovation comes with risks. For electron microscopy, precision optics, circuitry, and mechanics must work in perfect sync.

Key challenges we've addressed:

Supply chain – Sensors/lenses may face delays. We've secured backup suppliers and pre-ordered critical materials.

Software – Cross-platform compatibility. We've completed multi-OS testing and offer long-term firmware updates.

Our commitment: In case of force majeure delays, we'll provide weekly transparent updates. Shipments follow payment order.

Environmental commitments

Long-lasting design

We maximize product life through modular design, rigorous quality testing, and long-term firmware support. Key components (optics, sensors, circuits) are built for repairability — users can replace individual modules instead of the whole unit. We also provide extended maintenance guides and ongoing calibration support.

Reusability and recyclability

We minimize landfill impact through:
Minimalist, recyclable packaging – Using cardboard and paper pulp instead of foam or plastic.
Reduced material waste – Precision manufacturing cuts down excess raw materials.
Take-back program – End-of-life units can be returned to us for component reuse or responsible recycling.
Repair-first design – Modular parts reduce the need to discard whole units.

Sustainable materials

We prioritize low-impact materials across product and packaging:

Recycled for the microscope body

Glass optics (fully recyclable, no plastic lenses)

Bioplastics or recycled ABS for non-critical structural parts

Paper-based pulp trays and corrugated cardboard for packaging — no virgin foam or single-use plastics

Environmentally friendly factories

We choose factories with strict quality control,environmental certification, fair labor practices, and supply chain transparency — prioritizing those close to our markets to reduce carbon footprint.

Sustainable Distribution

We’ll minimize delivery-related emissions by consolidating shipments, using cardboard-only packaging, and partnering with carbon-conscious logistics providers. Backers will also have the option to combine multiple items into one delivery.

Make a pledge without a reward

Back it because you believe in it.

Support the project for no reward, just because it speaks to you.

projects.ai_creator_bio_en: A team focused on making microscopic exploration more comfortable and accessible through innovative digital microscope design.
projects.ai_description_en:
# NexScope Handheld & Desktop Digital Microscope

NexScope is a versatile digital microscope that bridges the gap between professional-grade observation and everyday accessibility. Built around a 4.6-inch IPS display, a 12MP image sensor, and smooth 1080P video recording at 60Hz, it delivers crystal-clear real-time imaging without the eye strain of traditional eyepiece-based microscopes. Its detachable dual-mode design lets users slot the main unit into a stable base for hands-free desktop inspection or take it handheld for on-the-go exploration of plant textures, collectibles, electronics, and more — with magnification ranging from 100x up to 1000x for revealing the finest details.

What sets NexScope apart is its thoughtfully engineered illumination system. Two independent LED arrays serve distinct observation needs: eight surrounding LEDs provide shadow-reduced, even lighting for opaque surfaces in handheld mode, while an integrated base light shines upward through transparent or semi-transparent samples like plant sections and insect wings. Both systems offer six adjustable brightness levels, giving users precise control over contrast and lighting conditions. A smooth hybrid zoom and focusing system enables quick, precise adjustments — one turn of the focus control at a time reveals new layers of detail. With expandable storage up to 512GB, every discovery can be captured and saved effortlessly.

Beyond the classroom or workstation, NexScope serves electronics hobbyists inspecting solder joints and circuit traces, collectors examining coin engravings and textile weaves, and curious minds of all ages exploring the hidden structures of everyday objects. The large-screen connectivity option enables a plug-and-play view on bigger displays, and simple one-button operation keeps the focus on discovery rather than setup. Backed by pre-ordered critical materials, multi-OS-tested software, and a commitment to transparent weekly updates, NexScope makes serious microscopy portable, comfortable, and accessible.

projects.name: RugOne Xlink 7, AI Sports Walkie-Talkie, LTE Walkie-Talkie
projects.blurb: Pocket-Sized AI 4G Communicator with Unlimited Range, LTE Communication Device
projects.html_story:
Pocket-Sized AI 4G Communicator with Unlimited Range, LTE Communication Device

Pocket-Sized AI 4G Communicator with Unlimited Range, LTE Communication Device

The Revolution in Team Comms: RugOne Xlink 7

Ruggedness & Reliability

Revolutionary 4G & AI Audio

Safety & Navigation

Hardware Design & Smart App

Join RugOne Community

Environmental commitments

The Revolution in Team Comms: RugOne Xlink 7

Traditional radios are heavy, bulky, and restricted by short-range limits. They weigh you down and fail when team coordination matters most.

After extensive development, we engineered theRugOne Xlink 7—the ultimate ultra-resilient 4G communication hub designed to disappear into your gear.

Specs at a Glance

Sized for Freedom: Pocket-Sized, Pro-Grade

Just 84g. Pro-grade communication in an earbud-case-sized frame. From peaks to daily runs, it disappears into your gear, keeping you always connected, never weighed down.

A sleek matte-black body with high-contrast orange, built to stay low-profile through every run and climb.

Born from the soul of the Badain Jaran desert. A premium fusion of warm amber and cool taupe textures. Be the standout on every trail.

All 4 accessories included

Wireless PTT Remote Ring

Keep your hands on the gear and your focus on the path. This tiny remote syncs via Bluetooth to replace your device's PTT button.

With two adjustable velcro straps included, it's a perfect fit for your finger, handlebars, or equipment. Control your comms without ever letting go.

Product Gallery

Ruggedness & Reliability

IP68 & IP69K, MIL-STD-810H Tough

Elite IP68/IP69K waterproofing combines MIL-STD-810H toughness. Built to survive every drop, hit, and freeze, Xlink 7 is as tough as your ambition. It's rugged, reliable, and built to endure.

Masters every climate. Under the hood, Xlink 7 packs a battery that thrives in -30°C frost and remains rock-solid in 55°C heat.

Built-in Flashlight

Why carry more when one device does it all? We've built the ultra-bright TorchX directly into the Xlink 7 so you can leave the extra flashlight at home. High-intensity illumination is just one long-press away.

All-Day Battery Power

Big power in a compact form. Featuring a 1020mAh battery under the hood, Xlink 7 empowers you to stay connected and talk all day long.

Revolutionary 4G & AI Audio

Borderless 4G Networking

Break the limits of traditional radio. With global 4G support, enjoy instant, high-speed, and crystal-clear communication, whether you are across the city or across the globe. Reliable connectivity ensures you're always just a button-press away.

Real-Time Group Chat

3-Way Real-Time Talk. Simultaneous two-way voice for up to 3 devices. Natural, fluid team collaboration with zero waiting time. No holding buttons, no distractions, just pure shredding.

Replay last message whenever you need it. A single press of the Power Button gives you instant access to your most recent voice clip, ensuring no critical details are ever lost.

AI Noise Cancellation

Chip+AI Noise Cancellation

Silence the storm, amplify the voice. A dedicated chip and smart AI intelligently work together to filters out wind roar and chaos. Even at high speeds, your voice remains clear and sharp, cutting through the noise no matter the pace.

One-Key AI Voice Assistant

One button, infinite possibilities. Simply press to talk with your AI assistant in real-time. Control your device, get weather updates, and sync with your crew instantly. Professional-grade intelligence at your fingertips.

Safety & Navigation

GPS + Beidou + Glonass Positioning

Global reach, absolute safety. The integration of GPS, Beidou, and Glonass provides rapid coordinate fixes in any terrain. This keeps you found and your exploration powered by confidence.

Every second counts. Rapid-press the Action Button 5 times to trigger a siren and signal for help. The system will automatically call your emergency contacts, who will instantly receive an alert and your live GPS location via the connected app. Stay safe, stay connected.

All-Scenario Connectivity

Built to conquer the extreme, this ultra-resilient 4G solution keeps transport fleets, construction crews, and emergency responders seamlessly synchronized with zero-lag dispatch and centralized command. Designed for heavy-duty field operations, it combines high-volume audio and instant SOS alerts to ensure reliable communication, rapid coordination, and maximum operational efficiency in the toughest environments.

Hardware Design & Smart App

RugOne Xlink App

Your mobile command hub. The RugOne Xlink App provides a visual command center to manage groups, track team status, and customize your device settings with precision. More than just a tool, your App account acts as a team member, enabling seamless communication between your phone and Xlink 7

Every Button, Explained

Technical Specifications

Join RugOne Community

Risks and challenges

Risks and Challenges

Bringing a complex, pro-grade 4G communication device like the RugOne Xlink 7 to life requires advanced hardware engineering, software stability, and precise global supply chain coordination. We want to be completely transparent with our community about our progress: We have already successfully completed both the EVT (Engineering Verification) and DVT (Design Verification) stages, which means our hardware functionality, IP68/IP69K waterproofing, and MIL-STD-810H durability have been thoroughly tested and verified. We are now actively preparing for the PVT (Production Verification) stage, the final trial production phase right before full mass production.

1. Manufacturing & Supply Chain
Mass-producing a device with military-grade ruggedness involves sophisticated tooling and strict quality control on the assembly line. Because we have already passed the DVT phase with working prototypes, our physical molds and designs are locked in. Entering the PVT stage allows us to iron out factory assembly logistics and optimize production yields, ensuring that the final mass production runs smoothly and flawlessly.

2. Software & Certification
Since Xlink 7 relies on global 4G networks, multi-mode positioning (GPS/Beidou/Glonass), and dedicated AI noise cancellation algorithms, ongoing software polish is essential. Our engineering team is currently fine-tuning the companion app and working closely with certification labs to ensure all carrier and regional telecommunication standards are met seamlessly ahead of schedule.

3. Fulfillment & Shipping
Global logistics can occasionally face unforeseen delays due to customs clearance or regional transport bottlenecks. To mitigate this, we are partnering with experienced international freight forwarders. Furthermore, because all 4 pro-grade accessories are included directly inside the main box, our kitting process is simplified, drastically reducing the risk of missing components or split shipments.

Our Commitment:
We promise to keep you updated every step of the way. Through regular, transparent updates right here on Kickstarter, you will see behind-the-scenes glimpses of our PVT run, final testing, and shipping schedules. Thank you for trusting us and helping us bring the future of adventure communication to the world!

I plan to use AI-generated content in my project.

What parts of your project will use AI generated content? Please be as specific as possible.

A total of 12 images in this project involved the use of AI tools (specifically Images #3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11, 15, 17, 18, and 20). These tools were primarily utilized for character generation and optimization.
Tools Used: Doubao, Jimeng (Dreamina), ChatGPT, and Start AI.

Do you have the consent of owners of the works that were (or will be) used to produce the AI generated portion of your projects? Please explain.

All AI-generated content in this project was created entirely by myself (or my team) using officially licensed and publicly available AI tools. No copyrighted third-party assets were used as inputs, and the final outputs fully comply with the terms of service and commercial licensing agreements of the respective AI platforms (Doubao, Jimeng, ChatGPT, and Start AI).

I am incorporating AI in my project in another way.

Artificial intelligence is deeply integrated into the hardware and core functionality of our product.
First, we feature "Chip+AI Noise Cancellation," which utilizes advanced AI algorithms combined with a dedicated hardware chip to intelligently filter out environmental sounds, such as wind roar, ensuring crystal-clear voice communication.
Second, our product includes a "One-Key AI Voice Assistant" feature. By integrating the Gemini API, users can press a button to interact with a smart assistant in real-time for device control, weather updates, and instant team synchronization.

Environmental commitments

Long-lasting design

RugOne Xlink 7 is engineered for ultimate durability, featuring MIL-STD-810H military-grade toughness and IP68/IP69K waterproofing. Built to withstand extreme drops, impact, and harsh temperatures (-30°C to 55°C), it is designed to last for years under heavy outdoor use, significantly extending the product life cycle and reducing electronic waste.

Sustainable Distribution

projects.ai_intro_en: The RugOne Xlink 7 is a pocket-sized 4G communicator with unlimited global range, AI noise cancellation, and military-grade ruggedness. Weighing just 84g, it features IP68/IP69K waterproofing, MIL-STD-810H durability, built-in GPS/Beidou/Glonass positioning, SOS emergency alerts, and a built-in flashlight—designed to keep teams connected anywhere on the planet.
ai_highlights_en: Pocket-sized 84g 4G communicator with unlimited global range and AI noise cancellation
IP68/IP69K waterproof and MIL-STD-810H military-grade ruggedness for extreme conditions
Built-in GPS/Beidou/Glonass positioning with SOS emergency alerts and all-day 1020mAh battery
ai_specs_en: AI noise cancellation + one-key AI voice assistant
Wireless PTT Remote Ring with velcro straps
projects.ai_risks_en: The project has successfully completed EVT and DVT stages with verified hardware, waterproofing, and durability. Primary risks remain in mass production coordination, supply chain logistics, and final PVT stage optimization. However, with molds locked and working prototypes validated, major technical risks have been substantially mitigated.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: RugOne — a brand focused on engineering ultra-resilient, pro-grade communication devices for extreme environments and team coordination.
projects.ai_description_en:
Traditional radios are heavy, bulky, and restricted by short-range limits. The RugOne Xlink 7 shatters these constraints as a pocket-sized, pro-grade 4G LTE communication hub designed to disappear into your gear. Weighing just 84g in an earbud-case-sized frame, it delivers unlimited range connectivity. Unlike traditional walkie-talkies that fail when coordination matters most, the Xlink 7 ensures you are always connected whether you are across the city or across the globe, keeping you unweighed down during runs, climbs, and daily adventures.

Engineered for the extremes, the Xlink 7 combines IP68 and IP69K waterproofing with MIL-STD-810H military-grade durability. Built to survive every drop, hit, and freeze, it features a 1020mAh battery that thrives in -30°C frost and remains rock-solid in 55°C heat. To streamline your gear, we've integrated an ultra-bright TorchX flashlight directly into the device—high-intensity illumination is just one long-press away. It also features multi-mode positioning utilizing GPS, Beidou, and Glonass to keep you safe and on track no matter where your adventure takes you.

At the core of the Xlink 7 is revolutionary 4G and AI audio technology. It utilizes dedicated AI noise cancellation algorithms to deliver crystal-clear, instant, high-speed communication, ensuring your voice cuts through any environment. True to its hands-free philosophy, the device comes with all four pro-grade accessories included right in the box. The Wireless PTT Remote Ring syncs via Bluetooth to replace your device's PTT button, and with two adjustable velcro straps, you can attach it to your finger, handlebars, or equipment for seamless, hands-free control. From the desert-inspired amber and taupe aesthetics to the ultralight design, the RugOne Xlink 7 redefines adventure communication.

projects.name: Solid DriftHub: 8-in-1 Magnetic SSD Hub for Creators
projects.blurb: 4-Bay Magnetic SSD Dock | ProRes Recording | Up to 8TB Storage | 20Gbps USB-C | Active Cooling | 120W PD | 4K120Hz HDMI/8K60Hz HDMI
projects.html_story:
4-Bay Magnetic SSD Dock | ProRes Recording | Up to 8TB Storage | 20Gbps USB-C | Active Cooling | 120W PD | 4K120Hz HDMI/8K60Hz HDMI

4-Bay Magnetic SSD Dock | ProRes Recording | Up to 8TB Storage | 20Gbps USB-C | Active Cooling | 120W PD | 4K120Hz HDMI/8K60Hz HDMI

SoLid – Hassle Free. One Go

What can it do for you ?

Active cooling. More than speed

Stay smooth. Stay steady. Just create

Transparent armor. All chips visible

Magnetic snap. Solid as one

Wide compatibility. More possibilities

Fast. Clear. One display.

Compact & light

Why choose SoLid ?

What's in the Box ?

Environmental commitments

Your devices are getting more powerful, but your workflow gets messier.4K video fills up phone storage fast. Shooting ProRes? You need an external SSD.Desk gets crowded with dongles, card readers, chargers, drive cases—cables everywhere. On-location shoots are even worse.Long recordings can make SSDs heat up, causing speed drops or even recording interruptions.You end up carrying a bag of accessories just to shoot.This shouldn't be the cost of creating.

SoLid – Hassle Free. One Go

Four-bay high-capacity storage with active cooling, designed for stable performance under sustained load.

All-in-one expansion hub:HDMI, USB-C, USB-A, SD card reader, and PD fast charging in a single dock.

Magnetic modular systemfor instant attachment of phones or handheld devices.

Transparent cyberpunk designthat reveals the internal structure at a glance.

SoLid integrates storage, expansion, power delivery, and professional external recording — no more switching between multiple devices.Supports M.2 NVMe SSDs up to 2280 size and up to 8TB capacity, up to 20Gbps USB-C data transfer, up to 120W USB-C PD pass-through charging, and HDMI output up to 4K120Hz / 8K60Hz.

Connect anything — phone, computer, camera, console. Storage, expansion, display, charging — all in one. Cleaner. Faster. Simpler.

What can it do for you ?

We know you don't want to see this — storage space should never limit your creativity.

What can SoLid do for you?It lets you easily connect high-capacity drives without upgrading your device's built-in storage. Get massive space, keep all your important files in one place, and back them up safely. Say goodbye to "storage full" worries.

SoLid features a single M.2 NVMe SSD slot, supporting four form factors — 2230, 2242, 2260, and 2280 — with up to 8TB capacity depending on the SSD used.

Active cooling. More than speed

Traditional hubs rely on passive cooling, allowing heat to accumulate inside the enclosure.SoLid features an active cooling system that helps circulate airflow through the device, reducing heat buildup and supporting more consistent performance during intensive use.

Don't let heat limit your performance.SoLid's active cooling fan + multi-zone airflow keeps SSDs stable — reliable for high-speed transfers, pro recording, and long hours of creation.

SoLid features a high-speed active cooling fan and a large-area honeycomb ventilation design. Cool air flows in through the vents around the chassis, and the fan creates a steady airflow that quickly carries heat away from the SSDs, controller chip, and PCB.

Stay smooth. Stay steady. Just create

When write speeds can't keep up, high-bitrate video stops recording. You lose more than time — you lose moments that can't be repeated.High-bitrate formats such as ProRes 4K require stable write performance. SoLid is designed to support demanding external recording workflows with high-speed SSD storage and active cooling.

Running out of storage when shooting 4K 60fps ProRes on iPhone? Connect SoLid and expand your space instantly.Supports:

Apple ProRes external recording

Direct-to-SSD recording

Long continuous recording

High-bitrate video workflows

iPhone 16 Pro and newer also support 4K 120fps.

Transparent armor. All chips visible

First look? You'll know it's different. Transparent cyberpunk design — not a slogan, a statement. Clear mecha shell. No secrets. Just style.

See it all through the cover: four SSDs, neon-like PCB traces, the controller chip, and the cooling fan in plain sight.Watch the fan spin. Feel the airflow. The tech inside — no longer hidden.

Built-in LED ambient light — on when powered or charging. Soft glow shows status at a glance and enhances the transparent mecha design. Inside meets light. Every connection feels like the future

Magnetic snap. Solid as one

Built-in magnetic module — securely attaches to mainstream devices.Supports MagSafe iPhone, and with the included magnetic ring, works with more Android phones, iPad, Steam Deck, and ROG Ally.Say goodbye to dangling SSDs. Say goodbye to messy cables.

No built-in magnets? No problem. SoLid + magnetic ring works with more Android phones and tablets. From iPhone to Android, tablet to console — SoLid frees your storage and creativity.

Mobile creation, done clean and stable. Just shoot or play — SoLid handles the rest.

Wide compatibility. More possibilities

Compatible with a wide range of USB-C devices, including iPhone, Android phones, iPad, MacBook, Windows PCs, Steam Deck, ROG Ally, and more.Supports iOS, Android, iPadOS, macOS, Windows, and SteamOS.One SoLid. Connect your entire digital ecosystem.

Fast. Clear. One display.

Storage, display, charging, and connectivity in one compact device.• 4K120Hz / 8K60Hz HDMI Output• 20Gbps High-Speed Transfer• Up to 120W USB-C PD Pass-Through Charging• SD / TF Dual Card SlotsTransfer files, connect displays, and access camera cards with ease.

Easily connect to monitors, TVs, and projectors. Higher resolution. Smoother visuals. Elevate your creation, work, and entertainment experience.

Whether you're working from home or managing a hybrid schedule, SoLid helps keep your setup clean and productive.

Compact & light

At just 110g, SoLid is designed to go wherever your creativity goes.By combining SSD storage, expansion ports, card readers, display output, and fast charging into one compact device, SoLid helps simplify your setup without sacrificing capability.

Whether you're editing on a train, backing up footage on location, or building a mobile workstation while traveling, SoLid keeps your essentials together in one streamlined device.One SoLid. Not a bag of accessories.

Why choose SoLid ?

What's in the Box ?

Risks and challenges

We're being upfront: hardware is hard. Manufacturing delays, component sourcing, and shipping hiccups are real risks we've seen happen to projects we admire. To minimize them, we've already completed engineering prototypes, locked in a manufacturing partner, and built buffer time into our delivery schedule. We'll communicate openly if anything shifts — no surprises, no excuses. Just honest updates and a commitment to getting this hub into your hands as promised.

Environmental commitments

Long-lasting design

We design for longevity, not obsolescence. The NVMe SSD is user-replaceable, every port is rated for thousands of insertion cycles, and we avoid glued-in batteries or proprietary components that become unavailable in a few years. We want this hub to still be on your desk — or in your bag — five years from now, not sitting in a drawer or a landfill.

Reusability and recyclability

We design for longevity, not obsolescence. The NVMe SSD is user-replaceable, every port is rated for thousands of insertion cycles, and we avoid glued-in batteries or proprietary components that become unavailable in a few years. We want this hub to still be on your desk — or in your bag — five years from now, not sitting in a drawer or a landfill.

Sustainable materials

We prioritize materials that are durable, recyclable, and responsibly sourced. The enclosure is made primarily from aluminum — a material that can be recycled repeatedly without losing quality. The transparent window uses acrylic, which requires less energy to produce than glass and is fully recyclable. We also minimize plastic use in packaging, opting for recycled cardboard and soy-based inks wherever possible. Every material choice balances performance with environmental responsibility.

Environmentally friendly factories

We consider three things above all else: quality, ethics, and communication. First, we audit the factory's production capabilities, quality control processes, and track record with similar electronics. Second, we ensure they meet fair labor standards and environmental regulations — no shortcuts on working conditions or waste disposal. Third, we prioritize factories that are responsive and transparent, because good communication prevents most production problems before they start. We don't chase the lowest price. We chase the right partner.

Sustainable Distribution

We're keeping it simple and practical. Packaging will use recycled cardboard and minimal plastic — no oversized boxes or foam inserts. We're also consolidating shipments to reduce air freight wherever possible, even if it means a slightly longer wait. For backers in the same region, we'll explore local fulfillment centers to cut down on long-haul transport. None of this is perfect, but it's a start. We'll keep looking for better ways to deliver without trashing the planet.

Make a pledge without a reward

Back it because you believe in it.

Support the project for no reward, just because it speaks to you.

projects.ai_intro_en: SoLid is a 4-bay magnetic SSD dock with active cooling, designed for professional video recording workflows. It combines high-capacity M.2 NVMe storage (up to 8TB), 20Gbps USB-C transfer, 120W PD charging, and 4K120Hz/8K60Hz HDMI output in a compact, transparent cyberpunk design. The magnetic modular system allows instant attachment to phones and devices for clean, cable-free mobile creation.
ai_highlights_en: 4-bay M.2 NVMe SSD storage up to 8TB with active cooling for stable ProRes recording
All-in-one hub: 20Gbps USB-C, 120W PD charging, HDMI 4K120Hz/8K60Hz, SD/TF card slots
Magnetic modular design attaches securely to iPhone, Android, iPad, and handheld consoles

projects.ai_risks_en: As a crowdfunding project, delivery timelines and final specifications may be subject to change. The transparent casing and active cooling fan may raise long-term durability concerns. Maximum 8TB capacity requires user-supplied M.2 NVMe SSDs not included with the dock. Magnetic attachment effectiveness across different phone cases and real-world thermal performance remain unverified until product ships.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: We meticulously refine every detail, from material selection to craftsmanship, always prioritizing stability and reliability. We believe good products don't need to be flashy; they quietly integrate into your work and life, delivering quality in every connection. We don't chase specifications, we only care about the experience. Born for efficiency, existing for simplicity. Connection should be this simple.
projects.ai_description_en:
The SoLid 4-Bay Magnetic SSD Hub is the ultimate all-in-one workflow solution designed specifically for creators who are tired of the accessory chaos that comes with high-end video production. As devices become more powerful, shooting 4K and ProRes video rapidly depletes built-in storage, forcing creators to juggle a mess of dongles, card readers, chargers, and drive cases. Worse, long recordings cause traditional SSDs to overheat, leading to speed drops or catastrophic recording interruptions. SoLid solves this by integrating high-capacity storage, expansion, power delivery, and professional external recording into a single, compact device, ensuring your creative flow is never compromised by "storage full" warnings or thermal throttling. 

This powerhouse dock supports up to four M.2 NVMe SSDs (sizes 2230 to 2280) for a massive combined capacity of up to 8TB, delivering data transfer speeds of up to 20Gbps via USB-C. It is purpose-built for high-bitrate workflows, natively supporting Apple ProRes external recording—including direct-to-SSD and long continuous recording for setups like the iPhone 16 Pro shooting 4K 120fps. Beyond storage, SoLid functions as a comprehensive expansion hub, featuring HDMI output up to 4K120Hz/8K60Hz, USB-A ports, an SD card reader, and 120W USB-C PD pass-through charging. A built-in magnetic modular system allows for the instant attachment of phones or handheld devices, keeping your rig clean and mobile. 

What truly sets SoLid apart is its commitment to sustained performance through active cooling and its striking aesthetic. Unlike traditional hubs that rely on passive cooling, SoLid features a high-speed active cooling fan combined with a large-area honeycomb ventilation design. This multi-zone airflow circulates cool air through the chassis, rapidly dissipating heat from the SSDs, controller chip, and PCB to maintain stable write speeds during intensive use. Visually, the hub boasts a transparent cyberpunk design with a clear mecha shell that reveals the internal structure—neon-like PCB traces, controller chip, and spinning fan are all on display, illuminated by a built-in LED ambient light that glows when powered. SoLid delivers hassle-free creation in one go.

# Avelun SolarLun: 3‑in‑1 Solar Power Bank for Everyday Carry

You’re only charged if the project meets its funding goal by the campaign deadline.
