2](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/1374545949/avelun-solarlun-3in1-solar-power-bank-for-everyday-carry/comments) [Community](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/1374545949/avelun-solarlun-3in1-solar-power-bank-for-everyday-carry/community)

## Story

### WHY AVELUN SOLARLUN EXISTS

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/067/696/0a4fa020024e7017478a1433b4926993_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781149447&width=680&sig=ptLE9jo67dpWubvGKmHKs5Y0vU4k1cjMbQCGY9Rd%2B9w%3D)

You packed light. Your battery didn’t.

9 out of 10 people have missed a photo, a call, or a trail because their phone died.

A regular power bank helps — until it runs out.

A traditional solar panel helps — if you are willing to carry the bulk.

A small solar power bank looks convenient — but often relies on a tiny solar strip that is too limited for real outdoor charging.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/683/7e3a09c7602d10470632372ba604ae3f_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098372&width=680&sig=T24fUX9KBtj4FNy5pJ68CITsSTtLNYshvoOF6SStF4w%3D)

We built Avelun SolarLun so you never have to choose between staying light and staying powered.

### MEET AVELUN SOLARLUN

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/067/699/869ebf4b6cce67ff0453ca467e992de1_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781149466&width=680&sig=NFTa%2BWOsfSONr2hrRIoI%2FBLzCkU8oMPkCTPOQiE4zJM%3D)

AVELUN SOLARLUN is made of two independent modules that work separately or together.

The power bank module stores energy and charges devices anytime.

The solar charger module unfolds into a 6-fold flexible solar array and can charge devices directly through Type-C.

When snapped together magnetically, the solar panel helps recharge the power bank using sunlight.

This gives you more flexibility than a regular power bank, more portability than a traditional solar kit, and more usable solar area than most tiny solar power banks.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/701/798048257b7684bb4cdfe5d6c63e597a_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098513&width=680&sig=xZ6Wr1pfXWN0qjI1x5n5COFz5YkdhutqwXHCqLLCur4%3D)

### ONE SYSTEM. THREE CHARGING MODES.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/046/547/874e71663d4438ccaf181e0c9821af9e_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781017263&width=680&sig=Fcn8DzOAC48gFEPtAWLU4oxrvH1jdX%2BFdT2NteMB1LY%3D)

Most power banks only work until they run out. Most solar chargers only work when the sun is available. SolarLun brings both together in one modular system.

Use stored power anytime. Charge devices directly from sunlight. Snap the battery onto the panel to recover energy outdoors. One compact system gives you more ways to stay powered when outlets are not nearby.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/702/e1047466ccf62dae4ae73026bcedbe49_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098531&width=680&sig=A3r4FhKpXDi%2Bby%2FvIaviwtqG4miIQ2PXl%2FsAD8bxb8k%3D)

### POWER WHEN THE SUN ISN’T AROUND

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/067/702/e5e98a548d4c00829f11dc5ea3998f22_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781149494&width=680&sig=oG2i%2FBsLtGVs810Wle%2FSmZzQEm2AK9vp%2BZjGA%2BdP7zM%3D)

When sunlight is not available, use SolarLun as a portable power bank. The detachable 7,800mAh battery module gives you reliable backup power for phones, cameras, earbuds, lights, and other everyday devices.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/707/92d09a18681ef28f8dadfc98409e62c8_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098550&width=680&sig=OI9DMXlPOsjymDPqjfJciCysYoDqy0R6ewa0bc9YXog%3D)

### POWER DIRECTLY FROM THE SUN

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/067/705/40aef3db4fa8cbbab5141d314b59839d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781149508&width=680&sig=HPOZMDe9j92BVRJ8nwoC4cS5V4lwNZDAyBbIn0%2FR5Fk%3D)

When sunlight is available, SolarLun works as a standalone solar charger. Unfold the 6-fold solar panel, connect your device through the USB-C output, and use sunlight to power phones, GPS devices, cameras, USB lights, and other small electronics.

This mode is ideal when you want to save the battery module for later, charge during the day, or keep essential devices running while you are outdoors.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/712/5562b08e19759c0f738b168186bee570_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098574&width=680&sig=6BFnrwAz%2BggNmDuKzNvr8iGgvqw%2BrRL8V0ctUz7pIR4%3D)

### SOLAR RECOVERY FOR LONGER DAYS

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/067/708/df58e0e19a35f2e93d8184f5c8117a7c_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781149525&width=680&sig=Jw2So8%2BKR2kHO0oH7%2FxqWS%2FVSl4y5ZnwBXgYWHeP67w%3D)

When your battery module runs low, SolarLun gives you another way to recover power outdoors. Snap the power bank onto the solar panel, place it in stable sunlight, and let the panel help recharge the battery during the day.

No complicated clips. No loose mounting parts. No awkward alignment. Just snap, connect, and recover power when outlets are not around.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/717/78963a91d61aa0c872b343b31b1a19f3_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098587&width=680&sig=YIjgoqmYBnXvjiGx5f3aoBGyo2%2FMuVnw%2BFK%2BLXtg2lA%3D)

### THE CORE DIFFERENCE

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/722/d339e7d3ddbc9166f5c5b7b0f1b2aae6_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098612&width=680&sig=ydz0kACQdOH%2F8HOlmwHZ4XC6JJwbvfbiuGh3TKsx1cs%3D)

### 6-FOLD SOLAR CHARGER

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/046/584/04c0998480b7c11c436507cfdc7e7101_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781017351&width=680&sig=A%2FVbrWirrv8Lu3dhR1zQGgw0BejwoIJnfB0uXAve1zw%3D)

Avelun SolarLun uses a 6-fold flexible solar panel that opens wide when sunlight is available.

Folded, it is compact for bag carry.

Opened, it becomes a real solar charging surface.

The solar panel includes its own Type-C output, so it can directly charge compatible electronic devices in sunlight — even when it is not connected to the power bank module.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/733/42a21706c3c666b601802d277d2e676a_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781098675&width=680&sig=VdZFGyBgckabAT%2B0QKyUUD88Zw5SkQ88NhDWUdJr4PY%3D)

### 18W SOLAR POWER

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/738/50274dde7c2dd29cf90eaee40209f379_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781098700&width=680&sig=pwfuSK7y8yqc%2F%2FTG94AVj4FHdM2jqhuUNqMkhaScoFI%3D)

### 7,800mAh POWER BANK MODULE

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/061/044/824486b8c3f0a666bef477685e1696ca_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781105218&width=680&sig=pB6XWmifWnk4digQEA5mL9kcUmc0n2pkYDybRwA4uZ8%3D)

The detachable 7,800mAh battery module gives SolarLun instant backup power when you need it most. Use it like a regular power bank to charge your phone, earbuds, camera accessories, USB lights, or other everyday devices — no sunlight required.

Then, when daylight is available, connect it back to the solar panel and let SolarLun help recover energy from the sun. It is everyday backup power with a way to recharge beyond the wall outlet.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/061/047/db49725e6d889e7cb6b48657021c8000_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781105236&width=680&sig=Pu8%2Fe56MkSA32GbA7pB9dO5rUzPEbZZTSP2N%2F2%2FztCc%3D)

### TYPE-C + USB-A OUTPUT

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/061/052/c5f317cf5d821d2ea13082ab0620e6b1_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781105265&width=680&sig=PBtE8zcK0U71cwhr%2F5cLJYVeK4nGVBju5ZPuyB8WO3w%3D)

SolarLun is built to work with the devices you already carry. The battery module gives you Type-C and USB-A output for everyday charging, while the solar panel includes its own Type-C port for direct sunlight charging.

Use the battery when you need stored power. Use the solar panel when daylight is available. From phones and cameras to earbuds, lights, GPS devices, and accessories, SolarLun gives your gear more ways to stay powered.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/061/057/b4a366b6936b047ffa6b9f15d9beb597_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781105278&width=680&sig=SIbJ7SEIRw%2BKbUdt0jC%2Bualjh90zK2I8SyQqhAA%2FpwQ%3D)

### FOLDABLE— AND BUILT FOR REAL CARRY

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/046/614/36f4f0df4f63c3f174b73bf6f6a32bba_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781017409&width=680&sig=Ijj8aSZtIdf5n%2BUpfH2wSTwxanfvoXe%2BGYIRffMNBO8%3D)

SolarLun is designed to go with your everyday gear, not sit at home like a bulky solar panel. Fold it down for easy packing in a backpack, travel bag, car kit, or emergency box. When sunlight is available, unfold the 6-fold panel to create a larger charging surface for real outdoor use.

Compact when you carry it. Useful when you open it.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/061/068/f4de2a94e303eb8991eaf13fe2d143f7_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781105316&width=680&sig=bhjfc0olridZYOMYfFMXJ5DLn1p92vZHeK315HkicvA%3D)

### BUILT FOR TRAVEL, OUTDOORS, AND EMERGENCIES

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/046/617/6cdd1062a85cc7512ffb9f36c6ee6b9f_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781017419&width=680&sig=EJqIaLB0N1v4ChSV7tnOnZJmTklGCVRAxQsu2%2FlVSaI%3D)

From road trips and camping nights to hiking breaks, photography days, and power outages, SolarLun gives you flexible backup power when outlets are hard to find.

Battery when you need it. Solar when you can use it. Recovery when you need to keep going longer.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/746/31b2f2d28de85b34f7d8fccb97378cca_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098722&width=680&sig=%2FmXxYlEWYHgUchgBjyt13NDufe7kML4YjfyaVuZsjig%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/067/745/c51f1abafefbbd85c4ef852ae39d7c39_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781149791&width=680&sig=xA5xpOkznivqbwAp1drLrda7R%2FK1md2WudPuiPzaKoY%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/750/5f8fbf61e3863bb1e4af396f506b6340_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098734&width=680&sig=Y25f2yCuK2BH9h8BSCE52ReFBZt6%2BtaSmoVuZX6Xnqo%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/067/752/91b8766560ea7587dcfe53d5939c8376_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781149823&width=680&sig=1WXPw3uZVZUJm4xB3b5ePZTXfDQcmwuX%2FP1kPi9R74A%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/755/d558f8cc9a73bfcbcb501e99ed52f780_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098748&width=680&sig=ZUriy4cGeHNfcgH1dqsmtKDzWRRR1KEnGCBOLa1j8lY%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/046/636/961d1f035a59cda5333fe24c7f82cbde_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781017504&width=680&sig=V3tvueXArGQ8xzAkOgOmGjDP5%2FiokqKEOxCpNB%2Fi468%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/059/785/39bad82118ced86f159d2367a158af02_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781098844&width=680&sig=jOg87z64%2BerA%2FFe7YfFXeXtOnPadGpMMdicyNxnUwhA%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/071/228/09a7275b79d3b29b1cb1f2fa306c54be_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781173129&width=680&sig=3d3GXd63jG9vfMtim9SnvV6ZEp0IdgWk3fBCnHkKa7I%3D)

We are a small team of outdoor enthusiasts and product engineers. We love hiking, camping, photography, and travel — but we also rely on our devices for maps, photos, music, and emergencies.

For years, we carried power banks that died too fast, and solar panels that were too bulky or too slow to be useful.

We tried the tiny solar power banks on the market. They looked convenient, but the solar strip was a decoration — not a real charging solution. We tried large foldable solar panels. They worked, but we couldn’t fit them in a daypack.

So we decided to build our own.

We wanted a modular system: a real 7,800mAh power bank for instant backup, a 6-fold solar panel with enough surface to actually charge, and a magnetic connection that let us use both together — or separately.

Months of prototyping. Dozens of folding hinge designs. Countless tests in direct sun, partial shade, rain, and dust.

The result is Avelun SolarLun.

Not a power bank with a tiny solar sticker. Not a bulky solar panel you leave at home. A modular system that gives you three practical ways to stay powered — battery now, solar direct when you can, and solar recovery when your power bank needs a top-up outdoors.

We made this for people who move — and who don't want to stop for an outlet.

[![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/068/142/4a9ac7c13efbcd94d771ec4765f634af_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781152946&width=680&sig=egPoPXuoYwKeV2W90DKnWgS27midRXF6c0QIIzC2a4c%3D)](http://www.backermany.com/) [![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/068/140/8b819faf1685e3837a3211fe7a10e5da_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781152946&width=680&sig=5XFG%2BkzEpYsF8UfvqeBCrAp0sx2S3cABhVL5Cui0dhk%3D)](http://www.backerplan.com/) [![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/068/143/af467a1527344ec0b022068d5871dd20_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781152947&width=680&sig=GFEbGjGg0qmDNJ5zFagzxWfvZd3lM0yVmXoP%2B3G8%2Bqs%3D)](http://www.backerspaces.com/) [![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/068/141/0d65a5f0308b6915d7b00763cbd31c7c_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781152947&width=680&sig=DTeNiAjK856xY5bZqvuzbdw71CzZMwX8B5%2Fd5kZzHzI%3D)](http://www.backerplus.com/)

## Risks and challenges

Risks and challenges may include final production scheduling, component lead times, quality control, and international shipping timelines. Our team has experience in solar energy products and manufacturing, and we will work closely with our suppliers and logistics partners to keep production stable and update backers if any changes occur.

[Learn about accountability on Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/help/hc/sections/115001107133)

Questions about this project? [Check out the FAQ](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/1374545949/avelun-solarlun-3in1-solar-power-bank-for-everyday-carry//faqs)

[Report this project to Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/login?then=%2Fprojects%2F1374545949%2Favelun-solarlun-3in1-solar-power-bank-for-everyday-carry#report-this-project)

Avelun designs practical everyday gear for modern life in motion. We focus on portable power, smart carry, and outdoor-ready products that...
projects.html_story:
three charging modes | 6-fold solar panel | 18w solar power | usb-c direct output | 7800mah power bank | type-c + usb-a shared output

three charging modes | 6-fold solar panel | 18w solar power | usb-c direct output | 7800mah power bank | type-c + usb-a shared output

WHY AVELUN SOLARLUN EXISTS

MEET AVELUN SOLARLUN

ONE SYSTEM. THREE CHARGING MODES.

POWER WHEN THE SUN ISN’T AROUND

POWER DIRECTLY FROM THE SUN

SOLAR RECOVERY FOR LONGER DAYS

THE CORE DIFFERENCE

6-FOLD SOLAR CHARGER

18W SOLAR POWER

7,800mAh POWER BANK MODULE

TYPE-C + USB-A OUTPUT

FOLDABLE— AND BUILT FOR REAL CARRY

BUILT FOR TRAVEL, OUTDOORS, AND EMERGENCIES

WHY AVELUN SOLARLUN EXISTS

You packed light. Your battery didn’t.9 out of 10 people have missed a photo, a call, or a trail because their phone died.A regular power bank helps — until it runs out.A traditional solar panel helps — if you are willing to carry the bulk.A small solar power bank looks convenient — but often relies on a tiny solar strip that is too limited for real outdoor charging.

We built Avelun SolarLun so you never have to choose between staying light and staying powered.

MEET AVELUN SOLARLUN

AVELUN SOLARLUNis made of two independent modules that work separately or together.The power bank module stores energy and charges devices anytime.The solar charger module unfolds into a 6-fold flexible solar array and can charge devices directly through Type-C.When snapped together magnetically, the solar panel helps recharge the power bank using sunlight.This gives you more flexibility than a regular power bank, more portability than a traditional solar kit, and more usable solar area than most tiny solar power banks.

ONE SYSTEM. THREE CHARGING MODES.

Most power banks only work until they run out. Most solar chargers only work when the sun is available. SolarLun brings both together in one modular system.

Use stored power anytime. Charge devices directly from sunlight. Snap the battery onto the panel to recover energy outdoors. One compact system gives you more ways to stay powered when outlets are not nearby.

POWER WHEN THE SUN ISN’T AROUND

When sunlight is not available, use SolarLun as a portable power bank. The detachable 7,800mAh battery module gives you reliable backup power for phones, cameras, earbuds, lights, and other everyday devices.

POWER DIRECTLY FROM THE SUN

When sunlight is available, SolarLun works as a standalone solar charger. Unfold the 6-fold solar panel, connect your device through the USB-C output, and use sunlight to power phones, GPS devices, cameras, USB lights, and other small electronics.

This mode is ideal when you want to save the battery module for later, charge during the day, or keep essential devices running while you are outdoors.

SOLAR RECOVERY FOR LONGER DAYS

When your battery module runs low, SolarLun gives you another way to recover power outdoors. Snap the power bank onto the solar panel, place it in stable sunlight, and let the panel help recharge the battery during the day.

No complicated clips. No loose mounting parts. No awkward alignment. Just snap, connect, and recover power when outlets are not around.

THE CORE DIFFERENCE

6-FOLD SOLAR CHARGER

Avelun SolarLun uses a 6-fold flexible solar panel that opens wide when sunlight is available.Folded, it is compact for bag carry.Opened, it becomes a real solar charging surface.The solar panel includes its own Type-C output, so it can directly charge compatible electronic devices in sunlight — even when it is not connected to the power bank module.

18W SOLAR POWER

7,800mAh POWER BANK MODULE

The detachable 7,800mAh battery module gives SolarLun instant backup power when you need it most. Use it like a regular power bank to charge your phone, earbuds, camera accessories, USB lights, or other everyday devices — no sunlight required.

Then, when daylight is available, connect it back to the solar panel and let SolarLun help recover energy from the sun. It is everyday backup power with a way to recharge beyond the wall outlet.

TYPE-C + USB-A OUTPUT

SolarLun is built to work with the devices you already carry. The battery module gives you Type-C and USB-A output for everyday charging, while the solar panel includes its own Type-C port for direct sunlight charging.

Use the battery when you need stored power. Use the solar panel when daylight is available. From phones and cameras to earbuds, lights, GPS devices, and accessories, SolarLun gives your gear more ways to stay powered.

FOLDABLE— AND BUILT FOR REAL CARRY

SolarLun is designed to go with your everyday gear, not sit at home like a bulky solar panel. Fold it down for easy packing in a backpack, travel bag, car kit, or emergency box. When sunlight is available, unfold the 6-fold panel to create a larger charging surface for real outdoor use.

Compact when you carry it. Useful when you open it.

BUILT FOR TRAVEL, OUTDOORS, AND EMERGENCIES

From road trips and camping nights to hiking breaks, photography days, and power outages, SolarLun gives you flexible backup power when outlets are hard to find.

Battery when you need it. Solar when you can use it. Recovery when you need to keep going longer.

We are a small team of outdoor enthusiasts and product engineers. We love hiking, camping, photography, and travel — but we also rely on our devices for maps, photos, music, and emergencies.For years, we carried power banks that died too fast, and solar panels that were too bulky or too slow to be useful.We tried the tiny solar power banks on the market. They looked convenient, but the solar strip was a decoration — not a real charging solution. We tried large foldable solar panels. They worked, but we couldn’t fit them in a daypack.So we decided to build our own.We wanted a modular system: a real 7,800mAh power bank for instant backup, a 6-fold solar panel with enough surface to actually charge, and a magnetic connection that let us use both together — or separately.Months of prototyping. Dozens of folding hinge designs. Countless tests in direct sun, partial shade, rain, and dust.The result is Avelun SolarLun.Not a power bank with a tiny solar sticker. Not a bulky solar panel you leave at home. A modular system that gives you three practical ways to stay powered — battery now, solar direct when you can, and solar recovery when your power bank needs a top-up outdoors.We made this for people who move — and who don't want to stop for an outlet.

Risks and challenges

Risks and challenges may include final production scheduling, component lead times, quality control, and international shipping timelines. Our team has experience in solar energy products and manufacturing, and we will work closely with our suppliers and logistics partners to keep production stable and update backers if any changes occur.

Make a pledge without a reward

Back it because you believe in it.

Support the project for no reward, just because it speaks to you.

projects.ai_intro_en: Avelun SolarLun is a modular solar charging system that combines a 7,800mAh detachable power bank with a 6-fold 18W flexible solar panel. It offers three charging modes: stored power, direct solar charging, and solar recovery via a magnetic connection. Designed for travel, outdoors, and emergencies, it provides flexible backup power without the bulk of traditional solar kits.
ai_highlights_en: Modular 6-fold solar panel with 18W output for real outdoor charging
7,800mAh detachable power bank for instant backup power anytime
Three charging modes: power bank, direct solar, and solar recovery
projects.ai_risks_en: may include final production scheduling, component lead times, quality control, and international shipping timelines. Our team has experience in solar energy products and manufacturing, and we will work closely with our suppliers and logistics partners to keep production stable and update backers if any changes occur.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: A small team of outdoor enthusiasts and product engineers.
projects.ai_description_en:
The Avelun SolarLun is a modular 3-in-1 solar power bank designed for everyday carry, travel, and emergencies. Traditional power banks eventually die, solar panels are often too bulky to carry, and mini solar chargers typically rely on weak, tiny strips. SolarLun solves this by combining a detachable 7,800mAh battery module with a 6-fold flexible 18W solar panel, ensuring you never have to choose between staying light and staying powered. It is a versatile power solution built to keep your essential gear running wherever your adventures take you.

The system operates through three distinct charging modes to maximize power flexibility. Use the 7,800mAh power bank module as a reliable portable battery to charge phones, cameras, earbuds, and USB lights anytime. When the sun is out, unfold the 6-fold solar panel and charge devices directly through the built-in USB-C output, saving the battery for later. Better yet, magnetically snap the power bank onto the solar panel to recover energy outdoors. There are no complicated clips or loose mounting parts—just a simple snap, place in sunlight, and recharge on the go.

Designed for real portability, SolarLun folds down to a compact size for easy bag carry, yet unfolds into a robust, high-yield solar charging surface when needed. The Type-C and USB-A shared output ensures compatibility with the devices you already own, while the magnetic snap-on design makes power recovery instantaneous. Whether you are a weekend hiker, a dedicated traveler, or simply preparing for unexpected power outages, SolarLun offers a smarter, more adaptable way to keep your essential devices powered in any situation.

## Story

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/057/871/6954eb795d1de73715b7823bb26b3774_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781087550&width=680&sig=42PjImcA4Q1ZcSDN6v3gWBJbI%2BhdJAwWH19Vxel3yWE%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/041/490/3809fe2e2ae2970b2db4cf2681505ca2_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780990228&width=680&sig=%2Fu7N3MIUfbJSpnjI0PFStdI%2BNuxzZcBVA4hBDifbzbw%3D)

WildForm is more than a terrarium. It is a living landscape inspired by nature itself — a handcrafted ecosystem terrarium that combines realistic mountain rockwork with an integrated humidity system.

Designed for both reptile habitats and planted displays, WildForm creates a more natural, more immersive, and more convenient environment for your animals and plants.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/041/734/38ca5301eb5dc6dcaf0489352258df8f_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780991601&width=680&sig=sNVCyawPpMie6xMLmMMAidxXyTr5jFbU5zwpa2BCjcg%3D)

Unlike ordinary enclosures with visible spray tubes and awkward add-ons, WildForm’s misting nozzle is seamlessly embedded into the mountain structure. The result is a clean, realistic look that feels like part of the landscape, not an accessory attached to it.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/042/131/d6bce638c05131ad0c99c5d66f779066_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780993512&width=680&sig=e8sCl2gL98OcqKHof9qz%2BaV6YRgTWcB3yoFjvR%2Fdsqk%3D)

### Integrated Humidity System

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/042/143/ce901c662b641ba81e1b05088cc02996_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780993555&width=680&sig=hP153EUwyv%2FpUZuELLW5cA0mOS%2Fk95nUSneAWgXzh50%3D)

WildForm includes a built-in misting system that helps maintain stable humidity inside the tank.

With scheduled misting, you can reduce the need for daily manual spraying and create a more consistent environment for humidity-loving species and moisture-dependent plants.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/042/183/db8a584c8d0754176277c882b891f31f_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780993720&width=680&sig=k%2FAEVWCY1Sbljlu%2BfifzdrzWJ3%2BhYpHvfsME2bB%2Bc4Q%3D)

### Two Misting Modes

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/042/194/59ef2d3a0568358214a41bbb2ed7ddf8_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780993757&width=680&sig=GISibXpvd4q9m3t3RXz1DjYagHkhSv1pMdoRs%2FQlMMs%3D)

WildForm supports both continuous misting and intermittent misting, giving users flexibility to match different animal or plant care routines.

- Continuous misting for stronger humidity support

- Intermittent misting for natural rain-forest style cycles

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/009/f97bf215018c154dfd131bc0e19166c4_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780997728&width=680&sig=zhAVKzCsD3npBF2w7ZdgyVsG35EL%2Bog3t8xdnFZzv04%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/057/471/9519ff83ad58d3a906e9ea2378e05d11_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781085106&width=680&sig=jB0520b5%2Fo16WZG3yf6wSQw7f0LWQkp5FEbZqV2668Y%3D)

### Quiet Operation

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/016/869b440acd6fa9f67fd4d0ceda357dc0_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780997754&width=680&sig=bzVQOt7t9PS1bAqEcIVKu1hZ%2BI8dAdpxom6ftlowqbk%3D)

The misting system is designed for silent or near-silent operation, so it will not disturb your pets, your room, or your sleep. This is especially important for nocturnal reptiles and quiet indoor spaces.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/060/219c526c8112edf59f7c252b010f6c43_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780998019&width=680&sig=vhwKWmmHTmVSkUeixpP2EeChhkUHdWQb3W2tIrZtYAI%3D)

### More Natural for Reptiles

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/159/ab30fbc7ffad58cb0d2160f975181dbc_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780998600&width=680&sig=TUbUI7zGLY5sfVy0uX1ElnBI%2B2eDiiNqwTLICmefV24%3D)

Many reptiles respond better to stable humidity, natural-looking terrain, and less frequent disturbance.

WildForm helps create a habitat that feels closer to an animal’s native environment while reducing the need to open the enclosure repeatedly.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/413/8f964d58dc7f94e7caebbe9b41aca624_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781006254&width=680&sig=wfy20tor7JRNK6%2Fx6SQxKpjmWeUoQ9gVZPJuBdqoh%2BM%3D)

### Bring the Rainforest Indoors

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/340/fc0b2d9238fb0bfb02e1b2c95670299a_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1780999734&width=680&sig=f3ZCa2QY7IXNspbVxkhIhxXPolse%2BvZ6yhWM8QAJoHM%3D)

WildForm is not only for reptiles. It is also ideal for planted ecosystems, tropical moss setups, and humidity-loving terrarium plants.

The misting system helps create a moist microclimate that supports healthy growth and a lush rainforest look.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/058/283/a17527c19771d41824b5920f90873c57_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781089772&width=680&sig=UgOXbUJVWngwTlagaMP7BGo4L%2FD0ZgT6NHoSzDOTmt0%3D)

### Hidden Reservoir, Natural Appearance

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/396/353ac8c5f544d1476e963c97126ee4fe_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781000040&width=680&sig=2wj%2FVryLjT1gBqGHCsDI0b4TFWE6pMsuUG96zl9gfAY%3D)

The integrated water reservoir is cleverly concealed within the handcrafted rockscape, preserving the clean and natural appearance of the habitat.

When it's time to refill, simply lift the hidden cover, add water, and close it again. No exposed tanks, no external containers, and no visible equipment disrupting the beauty of the landscape.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/411/a7a16b90fc04d0fbf85cf76cf71c5f0a_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781000197&width=680&sig=eF0I7C96UqZTBeALGYnoTe4QzMf2CyfRlN9WiqFbmuw%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/043/421/36e8e36b621d25facc32c1eea10979a8_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781000248&width=680&sig=9xvHj%2FGpsTn2wRlpeBiGfjKvrzYDhSyGoqlZrFli9oc%3D)

For backers who already own a terrarium, the misting system can also be offered separately as a reward. This gives customers the option to upgrade an existing setup and build their own custom ecosystem.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/380/7a999594a7b6f31be307ea4543197aa1_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781006058&width=680&sig=Xe%2FCxZHq8estK0M2X6bRI0Hr35ZMU6Hnf1uzyBuvzUg%3D)

### what's in the box

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/222/f634184d37001d51d4e2bd4f0159f7aa_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781005029&width=680&sig=MWTkCh9yTCalcmqrbi5rlMkf6jiGoFCudioNfCjjzM0%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/293/18aabba84e50b85309251303db25fc23_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781005561&width=680&sig=8eNuLjVYYxiKIEJJk7Fk0p%2FuluqrB9nq2B03F2JXxq4%3D)

### Rewards

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/206/b142389fd49c54d5003f65f7dff562fd_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781004901&width=680&sig=NzLFCTc%2B%2FCJaAoVdk3Zn0TRcs7OKueiq43UnYfOBGF4%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/209/1b8a8e645520f5a445b61578eda93902_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781004904&width=680&sig=plWNwh57KCpOKM5Zojh7JB2kqrsDBcitIE%2BUd9O40uI%3D)

### Timeline

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/459/24ce2a5c8984867d697bbedbb0ffabba_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781006510&width=680&sig=xnR66Ti9kmCPe3M%2FLIfEwcB2KRx%2F0yKI99Mm3ad4vgs%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/044/469/9289e10fe40eceb7c47f6ade8f6f280a_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781006582&width=680&sig=rwAbaVAj%2Fbo9VK5DPJ%2BOpVnfenZBy%2FB%2BF0YttGAxqYw%3D)

### R&D process

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/056/692/da348457a2ec2c30a86caa18cb8f966a_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781080787&width=680&sig=uiVeherRJINKnU9RIzxqtUyG5vBH%2BM8nxZRnvY8te4I%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/056/693/08efe3d98f1a1ccca5ba0b61b49ff0f9_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1781080800&width=680&sig=2ldtKwqMKa2elKg%2BUODWCsee6feyjdPEFatae7fj%2FOw%3D)

## Risks and challenges

Bringing a handcrafted, ecosystem-based product to life comes with unique challenges — but we’ve designed this project with reliability and scalability in mind.

Each terrarium involves a detailed manual crafting process, including sculpting, finishing, and system integration. As demand grows, maintaining consistent quality while scaling production is a key focus. To address this, we’ve already standardized our production workflow and are working with experienced manufacturing partners to ensure stable output and quality control.

Another challenge lies in the integration of the smart misting system. To ensure long-term reliability, we have tested the system across extended usage scenarios, optimizing for durability, consistency, and low noise performance.

Logistics and international shipping are also factors we take seriously. We are developing protective packaging solutions and working with trusted fulfillment partners to minimize the risk of damage during transit.

While unexpected delays can occur, we are committed to transparent communication and will keep all backers updated throughout the production and delivery process.

[Learn about accountability on Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/help/hc/sections/115001107133)

Questions about this project? [Check out the FAQ](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/wildform/bring-the-rainforest-home-smart-bioactive-terrarium//faqs)

[Report this project to Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/login?then=%2Fprojects%2Fwildform%2Fbring-the-rainforest-home-smart-bioactive-terrarium#report-this-project)

projects.html_story:
A handcrafted natural habitat with automated misting—no daily spraying, stable humidity, and a beautiful rainforest ecosystem for your

A handcrafted natural habitat with automated misting—no daily spraying, stable humidity, and a beautiful rainforest ecosystem for your

Integrated Humidity System

Two Misting Modes

Quiet Operation

More Natural for Reptiles

Bring the Rainforest Indoors

Hidden Reservoir, Natural Appearance

what's in the box

WildForm is more than a terrarium. It is a living landscape inspired by nature itself — a handcrafted ecosystem terrarium that combines realistic mountain rockwork with an integrated humidity system.

Designed for both reptile habitats and planted displays, WildForm creates a more natural, more immersive, and more convenient environment for your animals and plants.

Unlike ordinary enclosures with visible spray tubes and awkward add-ons, WildForm’s misting nozzle is seamlessly embedded into the mountain structure. The result is a clean, realistic look that feels like part of the landscape, not an accessory attached to it.

Integrated Humidity System

WildForm includes a built-in misting system that helps maintain stable humidity inside the tank.

With scheduled misting, you can reduce the need for daily manual spraying and create a more consistent environment for humidity-loving species and moisture-dependent plants.

Two Misting Modes

WildForm supports both continuous misting and intermittent misting, giving users flexibility to match different animal or plant care routines.

Continuous misting for stronger humidity support

Intermittent misting for natural rain-forest style cycles

Quiet Operation

The misting system is designed for silent or near-silent operation, so it will not disturb your pets, your room, or your sleep. This is especially important for nocturnal reptiles and quiet indoor spaces.

More Natural for Reptiles

Many reptiles respond better to stable humidity, natural-looking terrain, and less frequent disturbance.

WildForm helps create a habitat that feels closer to an animal’s native environment while reducing the need to open the enclosure repeatedly.

Bring the Rainforest Indoors

WildForm is not only for reptiles. It is also ideal for planted ecosystems, tropical moss setups, and humidity-loving terrarium plants.

The misting system helps create a moist microclimate that supports healthy growth and a lush rainforest look.

Hidden Reservoir, Natural Appearance

The integrated water reservoir is cleverly concealed within the handcrafted rockscape, preserving the clean and natural appearance of the habitat.

When it's time to refill, simply lift the hidden cover, add water, and close it again. No exposed tanks, no external containers, and no visible equipment disrupting the beauty of the landscape.

For backers who already own a terrarium, the misting system can also be offered separately as a reward. This gives customers the option to upgrade an existing setup and build their own custom ecosystem.

Another challenge lies in the integration of the smart misting system. To ensure long-term reliability, we have tested the system across extended usage scenarios, optimizing for durability, consistency, and low noise performance.

Logistics and international shipping are also factors we take seriously. We are developing protective packaging solutions and working with trusted fulfillment partners to minimize the risk of damage during transit.

projects.ai_intro_en: WildForm is a handcrafted ecosystem terrarium featuring an integrated humidity system with automated misting. It combines realistic mountain rockwork with a hidden water reservoir to create a stable, natural rainforest environment for reptiles and planted displays without the need for daily manual spraying.
ai_highlights_en: Integrated misting system with hidden reservoir maintains stable humidity automatically
Two misting modes—continuous and intermittent—for flexible plant and reptile care
Near-silent operation and natural rockscape design for undisturbed, realistic habitats
projects.ai_risks_en: Handcrafted production scaling may challenge consistent quality. Smart misting system reliability requires extended testing. International shipping poses damage risks. Unexpected delays possible, though transparent communication is promised.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: We’ve spent extensive time refining the balance between natural aesthetics and functional reliability — from handcrafted landscape structures to stable misting performance. Every detail has gone through multiple iterations to ensure it works not just as a display piece, but as a long-term living environment.
projects.ai_description_en:
WildForm is a handcrafted ecosystem terrarium designed to bring the rainforest indoors with the convenience of automated humidity control. Each unit features a sculpted mountain rockscape with a misting nozzle seamlessly embedded into the structure, eliminating the exposed spray tubes and awkward add-ons common in ordinary enclosures. The integrated water reservoir is cleverly concealed within the same rockwork, so the tank looks like a natural landscape rather than an aquarium appliance. For backers who already own a terrarium, this misting system is also offered as a standalone upgrade for custom builds.

At the heart of the design is the integrated humidity system with two programmable modes. Users can choose continuous misting for stronger humidity support or intermittent misting to create natural rainforest-style cycles that mimic day-night moisture changes. Because the misting is scheduled, it removes the need for daily manual spraying while keeping ambient conditions stable for humidity-loving reptiles, tropical mosses, and moisture-dependent plants. The pump is engineered for silent or near-silent operation, helping it stay unnoticed in quiet rooms without disturbing nocturnal pets.

WildForm is not limited to reptile keepers. It doubles as a bioscape for planted displays and tropical moss arrangements, supporting a moist microclimate that encourages healthy growth and a lush, layered appearance. Regular humidity paired with natural-looking terrain and less frequent enclosure opening creates a habitat that feels closer to an animal’s native environment while reducing routine maintenance. Refilling is simple: lift the hidden cover, add water, and close it again, keeping equipment out of sight.

# LinkHub: 4K 1-to-Multi Wireless Sync, No Wi-Fi Needed

You’re only charged if the project meets its funding goal by the campaign deadline.

10](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/1615743109/linkhub-4k-1-to-multi-wireless-sync-no-wi-fi-needed/faqs) [Updates\\

0](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/1615743109/linkhub-4k-1-to-multi-wireless-sync-no-wi-fi-needed/posts) [Comments\\

## Story

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/881/888/98a32febd0da1e9d5e06633cf8ec962c_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1779853820&width=680&sig=6V3e53ckDviphk37tLLBecQT%2BoDcxD1gHjVQQm5j4Io%3D)

Tired of This Before Every Screen Cast?

- Connecting to Wi-Fi before you can even start sharing?

- Repeatedly troubleshooting devices before a meeting begins?

- Lag, stuttering, or disconnects caused by unstable networks?

- Short HDMI cables, cluttered ports, and a messy desk setup?

- Laptop battery draining during long presentations?

What if your HDMI connection could become wireless — and one device could share content across multiple screens at the same time?

With LinkHub, screen sharing becomes simpler, cleaner, and more flexible.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/881/910/5ce4061872aa5804294ff87728c5ae20_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1779853933&width=680&sig=9PONTMn%2Fjf9soKjTsd2V7BnBytU0fbZPw%2FowRJ8rw9I%3D)

LinkHub is a hardware-based wireless screen casting system designed to work without Wi-Fi. No apps, drivers, or complicated setup required — simply plug in and connect automatically.It delivers stable low-latency transmission, clear 4K visuals, and multi-screen wireless sharing, making collaboration easier for meetings, classrooms, exhibitions, and home entertainment.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/883/217/3d6188ce1d982257295c0a088166f75f_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1779861598&width=680&sig=Fm5s%2BtniZh%2BvQgIhKwUQYF7QdUOUybUqSgdJQoCE6FE%3D)

Compatible with both USB-C and HDMI devices, LinkHub also supports up to 100W PD pass-through charging during screen casting, helping create a more efficient and streamlined wireless display experience.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/881/931/a11538ddca754c934e2dfab73c85d711_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1779854014&width=680&sig=A482%2Fn%2B6kcLjna55zwIplFEEhJcNe9XPdweNyVJbaW0%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/881/932/04aa2718514e634c7f0fc3709f22dbe7_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1779854022&width=680&sig=tE2m1qWKmCnrbwzKMurY4%2BcMtVg9tK5ZIedeuBm2aEI%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/881/936/639cf9f1f7f8547f90850b1eb772735c_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1779854031&width=680&sig=sxvNOx3u%2B0ZBFf%2FIhgfBORxjVD0PxDtgb2eT%2Bcdw2xo%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/982/770/20542e1bcd9dd3ca7a1bae7f473c8ec2_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780544361&width=680&sig=sz9Dj%2BrVF0qGAo%2FDcQ%2Bw%2BDbpYrPn5ijhcBVAzzJfLEA%3D)

LinkHub works without Wi-Fi, app downloads, or driver installation. Simply connect the transmitter to your computer and the receiver to the display for automatic screen casting. No more repeated setup, device searching, or interruptions caused by unstable network connections — making presentations and sharing easier to start.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/982/773/1d3e7b234a693d26a1e080d7a593db4e_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1780544409&width=680&sig=GD98jNb7dOd9fgh0lLWWsut6KTnWN50e1IYXq%2FWaM9A%3D)

Truly plug in, cast instantly, and enjoy a smoother, more convenient viewing experience anytime.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/881/944/158357cc052ce183082068070afb8f4f_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1779854068&width=680&sig=vA3CDn7jgkczkVtrfh77zXkOwZ3foOb7RikpdQrNLos%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/053/882/823/75ffb6ad25385b7c9c7d720eb164701d_original.png?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=100&v=1779859963&width=680&sig=XgNmMBHdX2sfyE9izB4IWEgKTV4zv%2BXbz6ANBtdDNlI%3D)

No more switching devices repeatedly or dealing with complicated cable setups.

Say Goodbye to Lag and Blurry Visuals

LinkHub uses an independent hardware-based wireless transmission architecture instead of relying on network streaming or software compression, helping reduce the latency, stuttering, and image quality loss often seen in traditional wireless screen casting.

Supports up to 4K@30Hz high-definition output, delivering clear text edges, detailed graphics, smooth video playback, and synchronized audio performance.

## Risks and challenges

espite our thorough preparations, any hardware project still faces inherent risks and challenges. In terms of production, certain components in the supply chain (such as wireless transmission chips) may experience delivery delays or price fluctuations; we have mitigated this risk through advance inventory preparation and agreements with backup suppliers. Regarding delivery and logistics, uncertainties in international freight may lead to delivery delays in some regions; we will adopt phased shipments and provide end-to-end logistics tracking.

[Learn about accountability on Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/help/hc/sections/115001107133)

## Environmental commitments

[Visit our Environmental Resources Center](https://www.kickstarter.com/environment) to learn how Kickstarter encourages sustainable practices.

### Long-lasting design

To extend the lifespan of this 4K wireless projector, we addressed the issue from the design and hardware perspectives: selecting high-quality, age-resistant electronic components and optimizing the internal heat dissipation structure to prevent long-term chip damage from overheating. Simultaneously, the device incorporates intelligent power management, automatically switching to a low-power standby mode when idle to reduce unnecessary circuit losses. Furthermore, we continuously provide OTA firmware updates to constantly optimize connection stability and power consumption strategies. Following our usage recommendations—avoiding high-temperature and humid environments and disconnecting the power supply when not in use—further ensures the product's long-term reliable operation.

### Reusability and recyclability

To reduce the amount of production materials and packaging waste ending up in landfills, we have implemented several measures from the design and supply chain perspectives. First, the main body of the product uses recyclable engineering plastics and a modular structure, which facilitates future dismantling and material recycling.

### Sustainable materials

To minimize negative environmental impact, we prioritize recyclability and low ecological footprint in our material selection. The product casing is made from post-consumer recycled (PCR) engineering plastics, ensuring structural strength while reducing the use of virgin plastics.

### Environmentally friendly factories

When selecting production partners, we not only focus on manufacturing capabilities but also conduct a comprehensive evaluation across three dimensions: environment, social responsibility, and product quality. First, we prioritize assessing whether the factory ensures compliance with environmental regulations regarding wastewater, exhaust gas, and solid waste treatment. Second, we review the factory's social responsibility compliance, including employee health and safety, working hours management, and whether it uses conflict minerals.

### Sustainable Distribution

Sustainability requires us to add extra screening and testing processes in material procurement, factory audits, and packaging, which may delay the overall delivery schedule by approximately 2-3 weeks compared to traditional solutions. However, by securing environmentally friendly material inventory in advance, signing long-term agreements with certified factories, and maintaining transparent communication with our supporters, we strive to keep the impact within a predictable range.

projects.html_story:
4K | 1-to-multi wireless sync | No Wi-Fi needed | USB-C + HDMI versions | 100W pass-through charging | 50m range | Plug & play

4K | 1-to-multi wireless sync | No Wi-Fi needed | USB-C + HDMI versions | 100W pass-through charging | 50m range | Plug & play

LinkHub X – Multi-to-One Mode

LinkHub vs LinkHub X: Choose Your Flow

Environmental commitments

Tired of This Before Every Screen Cast?

Connecting to Wi-Fi before you can even start sharing?

Repeatedly troubleshooting devices before a meeting begins?

Lag, stuttering, or disconnects caused by unstable networks?

Short HDMI cables, cluttered ports, and a messy desk setup?

Laptop battery draining during long presentations?

What if your HDMI connection could become wireless — and one device could share content across multiple screens at the same time?

With LinkHub, screen sharing becomes simpler, cleaner, and more flexible.

LinkHub is a hardware-based wireless screen casting system designed to work without Wi-Fi. No apps, drivers, or complicated setup required — simply plug in and connect automatically.It delivers stable low-latency transmission, clear 4K visuals, and multi-screen wireless sharing, making collaboration easier for meetings, classrooms, exhibitions, and home entertainment.

Compatible with both USB-C and HDMI devices, LinkHub also supports up to 100W PD pass-through charging during screen casting, helping create a more efficient and streamlined wireless display experience.

LinkHub works without Wi-Fi, app downloads, or driver installation. Simply connect the transmitter to your computer and the receiver to the display for automatic screen casting. No more repeated setup, device searching, or interruptions caused by unstable network connections — making presentations and sharing easier to start.

Truly plug in, cast instantly, and enjoy a smoother, more convenient viewing experience anytime.

No more switching devices repeatedly or dealing with complicated cable setups.LinkHub supports multi-device collaboration, allowing one transmitter to connect with multiple receivers at the same time for synchronized multi-screen display.Simply press one button for quick pairing — no Wi-Fi, no app, and no complicated configuration required.

No cables, no splitters, and no need to connect multiple screens to a single computer.Whether for meetings, training sessions, exhibitions, or collaborative work, all screens can stay synchronized with smooth and stable visuals, helping communication and presentations flow more efficiently.

Say Goodbye to Lag and Blurry VisualsLinkHub uses an independent hardware-based wireless transmission architecture instead of relying on network streaming or software compression, helping reduce the latency, stuttering, and image quality loss often seen in traditional wireless screen casting.Supports up to 4K@30Hz high-definition output, delivering clear text edges, detailed graphics, smooth video playback, and synchronized audio performance.

Say goodbye to delayed screen response.With its dedicated hardware wireless architecture, LinkHub keeps end-to-end latency controlled at a low level for a smoother and more responsive experience. Whether moving a cursor, switching slides, or streaming 4K video, interactions feel more natural and fluid, helping preserve fine visual details and smooth motion.

Stable Wireless Casting, Automatically OptimizedLinkHub features dual-band 2.4GHz + 5GHz wireless transmission that automatically switches to the best signal for smoother and more stable casting.5GHz delivers lower latency and clearer streaming, while 2.4GHz improves coverage and connection stability in complex environments.

Even in meeting rooms, classrooms, or exhibitions, LinkHub helps reduce lag and disconnections, with wireless transmission distances up to 50m in open spaces.

Dual Transmitter Versions for More DevicesType-C Version with up to 100W PD charging, plus an HDMI version designed for wider device compatibility.One receiver, two transmitter options.Laptops, tablets, smartphones, gaming consoles, and more — simply plug in and start casting.

Supports Windows, macOS, Linux, and other major platforms.No drivers, no apps — connect and start casting automatically.Compatible with laptops, tablets, and smartphones for both mirror and extended display modes.

Say goodbye to tangled HDMI cables and cluttered setups.Enjoy a cleaner and more streamlined wireless workspace.

Stay Powered During Every PresentationLinkHub supports up to 100W PD pass-through charging, keeping your device powered while wireless casting.No need to choose between charging and screen sharing.Perfect for long meetings, training sessions, and presentations with a more stable and uninterrupted experience.

The transmitter features a USB-C charging port, allowing your device to stay powered during wireless casting.Cast and charge at the same time without worrying about battery drain during meetings, presentations, or entertainment sessions.

One-Tap Wireless CastingPress once to start or stop casting instantly.No apps, drivers, or complicated setup required.Automatic pairing helps create a smoother and more reliable screen sharing experience.

Tap the center Logo button to start or stop wireless casting instantly.No drivers, complicated setup, or repeated menu switching required.

Cool, Stable, and Built for Long SessionsSmart cooling helps reduce heat buildup for smooth, low-latency wireless casting — even during extended 4K streaming, meetings, or gaming sessions.

Compared with traditional wireless casting devices that may experience overheating, lag, or unstable connections during extended use, LinkHub is designed to maintain smoother and more stable performance for long sessions.

The complete set weighs only about 60g, featuring a compact and lightweight design that easily fits into a pocket, laptop bag, or backpack for convenient everyday carry.

Whether for business trips, mobile workspaces, meeting room presentations, or quick content sharing, LinkHub is ready whenever you need it.Portable, lightweight, and ready to cast instantly — anytime, anywhere.

LinkHub X – Multi-to-One Mode

Up to 8 transmitters connect to 1 receiver. Perfect for shared meeting rooms and hot desks. One-click presenter switching. No re-pairing. Same plug-and-play, no Wi-Fi experience.

LinkHub vs LinkHub X: Choose Your Flow

Risks and challenges

espite our thorough preparations, any hardware project still faces inherent risks and challenges. In terms of production, certain components in the supply chain (such as wireless transmission chips) may experience delivery delays or price fluctuations; we have mitigated this risk through advance inventory preparation and agreements with backup suppliers. Regarding delivery and logistics, uncertainties in international freight may lead to delivery delays in some regions; we will adopt phased shipments and provide end-to-end logistics tracking.

Environmental commitments

Long-lasting design

To extend the lifespan of this 4K wireless projector, we addressed the issue from the design and hardware perspectives: selecting high-quality, age-resistant electronic components and optimizing the internal heat dissipation structure to prevent long-term chip damage from overheating. Simultaneously, the device incorporates intelligent power management, automatically switching to a low-power standby mode when idle to reduce unnecessary circuit losses. Furthermore, we continuously provide OTA firmware updates to constantly optimize connection stability and power consumption strategies. Following our usage recommendations—avoiding high-temperature and humid environments and disconnecting the power supply when not in use—further ensures the product's long-term reliable operation.

Reusability and recyclability

To reduce the amount of production materials and packaging waste ending up in landfills, we have implemented several measures from the design and supply chain perspectives. First, the main body of the product uses recyclable engineering plastics and a modular structure, which facilitates future dismantling and material recycling.

Sustainable materials

To minimize negative environmental impact, we prioritize recyclability and low ecological footprint in our material selection. The product casing is made from post-consumer recycled (PCR) engineering plastics, ensuring structural strength while reducing the use of virgin plastics.

Environmentally friendly factories

When selecting production partners, we not only focus on manufacturing capabilities but also conduct a comprehensive evaluation across three dimensions: environment, social responsibility, and product quality. First, we prioritize assessing whether the factory ensures compliance with environmental regulations regarding wastewater, exhaust gas, and solid waste treatment. Second, we review the factory's social responsibility compliance, including employee health and safety, working hours management, and whether it uses conflict minerals.

Sustainable Distribution

Sustainability requires us to add extra screening and testing processes in material procurement, factory audits, and packaging, which may delay the overall delivery schedule by approximately 2-3 weeks compared to traditional solutions. However, by securing environmentally friendly material inventory in advance, signing long-term agreements with certified factories, and maintaining transparent communication with our supporters, we strive to keep the impact within a predictable range.

Make a pledge without a reward

Back it because you believe in it.

Support the project for no reward, just because it speaks to you.

projects.ai_intro_en: LinkHub X is a hardware-based wireless screen casting system that delivers 4K@30Hz video without requiring Wi-Fi, apps, or drivers. It supports one-to-multi screen synchronization with up to 50m range and 100W PD pass-through charging, compatible with both USB-C and HDMI devices across Windows, macOS, and Linux platforms.
ai_highlights_en: True plug-and-play wireless casting with no Wi-Fi, apps, or drivers required
4K@30Hz output with low-latency hardware-based transmission and 50m range
One-to-multi screen sync with 100W PD pass-through charging during casting
projects.ai_risks_en: The product page does not explicitly disclose risks. Potential considerations include: actual range may vary in non-open environments, 4K limited to 30Hz may not suit high-frame-rate gaming, and compatibility with all device types is not guaranteed despite broad platform support.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: We are a hardware team focused on wireless screen mirroring technology. Our core members have many years of industry experience in audio and video transmission, embedded development, and consumer electronics. After multiple rounds of software and hardware iterations and real-user testing, our wireless screen mirroring device is dedicated to providing a stable, low-latency wireless display experience for office meetings, home entertainment, and educational scenarios.
projects.ai_description_en:
LinkHub is a hardware-based wireless screen casting system designed to work completely without Wi-Fi. By using an independent hardware transmission architecture instead of relying on network streaming or software compression, LinkHub delivers stable, low-latency 4K@30Hz video output along with synchronized audio across one or multiple displays. No apps, drivers, or complicated network setup are required — simply plug the transmitter into your source device and the receiver into your display for instant automatic pairing and casting.

The standout feature of LinkHub is its 1-to-multi wireless sync capability. A single transmitter can broadcast simultaneously to multiple receivers, keeping all screens synchronized with smooth, stable visuals. This makes it an ideal solution for conference rooms, training sessions, exhibitions, and classrooms where content needs to be shared across several displays at once. A single button press handles pairing, eliminating the need for device switching, cable splitters, or connecting multiple screens to one computer.

LinkHub is available in two transmitter versions — USB-C with up to 100W PD pass-through charging and HDMI for broader device compatibility — giving users flexibility across laptops, tablets, smartphones, gaming consoles, and other devices. It supports Windows, macOS, and Linux, offering both mirror and extended display modes without any driver installation. With dual-band 2.4GHz + 5GHz transmission that automatically switches to the optimal signal, LinkHub maintains smooth casting with wireless distances reaching up to 50 meters in open environments while keeping end-to-end latency controlled for responsive, natural-feeling interactions whether moving cursors, switching slides, or streaming 4K video.

LinkHub addresses common frustrations with traditional wireless screen casting: unstable networks causing lag and disconnects, messy cable setups, drained laptop batteries during long presentations, and complex device troubleshooting before meetings. By removing Wi-Fi dependency from the equation and enabling true one-device-to-multiple-screen sharing with clean 4K output, it creates a simpler, more reliable display experience for professional collaboration and entertainment alike.

projects.name: EAR-BUS A12: Your Dog Emotion Interpreter
projects.blurb: 85% Accuracy | 16 Emotional Categories | 160K Mins Training | No Subscription | 24h Battery | Lifetime Use | Cute Design | RGB Dock
projects.html_story:
85% Accuracy | 16 Emotional Categories | 160K Mins Training | No Subscription | 24h Battery | Lifetime Use | Cute Design | RGB Dock

85% Accuracy | 16 Emotional Categories | 160K Mins Training | No Subscription | 24h Battery | Lifetime Use | Cute Design | RGB Dock

OUR BREAKTHROUGH EAR-BUS A12 Understands the Whole Picture.

Your Personal AlDog Expert

Smart Comfort Musicfor Dogs

BUILT ON REALDOG DATA

Unlimited Translations No Subscription Required

High-Fidelity Audio Hardware

Adorable Pet-Style Design

Long Battery Life

Speciftications

What's in the Box?

The First Multi-Modal AI That Helps You Understand Your Dog’s Emotions.Dogs don’t communicate through barks alone.They express emotions through sound, movement, expression, and behavior.EAR-BUS A12 combines all of these signals to help you understand what your dog is really feeling.Not just listening. Seeing. Understanding. Connecting.

OUR BREAKTHROUGH EAR-BUS A12 Understands the Whole Picture.

We built the first Multi-Modal AI system designed specifically for dog emotion understanding.Instead of guessing from one bark, A12 analyzes:

Sound (barks, whines, growls)

Facial expressions

Behavioral patterns

Environmental context

A more complete and accurate understanding of your dog’s emotional state.

Upload a photo and A12 analyzes facial expressions, posture, and visual cues to understand your dog's emotions.

Video unlocks the full story.A12 analyzes movement, vocalizations, expressions, and context to detect emotional changes over time.

Captures and analyzes your dog's vocalizations in real time to detect emotional patterns.

Your Personal AlDog Expert

Built-in Al assistant specialized in dog behavior and wellness. In any pet‑related scenario, you can chat with the A12 AI agent via text or voice. Ask anything—from “Why does my dog keep licking his paw?” to “How to calm separation anxiety?”—and get thoughtful, science‑based answers.

Smart Comfort Musicfor Dogs

The A12 doesn’t just translate—it comforts. When it detects a specific emotion, it automatically plays music designed for that mood. Available on both the device and your phone.

PS：No manual intervention required. A12 automatically provides emotional support when your dog needs it most.

BUILT ON REALDOG DATA

The A12’s AI translation model is trained on sound data from the 20 most common dog breeds worldwide, allowing it to understand how different dogs express themselves in various situations.

Continuously learning from real-world canine vocalizations, A12 evolves to better understand what your dog is feeling—from excitement and happiness to hunger, anxiety, and alertness—helping transform everyday barks into meaningful emotional insights and deeper companionship.

PS: The system prioritizes identifying emotional states and behavioral intentions rather than producing literal word-for-word translations.

Unlimited Translations No Subscription Required

Many pet translation apps charge per translation or require ongoing subscriptions.The A12 is different. Once you own the device, you get unlimited bark translations—no per-use fees and no subscriptions. Simply turn it on, and it’s ready to interpret your dog’s sounds anytime.

Communication with your dog should feel natural and free, without limits or extra costs.

High-Fidelity Audio Hardware

To capture your dog’s full vocal range—from 1,120 Hz to 20 kHz—the A12 is equipped with high-performance acoustic hardware. Under normal conditions, it can pick up barks from up to 10 meters away, ensuring even the subtlest emotional changes are never missed.

Adorable Pet-Style Design

The A12 features a cute, pet-inspired design, with a rounded body and adorable ear-shaped details—making it feel like a little companion by your side.With its soft colors and clean look, it’s more than just a smart device. It’s also a charming desktop decor piece that brings a warm, relaxing touch to your desk, bedside, or living room. To complete the design, the A12 charging dock is shaped like a mini doghouse, giving the device a little home of its own.The dock features a built-in RGB ambient lighting system, with red, green, and blue gradient effects and a soft breathing light that creates a warm, relaxing atmosphere.

Long Battery Life

The A12 is powered by a built-in1000mAh battery, deliveringup to 24 hours of continuous use. Whether at home or on the go, you won’t have to worry about running out of power.

With the included 2-in-1 charging dock, simply place the device in to start charging. It supports 5V / 1.5A fast charging and reaches afull charge in about 1.5 hourswhile keeping your desk clean and organized.

Speciftications

What's in the Box?

Established on May 19, 2019, Shenzhen EAR-BUS Technology Co., Ltd. is a technology startup specializing in the design, research, development, production, and sales of TWS Bluetooth earphones, audio equipment, mobile phones, computer communication products, smart wearable devices, and related digital electronic products and accessories. With a registered capital of 20 million RMB and a 1,000-square-meter office space, the company is supported by a 25-member R&D team composed of 1 postdoctoral researcher, 1 Ph.D., and 23 bachelor's degree holders. The team brings together exceptional talent across various fields, including ID, EE, ME, and PE.

Risks and challenges

Potential challenges for the EAR-BUS A10 mainly include slight delivery delays caused by supply chain disruptions for specialized components or unexpected production bottlenecks. Any updates on production progress and delivery schedules will be promptly synced to all backers.

The proprietary AI functionality integrated into this product is independently developed by our team. We have built a dedicated AI model by training it on a large dataset of diverse dog barks, enabling accurate recognition of dog vocalizations.

All AI-related components used in this project are our proprietary assets with full ownership and usage rights.

projects.ai_intro_en: The EAR-BUS A12 is a multi-modal AI device designed to understand your dog's emotions by analyzing sound, facial expressions, behavioral patterns, and environmental context. It provides unlimited bark translations with no subscription required and automatically plays comfort music based on your dog's emotional state. Featuring a cute pet-style design with an RGB doghouse dock, it also includes a built-in AI assistant for dog behavior and wellness advice.
ai_highlights_en: Multi-modal AI analyzes sound, expressions, and behavior to understand dog emotions with 85% accuracy.
Unlimited translations with no subscription required, plus automatic comfort music for your dog.
Adorable pet-style design with an RGB doghouse charging dock and 24-hour battery life.
projects.ai_risks_en: Potential challenges include slight delivery delays due to supply chain disruptions for specialized components or unexpected production bottlenecks. The company commits to promptly syncing any updates on production progress and delivery schedules to all backers.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Shenzhen EAR-BUS Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2019, is a tech startup specializing in TWS earphones, audio equipment, smart wearables, and digital electronics, supported by a 25-member R&D team.
projects.ai_description_en:
The EAR-BUS A12 is the world’s first multi-modal AI system designed to decode your dog’s emotions, bridging the communication gap between humans and their furry companions. Dogs express themselves through more than sound—they use movement, facial expressions, and environmental context. Instead of guessing from a single bark, the A12 analyzes the whole picture, combining audio, visual cues, and behavioral patterns to deliver 85% accuracy across 16 emotional categories. This isn't about literal word-for-word translation; it’s about decoding emotional states and behavioral intentions to foster a deeper, more empathetic connection.

The A12 leverages advanced AI to interpret your dog's feelings immediately. Upload a photo to analyze facial expressions and posture, or use video to track emotional changes over time. Its high-fidelity audio hardware captures your dog’s full vocal range from 1,120 Hz to 20 kHz from up to 10 meters away. Beyond translation, A12 acts as a personal AI dog expert, offering science-based text or voice answers to wellness questions—like how to calm separation anxiety. It even provides automatic emotional support by playing smart comfort music calibrated to your dog's current mood, requiring no manual interaction.

At its core is robust, real-world dog data. Trained on 160,000 minutes of sound data from the 20 most common breeds, the AI continuously learns to better recognize emotions ranging from excitement to alertness. Unlike other pet translation apps, the A12 offers unlimited translations with no subscription requirements or per-use fees. Once you own the device, it is ready to interpret your dog’s sounds anytime, ensuring that communication feels natural and entirely free.

The A12 features a cute, pet-inspired design with rounded bodies and adorable ear-shaped details, doubling as charming desktop decor. The charging dock is shaped like a mini doghouse with an RGB ambient lighting system featuring soft breathing effects. Powered by a 1000mAh battery, the device delivers 24 hours of continuous use and reaches a full charge in just 1.5 hours via 5V/1.5A fast charging in its 2-in-1 dock.
projects.nameZh: EAR-BUS A12——狗语翻译器，85% 准确率
projects.ai_intro_zh: EAR-BUS A12 是全球首款 AI 狗吠和情绪翻译器，识别 16 种情绪，准确率 85%。
projects.ai_description_zh:
EAR-BUS A12 通过 AI 分析狗的叫声频率、音调和模式，识别 16 种情绪状态（兴奋、饥饿、焦虑、高兴等），准确率 85%。佩戴在狗项圈上。

手机应用实时显示翻译结果和情绪分析。帮助你更好地理解宠物需求，改善人宠沟通。
ai_highlights_zh: 【待翻译】Multi-modal AI analyzes sound, expressions, and behavior to understand dog emotions with 85% accuracy.
【待翻译】Unlimited translations with no subscription required, plus automatic comfort music for your dog.
【待翻译】Adorable pet-style design with an RGB doghouse charging dock and 24-hour battery life.
ai_specs_zh: 【待翻译】Training Data | 160K minutes from 20 common breeds
【待翻译】Audio Capture Range | Up to 10 meters
电池续航 | Up to 24 hours continuous use

projects.name: ADSBee Winglet!
projects.blurb: Winglet is an open source ADS-B receiver designed for portable aircraft tracking and electronic flight bag applications.
projects.hw_reason: IoT-connected aircraft tracking receiver
projects.ai_intro_en: Pants for Birds LLC is a hardware company based in Campbell, CA. We specialize in building embedded solutions for aircraft tracking, with open source schematics and firmware. Our open source ADS-B receiver project, ADSBee, has been deployed in applications ranging from industrial ground stations to weather balloons. We have fielded many requests from users of ADSBee to integrate the additional sensors required for turning it into a fully self-contained electronic flight bag receiver. After half a year of research and development, we're excited to announce the result of our efforts: ADSBee Winglet!
ai_highlights_en: Tri-band Receiver Tracks up to 400 targets simultaneously: aircraft via ADS-B using 1090 MHz Mode S + 978 MHz UAT and drones via 2.4 GHz Remote ID.
It also received FIS-B Weather and TIS-B Traffic reports via UAT.

Built for the Cockpit, Awesome Anywhere Winglet can be affixed to the inside of an aircraft for use during flight, and provides both ADS-B in and GPS position to your favorite electronic flight bag app (e.g. Foreflight, Garmin Pilot, FlyQ, Avare, and others), or use the built-in screen for additional situational awareness.
ai_specs_en: backup AHRS with onboard IMU + magnetometer attitude reference
Track logging is also provided via SD card
Cabin carbon monoxide (CO) monitoring with an audible alert for added safety
Detachable holster clip compatible with Sentry-style window mounts
Visible Day or Night Illuminated front panel with ePaper screen, with auto-dimming status lights and backlit keypad
Battery Power Done Right 12+ hours of battery life, USB-C fast charging, and a user serviceable battery - no desoldering required!
You can also power Winglet continuously via USB-C or PoE. (PoE connection requires additional accessory)
projects.ai_risks_en: Most of the risk in developing an integrated electronic flight bag receiver like ADSBee Winglet boils down to effectiveness of the core receiver technology, the manufacturing + supply chain challenge of getting the thing built, and regulatory hurdles in turning the device into a sellable product.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Pants for Birds LLC is a hardware company based in Campbell, CA. We specialize in building embedded solutions for aircraft tracking, with open source schematics and firmware.
