ai_tiers.description: You weren't early, but you're still a bird, and we've still got some worms in the back, so things are going pretty all right. This reward includes an ADSBee Winglet + optimized antennas for all 3 frequencies + holster for window mount (suction cup window-mount not included) for $445, a $50 discount off the final retail price.

projects.name: ZENCH: True 45W Cordless Ultrasonic Cutter for Makers
projects.blurb: True 45W Power | 50W Peak Output | 40kHz Ultrasonic Precision | Cordless + USB-C Power | Replaceable Battery | Active Cooling
projects.html_story:
True 45W Power | 50W Peak Output | 40kHz Ultrasonic Precision | Cordless + USB-C Power | Replaceable Battery | Active Cooling

True 45W Power | 50W Peak Output | 40kHz Ultrasonic Precision | Cordless + USB-C Power | Replaceable Battery | Active Cooling

ZENCH True 45W Cordless Ultrasonic Cutter

Cut More Materials. Make More Possible

Cordless Freedom. Plug-In Endurance

Precision for Real Making

True 45W Power. 40kHz Precision Cutting

Fast Charging. Safer Battery Control

Stay Cool. Cut Longer

Engineered From the Inside Out

One Tool. Multiple Blade Options

What's in the Box

Certified for Reliable Use

Our Launch Partners

Environmental commitments

ZENCH True 45W Cordless Ultrasonic Cutter

Not every “45W” cutter delivers true 45W performance.

ZENCH is engineered for true 45W continuous output, up to 50W peak power, and 40kHz ultrasonic precision — powered by a larger custom lithium battery system built for real-world cutting.

FCC and CE compliance documentation has been completed for added confidence.

Cleaner cuts. Better control. Real power makers can feel.

Built for Real Cutting PowerStable output. Cleaner control. Longer sessions.

Cut More Materials. Make More Possible

Real projects use more than one material.With true 45W ultrasonic power and 40kHz precision, ZENCH helps makers cut, trim, shape, and detail 3D printed parts, resin, PVC, acrylic, leather, PCB, EVA, wood, and more — with cleaner control and less cutting resistance.

Cordless Freedom. Plug-In Endurance

Use ZENCH cordless for detailed handheld work, or plug in with USB-C direct power for longer cutting sessions. With dual power support, you can keep working without being limited to battery-only operation.

Move freely. Plug in anytime. Keep cutting.

Precision for Real Making

True 45W Power. 40kHz Precision Cutting

ZENCH combines true 45W output with 40kHz ultrasonic vibration to create fast micro-cuts with less resistance. AI auto frequency tracking helps maintain stable performance as materials, pressure, and cutting conditions change.

Real power you can feel. Cleaner cuts you can see.

Fast Charging. Safer Battery Control

ZENCH supports both USB-C fast charging and dock fast charging, so you can power up quickly, charge a spare battery, and get back to cutting with less waiting.

The built-in battery safety lock keeps the battery securely connected during use, storage, and transport.

Stay Cool. Cut Longer

Active Cooling SystemDesigned to reduce heat buildup and support longer, more stable cutting sessions

Less heat. More stability. Better cutting performance.

Engineered From the Inside Out

True 45W performance starts with the right internal architecture. ZENCH uses a larger custom lithium battery module — rather than a small standard cell layout — to help deliver stable true 45W continuous output and up to 50W peak power.

One Tool. Multiple Blade Options

Different blades for different materials, details, and cutting tasks.

Cut, carve, trim, groove, and polish with blade options built for different materials and workflows.

More Tungsten Steel Blade Options. More Ways to Create.

What's in the Box

For early backers who want the core ZENCH cutting experience at the best launch price.

The complete kit for 3D printing cleanup, model making, DIY cutting, PCB trimming, leather work, PVC, acrylic, EVA, and more.

Get 2 ZENCH kits for your workshop, studio, repair bench, or maker team. Perfect for creators who want one for daily use and one as backup.

Certified for Reliable Use

FCC and CE compliance documentation for added confidence in everyday use.

Tested. Documented. Built for confidence.

Our Launch Partners

BackerRock offers ROI-guaranteed promotion for projects.

Risks and challenges

Launching a new hardware product on Kickstarter always comes with challenges, and we want to be transparent with our backers. ZENCH Wireless Ultrasonic Cutter has completed FCC and CE compliance testing, and our team has already gone through product development, prototype testing, and performance validation. However, mass production may still involve adjustments in tooling, component supply, assembly, or quality control.

International shipping may also bring uncertainties such as customs clearance delays, local regulations, logistics changes, or shipping cost fluctuations. We will work closely with our manufacturing and logistics partners to reduce these risks and keep fulfillment moving as smoothly as possible.

If anything unexpected happens, we will communicate openly through Kickstarter updates and keep backers informed about the issue, our solution, and the expected delivery timeline. Our goal is to deliver a reliable ultrasonic cutting tool and provide a clear, trustworthy experience for every backer.

I plan to use AI-generated content in my project.

What parts of your project will use AI generated content? Please be as specific as possible.

We used AI-assisted tools to help refine parts of our Kickstarter page presentation, including image background cleanup, color consistency, layout adjustment, image resizing, translation, and copywriting support.

All product photos, videos, prototypes, specifications, certifications, and functional demonstrations are based on the actual ZENCH Wireless Ultrasonic Cutter.

Do you have the consent of owners of the works that were (or will be) used to produce the AI generated portion of your projects? Please explain.

All original product photos, videos, product designs, specifications, and brand materials used in this project are owned or created by our team. AI-assisted tools were used only to refine our own materials for presentation purposes.

No third-party copyrighted product images, videos, or brand assets were used as AI-generated content without permission.

Environmental commitments

Long-lasting design

ZENCH is designed as a long-lasting tool rather than a disposable cutter. It features an aircraft-grade aluminum alloy body, replaceable battery, replaceable blades, and an active cooling system to support stable long-term use. By making the main tool reusable and serviceable, we aim to extend product life and reduce unnecessary replacement.

Reusability and recyclability

ZENCH uses replaceable blades and a replaceable battery, allowing users to maintain the tool instead of replacing the entire unit. We encourage backers to dispose of used blades, batteries, and electronic components responsibly according to local recycling and waste management regulations. We will also work to reduce unnecessary plastic in the packaging where possible.

Environmentally friendly factories

We work with manufacturing partners that follow local production, safety, and environmental regulations. During production, we aim to reduce unnecessary waste and ensure that manufacturing materials and production waste are handled according to proper factory procedures.

Sustainable Distribution

We will work with experienced logistics partners to optimize packaging size, consolidate shipments where possible, and reduce unnecessary transportation steps. Our goal is to deliver rewards safely while keeping the fulfillment process as efficient and responsible as possible.

Make a pledge without a reward

Back it because you believe in it.

Support the project for no reward, just because it speaks to you.

projects.ai_intro_en: The ZENCH True 45W Cordless Ultrasonic Cutter delivers true 45W continuous output with 40kHz ultrasonic precision for cutting 3D prints, resin, PVC, acrylic, leather, PCB, and wood. Featuring cordless freedom with USB-C plug-in endurance, a replaceable battery, and active cooling, it's engineered for real-world making with cleaner cuts and less resistance.
ai_highlights_en: True 45W continuous power with 40kHz ultrasonic precision for cutting diverse materials
Cordless freedom plus USB-C plug-in power for uninterrupted cutting sessions
Active cooling system and replaceable battery for longer, stable operation

projects.ai_risks_en: Mass production may involve adjustments in tooling, component supply, assembly, or quality control. International shipping may bring customs clearance delays, local regulations, logistics changes, or shipping cost fluctuations. The team commits to transparent communication through Kickstarter updates if issues arise.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: At ZENCH, we create high-performance tools for makers, repair work, and precision tasks. Our ultrasonic cutter delivers true 45W power, 50W peak output, and portable control for cleaner cutting. Contact us: hello@zenchcutting.com
projects.ai_description_en:
The ZENCH True 45W Cordless Ultrasonic Cutter is a precision cutting tool engineered for makers who demand real power and versatility. Unlike many cutters that claim 45W but fall short, ZENCH delivers true 45W continuous output with up to 50W peak power, driven by 40kHz ultrasonic vibration. This combination produces fast micro-cuts with noticeably less resistance, giving users cleaner edges and greater control across a wide range of materials. The tool operates cordlessly for handheld freedom or plugs in via USB-C for extended sessions, ensuring you're never limited by battery life alone.

ZENCH handles an impressive variety of materials including 3D printed parts, resin, PVC, acrylic, leather, PCB, EVA, and wood. Its AI auto frequency tracking continuously adjusts to maintain stable performance as cutting conditions change, whether you're trimming delicate details or shaping thicker stock. The active cooling system reduces heat buildup during prolonged use, supporting longer, more stable cutting sessions without performance drop-off. Multiple tungsten steel blade options let users switch between cutting, carving, trimming, grooving, and polishing tasks with a single tool.

Built around a larger custom lithium battery module rather than standard small cells, ZENCH provides the sustained power delivery that real-world cutting demands. The replaceable battery design, USB-C fast charging, and optional dock charging keep downtime minimal, while a built-in battery safety lock secures the pack during use and transport. FCC and CE compliance documentation is completed, adding confidence for everyday use. Whether you're cleaning up 3D prints, trimming PCBs, working leather, or shaping acrylic, ZENCH offers a certified, versatile cutting solution designed to perform when it matters most.

projects.name: TrackPod: Smart Tracker for Apple & Android
projects.blurb: A cross-platform item tracker with Find My & Android Find Hub support, precision finding, alerts, and 365-day battery
projects.html_story:
A cross-platform item tracker with Find My & Android Find Hub support, precision finding, alerts, and 365-day battery

A cross-platform item tracker with Find My & Android Find Hub support, precision finding, alerts, and 365-day battery

The Problem We Solved

What Makes TrackPod Different

🛡️ Never Lose Again

✨ Tiny But Mighty

🍎 Compatible with Multiple Apple Devices

🔋 Battery Life That Actually Lasts

🌍 Works for Unlimited Distance & Global Position Tracking

🔊 Find Items by Sound

🏷️ Personalize Your TrackPod

🎉 Kickstarter Special

⏳ Our Roadmap to Launch

TrackPodis the next-generation tracking device that does what AirTags couldn't: work seamlessly acrossbothAndroid and Apple ecosystems without compromise.

The Problem We Solved

You own an iPhone, your partner uses Android. Your keys disappear. Your bag gets left behind. Your wallet vanishes at the worst possible moment. Traditional trackers? They only work if everyone uses the same phone. TrackPod breaks that barrier.

What Makes TrackPod Different

Truly Universal CompatibilityTrackPod works with Apple's Find My on iPhonesandintegrates with Android's Find Hub. One device. Both platforms. No app required. Just attach and go.

Battery That Actually LastsForget annual replacements. TrackPod runs on a standard button cell battery that lasts a full365 dayswith ultra-low power consumption. When it does run out, simply pop in a new battery—no charging cables, no hassle.

Built ToughWith anIPX65 water rating, TrackPod laughs in the face of spills, splashes, and surprise rain. Whether it's in your gym bag, on your keys, or attached to your luggage, it's ready for anything.

Precision PositioningKnow exactly where your stuff is with advanced precision positioning technology. No more "somewhere in the apartment"—get the exact location.

Hear It. Find It. Keep It.TrackPod features abuilt-in speakerthat gives audible alerts when you need it. Press the Play Sound button to trigger an alert on the device. Lost your keys under the couch? Listen for the beep.

Smart RemindersTrackPod's intelligent reminder system alerts you when you're about to leave without your tracked item. Heading to the door without your bag? Your phone gets a pop-up notification before you walk out.

Rename & PersonalizeCall it "Work Keys," "Travel Bag," or "That Thing I Always Lose"—TrackPod lets you rename your device for instant recognition.

One Device, One ConnectionClean, simple, focused. TrackPod connects to one device at a time, keeping things straightforward and reliable.

In a world of complicated trackers with short battery life, platform limitations, and dependency on apps you don't want, TrackPod is refreshingly simple. It's the tracker designed forreal life—reliable, durable, inclusive, and honest about what it does.

🛡️ Never Lose Again

Smart Departure AlertsLeaving without your bag? Your keys? TrackPod alerts you with a pop-up before you walk away. It's your digital guardian.

Works EverywhereAndroid Find Hub. Apple Find My. One device. Both platforms. No app needed.

365-Day BatteryRevolutionary button-cell battery that lasts a full year. No charging. No dead batteries when you need it most.

Built ToughIPX6.5 water rating. Drop it. Spill on it. It keeps working.

Hear It. Find It.Built-in speaker + precision positioning means you'll always know exactly where your item is.

Set It & Forget ItNo app. No complicated setup. Just attach, rename, and go.

✨ Tiny But Mighty

🍎 Compatible with Multiple Apple Devices

TrackPod seamlessly integrates with your entire Apple ecosystem. Whether you're using an iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, or Mac, TrackPod connects effortlessly through Apple's Find My network.

One TrackPod. All Your Apple Devices.

Attach TrackPod to your keys, bag, or wallet, and track it from any Apple device you own. Switch from your iPhone to your iPad? No problem. Use your Apple Watch to locate your item? Done. TrackPod works across your entire Apple universe without any additional setup or app installation.

Precision Positioning Across Devices

Get real-time location data and precision positioning no matter which Apple device you're using. Your iPhone shows you the exact location. Your Apple Watch gives you direction. Your Mac keeps you updated. It's all synchronized and seamless.

Works With Find My

TrackPod taps into Apple's trusted Find My network, meaning you get the reliability and accuracy you expect from Apple, plus access to the entire network of Apple devices around you—even when your item is out of Bluetooth range.

Zero Complications

No app to download. No separate accounts. No confusing settings. Just authentic Apple integration that feels natural and works instantly.

🔋 Battery Life That Actually Lasts

365 Days of Uninterrupted Protection

TrackPod's revolutionary button-cell battery lasts a full year with ultra-low power consumption. That's 12 months of continuous tracking, alerts, and peace of mind—without a single charge.

No More Dead Batteries at Critical Moments

Forget about charging cables, power banks, or that sinking feeling when your tracker dies right when you need it. TrackPod keeps working month after month, year after year.

Simple Battery Replacement

When the year is up, simply pop out the old button cell and insert a new one. No special tools. No trips to the service center. No buying a brand new device. Just a quick, easy swap that costs just a few cents or maybe a dollar.

🌍 Works for Unlimited Distance & Global Position Tracking

Find Your Items Anywhere in the World

TrackPod isn't limited by distance. Whether your item is in the next room or on the other side of the world, TrackPod's global positioning system keeps you connected.

Unlimited Range Tracking

Forgot your bag at the airport in another city? Left your keys at a friend's house across the country? TrackPod works seamlessly across unlimited distances. There's no "out of range" with TrackPod.

Global Positioning Technology

Using advanced GPS and global network connectivity, TrackPod pinpoints your item's exact location anywhere on Earth. Real-time updates mean you always know where your belongings are, no matter how far away.

Precision Anywhere

Whether you're tracking something in your home, your city, or internationally, precision positioning technology delivers accurate location data instantly. No guessing. No approximations. Just exact coordinates.

The Peace of Mind You Deserve

In our connected world, your belongings shouldn't have boundaries. TrackPod breaks down those barriers and gives you true global protection.

Keys & WalletsNever search for your keys again. Attach TrackPod to your keychain and locate them instantly with precision positioning or the built-in speaker.

Bags & BackpacksTravel with confidence. Whether it's your daily work bag, gym backpack, or carry-on luggage, TrackPod ensures you never leave without it.

Phones & TabletsMisplaced your device? TrackPod helps you find it in seconds with audible alerts and exact location tracking.

Travel & Adventure

Luggage TrackingMonitor your suitcases at the airport. Get alerts if luggage is left behind before you walk away from the baggage claim.

Travel AccessoriesAttach to cameras, chargers, headphones, or travel essentials. Never lose travel gear again.

International TravelGlobal positioning means your items are tracked worldwide. Perfect for backpacking, business trips, or relocations.

Pet CollarsKeep tabs on your furry friends. Attach TrackPod to your pet's collar for peace of mind.

Children's ItemsMonitor backpacks, jackets, and school supplies. Get alerts if your child leaves something behind.

Valuable ElectronicsProtect laptops, cameras, and expensive gadgets with constant tracking and smart reminders.

Business & Professional

Work EquipmentTrack company laptops, equipment, and assets across offices or job sites.

Tools & GearConstruction crews and professionals can monitor expensive tools and equipment in real-time.

Delivery & LogisticsMonitor packages and shipments with precision global tracking.

Sports & Outdoor

Sports EquipmentKeep track of bikes, skis, snowboards, golf bags, and sports gear at all times.

Hiking & Camping GearAttach to backpacks, tents, or expensive outdoor equipment for adventure tracking.

Water SportsIPX65 water rating means TrackPod survives kayaking, boating, and beach adventures.

🔊 Find Items by Sound

Hear Exactly Where Your Item Is

TrackPod's built-in speaker makes finding lost items instant and effortless. Just press the play sound button and listen for the beep.

One Button. One Sound. Found.

When you need to locate your item, simply tap the play sound button on your phone or device. TrackPod immediately emits a loud, distinctive beep that cuts through noise and clutter.

Crystal Clear Audio Alerts

The speaker delivers clear, audible alerts that help you pinpoint your item's exact location. Whether it's under the couch, in the back of a closet, or buried in your bag, you'll hear it.

Perfect for Everyday Situations

Keys in the Couch: Press play sound and follow the beep

Wallet in the Jacket: Hear exactly which pocket

Phone Under Pillows: Audio alerts guide you straight to it

Bag in the Dark: The beep helps you find it without turning on lights

Items in Noise: Loud enough to hear even in busy environments

🏷️ Personalize Your TrackPod

Make It Yours with Custom Names

Rename your TrackPod to match your items and lifestyle. Call it "Work Keys," "Travel Bag," "Pet Collar," or anything you want. Instant recognition. Zero confusion.

Custom Names for Instant Identification

Instead of generic tracker #1 or #2, give each TrackPod a meaningful name. When you get an alert, you'll know exactly which item needs attention. No more guessing.

🎉 Kickstarter Special

⏳ Our Roadmap to Launch

Risks and challenges

Manufacturing & Quality Control
As with any hardware product, scaling from prototypes to mass production can present manufacturing and quality-control challenges. We are working closely with experienced suppliers and testing partners to ensure every TrackPod meets our performance and reliability standards before shipping.
Component Availability
Electronic components and batteries can occasionally experience supply-chain delays. To reduce this risk, we are sourcing from established suppliers and planning inventory in advance to help maintain our production timeline.

Shipping & Fulfillment
International shipping timelines can be affected by customs processing, carrier delays, or regional logistics disruptions. We will provide regular updates throughout production and fulfillment and will work with trusted logistics partners to deliver rewards as efficiently as possible.

Our team is committed to transparent communication and proactive planning throughout the project, and we will keep backers informed at every stage of development, production, and fulfillment.

I plan to use AI-generated content in my project.

What parts of your project will use AI generated content? Please be as specific as possible.

AI-generated content was used only for certain marketing and presentation materials within this campaign. Specifically, AI-assisted tools were used to create and enhance some promotional graphics, product renders, background visuals, and portions of the campaign video. These materials were reviewed, edited, and refined by our team before publication.

No AI-generated content was used in the design, engineering, functionality, specifications, prototyping, manufacturing, or fulfillment planning of the product. All product development decisions and technical work were completed by our team.

Do you have the consent of owners of the works that were (or will be) used to produce the AI generated portion of your projects? Please explain.

Yes. We used commercially available AI tools in accordance with their terms of service and licensing agreements. We did not intentionally use copyrighted third-party works, trademarks, or proprietary content without permission as inputs for generating campaign materials. All AI-generated graphics, renders, and video elements were created using prompts and assets that we had the right to use, and any generated content was reviewed and edited by our team before publication.

To the best of our knowledge, the AI-generated content used in this campaign complies with the applicable usage rights and licenses provided by the AI platforms used.

projects.ai_intro_en: TrackPod is a cross-platform item tracker that works with both Apple's Find My and Android's Find Hub networks. It features a 365-day battery life, IPX6.5 water rating, precision positioning, and smart departure alerts. One device works seamlessly across both ecosystems without requiring any app.
ai_highlights_en: Cross-platform compatibility: Works with Apple Find My and Android Find Hub simultaneously
365-day battery life with replaceable button cell—no charging needed
IPX6.5 water-rated with precision positioning and smart departure alerts
ai_specs_en: Apple Find My & Android Find Hub
projects.ai_risks_en: No specific risks disclosed in the campaign. As with any crowdfunding hardware project, typical risks include manufacturing delays, supply chain disruptions, and potential compatibility issues with future iOS/Android OS updates.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: building tiny experiments into real products ✦ prototype fast. launch faster. �
projects.ai_description_en:
TrackPod is a cross-platform item tracker designed to work seamlessly across both Apple and Android ecosystems — a combination most trackers simply can't offer. Compatible with Apple's Find My network and Android's Find Hub, TrackPod eliminates the platform barrier that has left mixed-device households in the lurch. No dedicated app is required; just attach it to your keys, bag, wallet, or luggage, and start tracking immediately through the native ecosystem you already use daily.

At the heart of TrackPod is a 365-day battery powered by a standard button-cell that requires no charging — swap it out when it runs low and you're back in action. Precision positioning technology guides you to your exact item rather than leaving you guessing within a general area, and a built-in speaker lets you trigger an audible alert to locate items hidden under cushions, in bags, or in pockets. Smart departure alerts notify you when you're about to leave without your tracked item, acting as a digital safety net before you walk out the door.

Built for real life, TrackPod carries an IPX6.5 water rating, shrugging off spills, rain, and sweat whether it's on your gym bag or luggage. Its compact, lightweight form factor makes it unobtrusive on everyday items, while the ability to rename each device — "Work Keys," "Travel Bag," or anything you choose — keeps your tracked items instantly recognizable. With compatibility across iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, and Mac, one TrackPod integrates effortlessly across your entire Apple setup.

TrackPod is available now on Kickstarter starting at just $25 for a single unit (Early Bird), with shipping to anywhere in the world and an estimated delivery of September 2026. For a tracker that bridges platforms, delivers a full year of battery life, asks for zero app downloads, and is built to survive daily use, TrackPod represents a refreshingly honest take on what an item tracker should be.

projects.name: DADBODD
projects.blurb: The Defenders And Disciples Behavioral Optical Decision Device (DADBODD) is a visual stimulus shot timer for firearms training.
projects.html_story:
All or nothing.This project will only be funded if it reaches its goal by Sat, July 18 2026 4:00 PM EDT.

The Defenders And Disciples Behavioral Optical Decision Device (DADBODD) is a visual stimulus shot timer for firearms training.

The Defenders And Disciples Behavioral Optical Decision Device (DADBODD) is a visual stimulus shot timer for firearms training.

All or nothing.This project will only be funded if it reaches its goal by Sat, July 18 2026 4:00 PM EDT.

Two Problems with Firearms Training

Three Versions. Thousands of Hours. One Mission

The Latest DADBODD

What the DADBODD Does

Built for the people who actually need it

Why Kickstarter?

Warranty and Repair

Two Problems with Firearms Training

1. Front Sight Focus

Most firearms training courses tell students to focus on their front sight so that the target is blurry.

However, in a real-life shooting, you need to be threat focused so that you can process the threat in real-time while also knowing when it is no longer a threat.

2. Scripted Training

Firearms training is mostly scripted.

We tell the student what the drill is, how many shots to fire, and where to shoot. They wait for the buzzer or command to fire, then they complete the drill.

No thinking. No processing. Just theatrics.

But in a real-world gunfight, you don't know how many shots you will need to fire.

I'm Taylor. Marine veteran, former police officer, and mechanical engineer.

I've spent years in the military and law enforcement, watching people train hard with the wrong tools and walk away with a false sense of readiness because of the training problems I listed above.

So I decided to create a solution.

I wanted to create anaffordable anduser-friendlyvisual stimulus shot timer so that students had to stay threat-focused and process information from the threat while shooting.

We say we shoot to stop the threat, but very rarely do we train to stop shooting when the threat stops.

So, one night, after some divine inspiration, I wired the first circuit.

That was the beginning of the Defenders And Disciples Behavioral Optical Decision Device... or.... theDADBODD

Three Versions. Thousands of Hours. One Mission

Version 1was rough. It worked, but barely.

Version 2was better and good enough to get into the hands of real instructors and start collecting real feedback.

Version 3is what you're backing today.

Every iteration was built in my office or garage, tested at the range, and refined based on what actually happened when real people used it under real conditions.

No focus groups.

No venture capital.

Just a founder with a vision who couldn't sleep until it was right.

Here's a video of me critiquing V2 and revealing V3:

The Latest DADBODD

After sending V2 out to instructors all over the U.S. to test and give me feedback, I finally was ready to build V3, which is what you are backing if you support this project.

What the DADBODD Does

The DADBODD is a handheld visual stimulus shot timer for firearms training. Instead of a beep, it uses a laser (colored light that tells you when to shoot, when to stop, and what to do in between).

It runs two modes:

DADBODD Mode— the core training tool. The laser fires a visual stimulus at a random interval. You engage based on what you see.

Shot count, reaction time, and post-threat shots are all tracked.

The device tells you how many shots you fired during the threat window and how many you fired after it ended. That last number matters more than most people realize.

DADBODD mode can be used via Manual fire where someone controls when the laser turns on/off, or in Auto mode for solo training where the laser fires randomly.

Shot Timer Mode— a full-featured traditional shot timer built right in. Par times, mic sensitivity adjustment, review mode. Everything you'd expect from a standalone timer, in the same device.

MANTIS Mode— The DADBODD also works with MantisX training systems.

One tool. Three training systems. $199.

Built for the people who actually need it

This isn't a gimmick or a range toy.

It's for the concealed carrier who takes their responsibility seriously. The officer who wants to train smarter between qualifications. The instructor who wants to run decision-making drills without a $1,000 piece of equipment.

The DADBODD is patent pending.

It has been tested in the field by working instructors. And it was built by someone who has stood in the situations this device trains for.

Why Kickstarter?

I didn't want to build a product without first proving the market existed. The performance of this Kickstarter project will dictate whether that market exists.

I spent the last year getting feedback from instructors and individual users just like you to ensure I provide the product you want, not the product I think you want.

I'm not a corporation. I'm a founder building this by hand in Tennessee. Kickstarter is how I fund the first production run and get the DADBODD into the hands of the people who need it most.

85 people and counting have already put money down before this campaign even launched. These are our DADBODD Pre-Launch VIPs. They believed in this before there was a Kickstarter page, a video, or a polished product photo.

If you train with a gun, or if you care about someone who does, this is the tool that's been missing.

Support the DADBODD Kickstarter.

Train to a Higher Standard.

Warranty and Repair

Life happens. Here's how we handle it if life happens to your DADBODD.

Every DADBODD comes with a 1-year Limited Warranty covering manufacturing defects, workmanship issues, and firmware faults. If your unit fails due to a manufacturer's defect during that year, we'll repair or replace it at no charge.

What's covered:

Defects in materials and workmanship

Firmware bugs and faults affecting normal operation

Battery failure (6 months from delivery)

What's NOT covered:

Drops, impacts, gunshots, burns, or other physical damage

Water, moisture, or liquid exposure

Damage from solvents, unapproved cleaners, fuels, sunscreens, or insect repellents

Heat damage from being left baking in a vehicle on a hot day or baking in the sun.

Any disassembly of the device voids the warranty entirely, regardless of the original cause of the issue

Modifications, unauthorized firmware, modifying the firmware, or third-party repair attempts

Normal cosmetic wear and tear

When something breaks that's not covered - "DADBODD Makeover" Repair Service:

Dropped it on the concrete and cracked the body? Left it in a hot truck all day? Give it to a Marine and they broke it? Sometimes life beats up your gear. If your DADBODD is damaged in a way that's outside the warranty, we offer a flat-rate repair service:

Most damage is repairable (even damage done by a Marine). If a unit is beyond economic repair, we'll let you know and offer options.

How the DADBODD Makeover works:

Email me atTaylor@DefendersAndDisciples.comwith your serial/order number, description of the issue, and photos/videos.

We review your photos/videos and provide an initial assessment.

If repair looks viable, we'll provide an RMA number for a $50 diagnostic/repair fee, and ship-to address.

You pay the diagnostic/repair fee and ship the device to us (insured, tracked shipping recommended).

We diagnose the damage and send you a repair quote. The $50 diagnostic fee applies toward the final repair cost.

If you approve the quote, we repair or replace at our discretion and ship the device back (you cover return shipping).

If you decline repair, we return the device at your cost or scrap it with your permission. The diagnostic fee is non-refundable and retained as payment for our assessment.

Typical turnaround: 2-4 weeks from receipt of approved work.

Full Limited Warranty terms:https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vT893Je95-0vasyiWjcedQDkfEhybCPxKbOzSWp7JF-cNMTu-gYdqbHNKwkF9DimIzZb2FL4KAnERY0/pubQuestions:Taylor@DefendersAndDisciples.com

Risks and challenges

The DADBODD is a first production run from a small founder-operated company. Here's what you should know upfront.

Hardware: This is not experimental technology. The device has been range tested and is functionally complete.

Compliance: FDA CDRH laser product registration is in process. FCC compliance documentation is being finalized. Both will be completed before any units ship.

Timeline: I'm building and fulfilling these units myself in TN. I've accounted for component lead times and have sourced suppliers. If anything impacts the timeline, I will communicate with backers immediately and publicly.

Large Scale Production: If the DADBODD Kickstarter project goes exceptionally well and we have way more orders than I can reasonably assemble on my own, we will explore other means for manufacturing. However, you will still receive a DADBODD that performance equal or better than the current version. 

I'm not a corporation with a warehouse. I'm a Marine veteran and former cop who built this because the training tool I needed didn't exist at a price real people could afford. I will do whatever it takes to deliver every unit on time.

COVERAGE & DELIVERY RISK

Every DADBODD ships with a 1-year Limited Warranty 
against manufacturing defects, plus a flat-rate repair 
service for damage outside warranty coverage. Full 
warranty terms are available at:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vT893Je95-0vasyiWjcedQDkfEhybCPxKbOzSWp7JF-cNMTu-gYdqbHNKwkF9DimIzZb2FL4KAnERY0/pub


I have built and tested working prototypes with active 
military, law enforcement, and instructor contacts. The 
hardware and firmware are mature. I've manufactured 
small batches successfully and have validated our 
production process.

That said, hardware manufacturing at scale carries real 
risks: supply chain delays, quality control issues at 
volume, and the possibility of defects that don't show 
up until units are in customer hands. We've reserved a 
portion of pledge funds specifically to address quality 
issues, support, and warranty claims after delivery. 
We are not spending 100% of pledge revenue on production.

If a defect emerges that affects multiple units, our 
commitment is straightforward: we will communicate 
openly with backers, repair or replace affected devices 
at no charge, and resolve the issue. Honest 
communication is the standard we hold ourselves to.

I've built this device because I believe in it. I'm 
in this for the long term. DADBODD is the start of 
a product line, not a one-time campaign.

Make a pledge without a reward

Back it because you believe in it.

Support the project for no reward, just because it speaks to you.

projects.ai_intro_en: The DADBODD is a handheld visual stimulus shot timer for firearms training that uses a laser instead of an audio beep to cue shooters. It helps students stay threat-focused and process information while shooting, tracking shot count, reaction time, and post-threat shots. The device runs three modes: DADBODD Mode, Shot Timer Mode, and MANTIS Mode.
ai_highlights_en: Visual stimulus shot timer using laser cues instead of audio beeps for threat-focused training
Tracks shot count, reaction time, and post-threat shots to improve decision-making under stress
Three training modes in one device: DADBODD, Shot Timer, and MANTIS compatibility for $199
ai_specs_en: DADBODD Mode, Shot Timer Mode, MANTIS Mode
Manual fire and Auto mode with random laser intervals
Par times, mic sensitivity adjustment, review mode
Taylor, Marine veteran, former police officer, mechanical engineer
projects.ai_risks_en: This is an all-or-nothing campaign that must reach its goal by July 18, 2026 or it won't be funded. The creator is a solo founder building by hand, which may pose production and fulfillment risks. The warranty excludes physical damage, water exposure, and solvent damage.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: Taylor is a Marine veteran, former police officer, and mechanical engineer building the DADBODD by hand in Tennessee.
projects.ai_description_en:
The DADBODD (Defenders And Disciples Behavioral Optical Decision Device) is a visual stimulus shot timer designed to fix two critical flaws in conventional firearms training. Most courses teach students to focus on their front sight while the target goes blurry—fine for marksmanship, but counterproductive when real threats demand constant situational awareness and split-second decision-making. Meanwhile, heavily scripted drills tell shooters exactly how many rounds to fire and when, eliminating the cognitive processing required in actual defensive encounters. The DADBODD forces users to remain threat-focused, interpret visual cues from the target, and exercise judgment about when to engage and—crucially—when to stop shooting once the threat has been neutralized.

This is not experimental technology. The current device is the product of thousands of hours of iterative development across three versions, refined through real-world testing with active military, law enforcement, and firearms instructor contacts. The hardware and firmware are mature, range tested, and functionally complete, meaning backers receive a training tool built on validated engineering rather than an unproven prototype. The project is led by Taylor, a Marine veteran, former police officer, and mechanical engineer who created the DADBODD after watching people train hard with inadequate tools and walk away with a false sense of readiness. This first production run is built and fulfilled personally in Tennessee by the founder himself, not a corporate warehouse.

Two reward tiers are available: the base DADBODD at $199 includes one device in all black with an instruction manual, while the $299 Range Kit adds a color upgrade, Swiss Arca mount, retroreflective panel, and hard case for a complete training setup. Both tiers ship to the United States only with an estimated October 2026 delivery. Every unit ships with a 1-year Limited Warranty against manufacturing defects, plus a flat-rate repair service for damage outside warranty coverage, and the founder has reserved a portion of pledge funds specifically for post-delivery quality support and warranty claims. FDA CDRH laser product registration and FCC compliance documentation are being finalized and will be completed before any units ship. This campaign represents the beginning of a product line, not a one-time project—built by someone who has been in the trenches and refuses to let backers down.

projects.name: TruGuard Horizon 8
projects.blurb: Truly offline vault for confidential access phrases, credentials, and sensitive data. No Wi‑Fi. No Bluetooth. Your data stays yours.
projects.html_story:
Truly offline vault for confidential access phrases, credentials, and sensitive data. No Wi‑Fi. No Bluetooth. Your data stays yours.

Truly offline vault for confidential access phrases, credentials, and sensitive data. No Wi‑Fi. No Bluetooth. Your data stays yours.

TruGuard Horizon 8

The Problem: We’ve Become Renters of Our Digital Lives

The Night Everything Changed

Meet TruGuard Horizon 8

Designed for True Ownership

How TruGuard Horizon 8 Compares

Data Moves Only When You Decide

One Place For Everything Important

Own Your Credentials

Own Your Identity

Own Your Financial Records

Own Your Memories

Own Your Thoughts

Ownership Should Survive Disaster

Take Back Ownership

Environmental commitments

TruGuard Horizon 8

Your Data. Your Control. Your Ownership.Own Your Digital Life

We live in a world where our most important information is scattered everywhere. Some of it sits in cloud accounts. Some of it lives inside apps. Some of it is stored on servers we’ve never seen, owned by companies we’ll never meet.

Your photos. Your passwords. Your confidential access phrases. Your documents. They should belong to you — not to a service provider or a subscription platform.

For years, convenience has been sold to us as ownership. Upload your files. Sync your devices. Trust the cloud.

But storing your information somewhere doesn’t mean you control it.

Real ownership means choosing where your data lives, who can access it, and whether it remains yours even if the internet goes down.

That belief is what led us to createTruGuard Horizon 8, a dedicated offline vault built around one simple idea:

Your data should stay in your hands.

No cloud accounts.

No subscriptions.

No hidden connections.

Just you and the information that matters most.

The Problem: We’ve Become Renters of Our Digital Lives

We own our homes.We own our cars.We own our passports and our wallets.

Yet somehow, the information that defines our lives is stored somewhere else.

Our photos are online.Our documents are online.Our passwords are online.Even our memories are online.

We trust companies to store and protect the most personal parts of our lives. Most of the time it works — until it doesn’t.

Accounts get compromised.Services shut down.Policies change.Data breaches happen.Access disappears.

If someone else controls where your data lives, do you truly own it?

We believe ownership should still exist in the digital world. And ownership begins with control.

The Night Everything Changed

For years, I avoided storing sensitive information online. I kept everything offline — confidential access phrases, personal documents, backups, and private records.

Hard drives.Memory cards.Paper copies.Locked drawers.

I thought I was doing the right thing.

Then one night at 3:00 AM, a fire broke out in the condo above mine. My family evacuated immediately.

Standing outside watching smoke pour out of the building, I realized something I had never considered:

My entire digital life was inside that apartment.

Passports.Important documents.Photos. Backups. Everything.

I had protected my information from the internet, but not from disaster.

That moment changed everything.

The world seemed to offer only two choices:1. Store everything online and give up control,or2. keep everything offline and risk losing it all.

Neither option felt acceptable.

I wanted something better — a way to keep my information truly mine without depending on the cloud.

That idea becameTruGuard.

Meet TruGuard Horizon 8

A Personal Offline Vault for Your Digital Life

Horizon 8 isn’t a cloud service. It isn’t a subscription. It isn’t a general‑purpose tablet.

It’s a dedicated device built for one purpose:keeping your most important information under your control.

You can store and organize:

confidential access phrases

identity documents

financial records

private contacts

photos and audio recordings

sensitive files

Everything stays in one place. Accessible when you need it. Protected when you don’t.

Designed for True Ownership

Most devices are built around constant connectivity — syncing, sharing, notifications, and cloud services.

We took the opposite approach.

We asked a simple question:

What if a device never needed to connect to anything?

That question shaped every design decision.

You Control Where Your Data Lives

Your information stays on a device you physically own. If it’s in your hand, your data is in your possession.

You Control When Data Moves

Nothing happens unless you decide:

No background syncing.

No automatic uploads.

Every transfer is intentional.

You Control Who Has Access

No WiFi hardware.

No Bluetooth hardware.

No cloud connectivity.

No remote access capability.

Your vault cannot be reached through the internet because it hasno internet connection.

You Can Verify What We Built

We physically removed wireless hardware. Open the device. Inspect the board. Verify it yourself.

Transparency is part of ownership.

How TruGuard Horizon 8 Compares

Data Moves Only When You Decide

Most technology companies want your information constantly moving — uploading, syncing, sharing, backing up.

Horizon 8 does the opposite. If you don’t initiate a transfer, nothing happens.

A Micro‑SD card acts as a physical bridge between your vault and the outside world.

Only when you choose.

If you do nothing, your data stays exactly where it is.

The Micro-SD card acts as a physical bridge between your vault and the outside world.Create backups.

Transfer files.

Only when you choose.

If you do nothing, nothing happens.

That level of control simply does not exist in cloud‑based systems.

One Place For Everything Important

Most people scatter their sensitive information across dozens of apps, accounts, and devices.

Passwords in one place.

Documents in another.

Confidential access phrases hidden somewhere else.

Photos spread across multiple platforms.

It creates confusion and unnecessary risk.

TruGuard brings everything together in one private vault:

One secure location.

One source of truth.

Own Your Credentials

Your passwords unlock your digital life. Many password managers rely on cloud infrastructure.

Horizon 8 keeps your password database entirely offline:

No external accounts.

Just your credentials stored in a vault you physically control.

Own Your Identity

Birth certificates.

Government identification.

Travel documents.

These records define who you are.

Horizon 8 lets you store secure digital copies in a place that remains entirely under your control, not on a connected device or third‑party service.

Own Your Financial Records

Financial information is among the most sensitive data you have.

Store card details, account references, banking contacts, and emergency information in a dedicated offline vault.

Accessible when needed.

Protected from online threats.

Secured through physical possession and encryption.

Own Your Memories

Your photos tell the story of your life.

Many people unknowingly surrender control of those memories to cloud platforms.

Horizon 8 gives your personal media a private home where ownership remains exactly where it belongs -with you.

Own Your Thoughts

Personal records.

Journal entries.

Some information is meant only for you.

Horizon 8 gives those thoughts a private place where confidentiality stays in your hands.

Ownership Should Survive Disaster

Keeping information offline is only half the solution. You also need a way to recover if something happens to the device.

Horizon 8 includes a backup and restoration system designed for independence.

Create an encrypted backup.

Store it somewhere safe.

If your device is ever lost or damaged, you can restore everything onto another Horizon 8 using your original passphrase.

No online account required.No recovery service needed.No company approval involved.

Your information remains yours — even when the unexpected happens.

Take Back Ownership

The internet changed how we store information. Now it’s time to rethink who controls it.

TruGuard Horizon 8 was built for people who believe their most important data should belong to them and no one else.

No cloud dependence.

No hidden connections.

No recurring fees.

Just true ownership of your digital life.

Your Data. Your Control. Your Ownership.

Back TruGuard Horizon 8 today and help bring digital ownership back where it belongs..

Risks and challenges

Building hardware is never simple, and we want to be transparent about that.

We already have working prototypes, manufacturing partnerships, and the core software platform in place. However, hardware production can still be affected by component availability, testing timelines, and supply chain delays.

Our current focus is final hardware validation and firmware stress testing to ensure TruGuard meets the reliability and security standards we designed it for.

Throughout the process, we are committed to keeping our backers informed with honest and transparent updates.

I plan to use AI-generated content in my project.

What parts of your project will use AI generated content? Please be as specific as possible.

Some visual assets, product mockups, and the voice‑over narration in the project video were created using generative AI tools. These elements are used only for presentation and storytelling. The hardware, firmware, and product design shown in the campaign are real and demonstrated through actual footage of the working device.

Do you have the consent of owners of the works that were (or will be) used to produce the AI generated portion of your projects? Please explain.

All AI‑generated content was created using tools and models that allow commercial use. No copyrighted or third‑party protected material was used as input without permission. All hardware, software, and design elements shown in the project belong to  True Guard Technologies Corp.

I am incorporating AI in my project in another way.

AI tools were used to assist with generating narration and some visual elements for the campaign presentation. These tools were not used to design, engineer, or build the product itself. The device, its hardware, and its functionality are fully real and shown through authentic footage.

Environmental commitments

Long-lasting design

By removing connectivity, we eliminate dependency on cloud ecosystems and forced upgrade cycles.

Reusability and recyclability

Most modern devices are designed around constant connectivity, endless syncing, and rapid upgrade cycles.

TruGuard was designed differently.

Because the device operates fully offline, it is not dependent on cloud ecosystems, background services, or constantly changing online platforms to remain functional. This allows the device to stay useful for years without becoming obsolete due to shifting software ecosystems.

The hardware is intentionally built for long-term reliability and everyday durability. By removing unnecessary wireless systems and high-cycle background activity, the device experiences less strain than traditional connected devices.

At the end of its life-cycle, the hardware can be processed through standard electronic recycling programs.

Make a pledge without a reward

Back it because you believe in it.

Support the project for no reward, just because it speaks to you.

projects.ai_intro_en: TruGuard Horizon 8 is a dedicated offline vault designed to keep your most sensitive data—like access phrases, credentials, and financial records—completely under your control. By physically removing all Wi-Fi and Bluetooth hardware, the device ensures your information cannot be accessed remotely or compromised online. Data transfers happen only when you intentionally use a Micro-SD card, guaranteeing that your digital life remains truly yours without cloud dependencies or subscriptions.
ai_highlights_en: Truly offline design with physically removed Wi-Fi and Bluetooth hardware for maximum security.
Complete data ownership with no cloud accounts, subscriptions, or automatic background syncing.
Intentional data transfer via Micro-SD card, ensuring information moves only when you decide.
ai_specs_en: Openable to inspect board and verify no wireless hardware
Access phrases, credentials, identity documents, financial records, photos, audio
projects.ai_risks_en: The primary risk is physical loss or damage to the device itself, as it lacks cloud backups by design. Users must manually manage Micro-SD card backups to prevent data loss from disasters like fire or theft. Additionally, the lack of wireless connectivity means data retrieval is strictly manual, which may be inconvenient for users accustomed to instant cloud access.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: An individual who experienced a devastating fire that destroyed their offline data, leading them to create a secure, offline vault solution.
projects.ai_description_en:
TruGuard Horizon 8 is a dedicated offline vault designed to reclaim true ownership of your digital life. In an era where we are merely renters of our own data—storing photos, passwords, and documents on servers owned by third parties—the risk of compromised accounts, changing policies, and sudden service shutdowns is ever-present. Furthermore, as the creator discovered firsthand when a 3:00 AM condo fire threatened to destroy years of offline backups, entirely disconnecting from the internet offers no protection against physical disaster. Horizon 8 bridges this gap, providing a secure, physical sanctuary for your most sensitive information that does not rely on the cloud to exist or the internet to survive.

Designed for true ownership, this device operates on a simple but radical principle: it never needs to connect to anything. With no Wi-Fi and no Bluetooth, your data moves only when you decide. The TruGuard Horizon 8 serves as one centralized place to store and organize confidential access phrases, credentials, identity documents, financial records, private contacts, photos, audio recordings, and sensitive files. By stripping away constant connectivity, syncing, and subscriptions, the device ensures your information remains completely under your control, eliminating hidden connections and keeping your digital life firmly in your hands.

Backed by working prototypes, established manufacturing partnerships, and a core software platform, the project is currently focused on final hardware validation and firmware stress testing to guarantee reliability and security. For backers, the TruGuard Horizon 8 is available at a Kickstarter Special price of $249 USD (MSRP $299 USD), or an Early Bird Special of $229 USD, both including a 1-year limited warranty. While hardware production can face challenges like component availability or supply chain delays, the team is committed to transparent, honest updates throughout the process. Estimated delivery is October 2026, offering a timely solution for anyone ready to take back control.

projects.blurb:
After the successful Phase 1 launch of the RAYD8® platform including the additions of RAYD8® HAMSA, and AMRITA (debuting June 1st), we are now entering the final phase of our journey:

RAYD8® PRIME

The next-generation evolution of personalized resonance and rejuvenation technology.

Built upon the success of the original RAYD8® platform, Prime is designed to become our most advanced and immersive wellness environment ever created — introducing AI personalization, adaptive rejuvenation experiences, guided restoration systems, advanced resonance technologies, and future commercial wellness center integration.

Accessible across mobile, tablet, desktop, and Smart TV, RAYD8® Prime is being designed to support restoration, relaxation, vitality, focus, and optimized states of being through customizable resonance environments unlike anything currently available.

Thanks to the incredible support of our first campaign, RAYD8® became a reality.

Now, with your help, we’re ready to complete the vision.

Join us in bringing the future of personalized rejuvenation technology to life.

It introduces AI personalization, adaptive rejuvenation experiences, guided restoration systems, and advanced resonance technologies accessible across mobile, tablet, desktop, and Smart TV.

projects.name: H.A.M.U. high-accuracy measurement unit
projects.blurb: The HAMU are designed for measurement of the DC, low frequency, pulse, and stepped signals of voltage with a high signal-to-noise ratio while operating over a wide range of ambient temperatures. It is a universal small-sized sealed unit with external functional connectors. HAMU can be used as an independent device and as part of high-accuracy and/or high-sensitive measurement systems. It was created to make high-accuracy measurement not only affordable and easy to use, but also an excellent tool for anyone interested in measurement electronics.
projects.html_story: Project storyCreatorLeonFrancmore infocontactCategoryProductivityTagsarduinobatteriescomputersdronese-bikesiotlaptopspcprofessionalrobotssensorsmart homestudentsBacking informationCrowdfunding riskslearn moreWe are a small international team of professional electronic engineers and we were not satisfied with the existing commercial modules with high-resolution ADC.The goalof our project is to create a new segment of measurement devices that implement the maximum functionality of ADCs, an efficient design and high-accuracy comparable to reference voltmeters.The motivationfor creating HAMU was the lack of low-cost technical means on the market for measuring and analyzing signals from highly sensitive detectors, low-noise electronic circuits, and systems with a small output voltage increment, while having a compact design and the ability to reconfigure operating algorithms to create precision electronic devices(for example, diagnostic systems for the condition of moving parts of high-speed passenger trains, compressors, turbines, aircraft engines; systems for searching for ultra-small leaks and predicting dangerous situations in infrastructure gas networks, analyzing the tightness of spacecraft and vacuum equipment; magnetometric and seismometric equipment for studying rocks, predicting dangerous phenomena during mining operations; hydroacoustic devices for searching for underwater objects or orienting underwater vehicles).Theconceptof the project is to provide the user with an adaptive tool to solve their technical problems. Firstly, there are no internal amplifiers in HAMU.This is because the use of a specific amplifier type is an individual decision for many projects, and the high-accuracy of HAMU allows measurement of the output signals of some detectors and circuits in direct with a high signal-to-noise ratio. Secondly, HAMU allows measurement the noise spectral density. This is an important function for determining the optimal measurement technique based on the analysis of output signals from sensors and electronic circuits connected to the unit. This is an important function for determining the optimal measurement technique based on the analysis of output signals from sensors and electronic circuits connected to the unit. Thirdly, HAMU has two data input/output ports (USB and UART). The selection of the input signals conversion algorithm is carried out using the “mode selection connector”, commands from a personal computer, portable devices, or an external controller at the discretion of the user. The conversion mode parameters (each algorithm has default parameters) are set using specific commands from external devices, as is the subsequent data output. Fourthly, the creation of a personal measurement method and an algorithm for converting data into digital form will be available to all HAMU users in the future.

projects.ai_intro_en: HAMU is a new segment of precision measurement devices created by a team of professional electronic engineers. These compact, reconfigurable devices implement maximum ADC functionality with high-accuracy comparable to reference voltmeters, designed for measuring signals from sensitive detectors and low-noise circuits.
ai_highlights_en: High-resolution ADC with accuracy comparable to reference voltmeters
Compact, reconfigurable design for precision electronic devices
Ideal for sensitive detectors, low-noise circuits and small voltage increments
ai_specs_en: Diagnostic systems, leak detection, magnetometric/seismometric equipment
Engineers, students, IoT, drones, robotics, smart home, e-bikes
projects.ai_risks_en: Hardware crowdfunding project with inherent risks including manufacturing delays, component sourcing challenges, and potential changes to final specifications. Backers should be aware that delivery timelines may shift.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: LeonFranc is a small international team of professional electronic engineers specializing in high-resolution ADC measurement devices.
projects.ai_description_en:
**HAMU** (High-Accuracy Measurement Unit) is a new class of precision measurement device designed for engineers, researchers, and developers who need accurate signal analysis without a costly overhead. Created by an international team of professional electronic engineers, HAMU addresses a clear gap in the market: there have been no low-cost, compact solutions for measuring and analyzing signals from highly sensitive detectors, low-noise electronic circuits, and systems with very small voltage increments — until now. Built around the idea of maximizing the functionality of high-performance analog-to-digital conversion, HAMU delivers accuracy and versatility that can approach that of reference voltmeters, while remaining adaptive enough to become the core of custom precision instruments.

What sets HAMU apart is its philosophy of simplicity and flexibility. First, there are no internal amplifiers — a deliberate omission that lets designers pair their own optimal gain stage with HAMU’s high-precision signal path, and still measure low-amplitude detector outputs directly with a high signal-to-noise ratio. Second, HAMU includes noise spectral density measurement as a core capability, enabling users to evaluate sensor and circuit noise characteristics and choose the best measurement technique for a given application. Third, HAMU can be configured via USB or UART ports and a “mode selection connector,” with each conversion algorithm offering default parameters that can be adjusted by commands from a PC, portable device, or external controller — giving users full control over how signals are acquired, converted, and output.

HAMU is designed as a universal, reconfigurable tool for a remarkably broad range of precision measurement tasks: from monitoring vibration and wear in high-speed train components, turbines, and aircraft engines, to detecting micro-leaks in gas infrastructures and spacecraft, to supporting magnetometric, seismometric, and hydroacoustic research and navigation systems. For projects in e-bikes, drones, robotics, IoT, smart home, audio, or industrial automation, HAMU provides a single platform that can be tailored to complex sensor interfaces and data logging setups. Available in multiple models and limited quantities at $699 and $889 price points, HAMU empowers engineers to build sophisticated measurement systems without designing every component from scratch — bringing reference-class accuracy to compact, everyday development and field deployments. A future update also aims to make personal measurement methods and custom conversion algorithms available directly to the HAMU user community, reinforcing its role as a living, evolving platform for precision instrumentation.

## Story

### Introducing EVERLITE

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/478/1ef8ec31428600c38fd982acb88824e3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781760949&width=680&sig=yH%2FeCfXHzafJl2eVs0Yzndg%2Bmwb3B%2Fl9i8zVAiARkK4%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/193/54e38d9a961cc7f36b678cdb2f6fecf2_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232187&width=680&sig=5o3pT54tvz3jqLBdO982al%2FEQr0TP17YQnl5O4liKgY%3D)

### One Lighting Tool. Complete Experiences.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/487/68b9a8f06085655e55c9bb9fc75d6c98_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761024&width=680&sig=e5tm1RSgOTYlIbb%2F3K44xW6cReFCr4s1IPPwiqwuS14%3D)

Most flashlights are designed for brightness alone. But when you are inside a tent, reading before sleep, sharing a campsite table, or relaxing outdoors, brightness is not enough — comfort matters too.

EVERLITE was created to completely rethink outdoor illumination — combining

soft natural lighting, immersive ambiance, and wide-area visibility into one compact

everyday carry tool.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/212/061f7618171f11b98d1963dd095eb0c0_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232395&width=680&sig=N7nPdGnLhoIymmzHhfbJHEJNViO%2BKmhBN2WLNUdKbIU%3D)

### Superior Brightness Performance

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/489/622dcd7129631fdd5f224142bfa4efc6_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761053&width=680&sig=gU4IIWG1B7QkGnMykLvEA94pKNDWWBiXZJnU5KqctlM%3D)

EVERLITE is built for actual outdoor use.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/223/db599f822231b70bcbafdf4cc38346b3_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232533&width=680&sig=Glcs9usf83ROZk9dUlfnJ2PhrO4aSlYTwCuACzsAX8w%3D)

#### 3 Daily Modes:

With three adjustable brightness settings, the TwiLite lets you tailor the light output to your needs. A single press of the button cycles through Low, Medium, and High modes, providing optimal illumination for everyday tasks.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/226/af38ef2ce124d61dd2c28cfab6dacdc4_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232576&width=680&sig=gd7UsBiWT62qXPAUjq%2F079Jat%2BOaUGhx0%2BXnk5f3OnA%3D)

#### Strobe Modes:

When things get intense, rely on Ultra-High and Strobe modes, delivering up to 300 lumens. Whether you’re facing an emergency or navigating tough terrain, these modes ensure you're ready for any challenge.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/231/9283e2c4642bf2b8742a6ff9aa10aff0_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232631&width=680&sig=N2t0I1JzPMSV6%2BIFcDYlOpEFkPa2JGHZ%2Fbnc7hDzCoE%3D)

#### 100m Long-Distance Beam

Its main light delivers a crisp 5000K white beam with a beam distance of up to 100 meters, helping you see farther on trails, around campsites, and in low-visibility environments.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/240/dd713ca7975f0cf550def9582a108b80_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232711&width=680&sig=cIarZSitFYrLPBjd%2B%2FLMWKtHqpfp36am0IZBhGBL9XM%3D)

### 360° Soft Natural Light

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/491/f4c51e8621b6d4a74af2293c83f2bd24_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761072&width=680&sig=bkC6%2FuhVSnOHbvLDjhteiV1QzkurJ5eym1KZJkZ9PKY%3D)

Traditional flashlights create intense hotspots and hard-edged shadows that quickly cause eye fatigue. EVERLITE distributes light evenly across your environment, reducing glare while improving overall visibility. Instead of forcing your eyes to constantly adapt between darkness and concentrated brightness, EVERLITE creates a softer visual transition that feels significantly more natural outdoors.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/249/bc594d442052b7c0c06314009035bfb7_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232771&width=680&sig=UwyAUPYLpvexe%2BsZtybwEq6oyOzdHsaH3FW9n%2Bz4IqQ%3D)

EVERLITE uses high-color-rendering LEDs that restore more realistic colors and textures — making food look warmer, skin tones look healthier, and campsites feel more alive.

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/263/109f5f378ea1065cc0b75d33a8b42d57_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232815&width=680&sig=ks2Qv%2FxvUgksEBtjzWRgMxDSnDxzaR7VxYWIffGvjNc%3D)

EVERLITE helps colors appear more natural and recognizable compared with low-CRI lighting. This is especially useful when cooking outdoors, reading, organizing gear, taking photos, or creating a more natural campsite atmosphere.

### Fantasy RGB for Campsite Atmosphere

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/530/6e40040bec24d1ea1be995ef98edfd26_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761328&width=680&sig=acf4gtTKBqVdCsyjgwAljfhcmsDFTm6giDxyrJv2xLM%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/295/747405da943cf7970097897420e03d23_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781232989&width=680&sig=%2FWd9s2cpavz91D2vSWO1rtBQk0T6tC56%2Bb1kI7u8FO4%3D)

EVERLITE is also a mood maker. The RGB taillight features multiple atmospheric modes designed to transform your campsite, tent, backyard, or nighttime setup.

### White-Light Modes for Any Tasks

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/534/42d92b1568590fe36ae7c86ded75576d_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761353&width=680&sig=mi04jX8cFOuj2jLHMmOr66JuYaeh4utWLX4aFZuC2nU%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/302/433ffbbd3d834c6f5e9f730b5caab855_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781233041&width=680&sig=zCILXAcHtC621aCukOsUPNT5MsodwRjXUaIU7Me3uuo%3D)

The taillight of EVERLITE gives you three practical white-light experiences:

2700K Warm White

For relaxing, winding down, and creating a cozy campsite atmosphere

4000K Natural White

For reading, cooking, organizing gear, and clearer close-range visibility

Breathing Mode

A gently pulsing warm glow for a calming and peaceful nighttime feel

These modes turn EVERLITE into a more comfortable light for real nighttime living outdoors.

### Magnetic Tail for Hands-Free Lighting

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/536/55eeab57fbeb8b8cb2ba0fe678e76529_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761374&width=680&sig=IT19U7wKZRp%2FMcSUToJYdS8TuNm3TvyeK73owVPEd8M%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/424/097baca082634d1233925930647bf764_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781233553&width=680&sig=aQTYhMiaQgDDMhgM6Eq7ml2CziLGclmZ8qiVxowdRUY%3D)

Attach the EVERLITE flashlight to compatible metal surfaces when you need both hands free — for gear setup, car repair, campsite organization, or emergency work lighting.

### Rechargeable 3500mAh Battery for Long Nights

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/553/1ed9d7614e9437b446d010d83c531d4e_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761439&width=680&sig=1dBObq%2F6zdeq0uzKy1ycz%2BFz1TRg2vrlY1Iw3%2B84OYQ%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/438/49bf0c08d5e1e67b9ac6fcc8bfe5ff34_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781233614&width=680&sig=%2FUoCyLVzRdAhSIvi7W%2F9GWKtdjUAZeuxkQpc6Vmsbnc%3D)

A 3500mAh battery and efficient low-power LEDs power EVERLITE.

It is designed to support short bursts of brightness, long campsite use, and extended low-light operation. From an evening walk to all-night tent lighting, EVERLITE gives you multiple runtime options for real outdoor needs.

### IP65 Water-Resistant

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/558/b810d5904f81e1c5b0ece40c5ad0f6c4_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761456&width=680&sig=fo0qJ15T%2BRVdXdf3Rv60oWbEMIFKd2JVLrIKILVpf1g%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/474/5c049871b71a63730147e94434b8d291_original.gif?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781233726&width=680&sig=ud%2FX2vbl47KtdgxlhNZ5Z6JXeFKinlxY1cnZMgegJt8%3D)

### Aerospace Aluminum Alloy Body

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/562/c091005abba684955a467cb684366a96_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761472&width=680&sig=%2BksS7eJ11qDkbGIMm%2FrmsK6q3B4Cx3tVe8aGo0ohG5c%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/877/439e39813c223e262f8ec809c9ad0732_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781236310&width=680&sig=ZdbwqwvB07hqvsy8LyqPF%2BiCd%2FQ6SolKtzy%2B8c%2FrkBw%3D)

EVERLITE uses an aerospace aluminum alloy body for a durable, premium feel while remaining lightweight.

### Rewards

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/566/48023f9df82fedf7c452e7d1861a1a53_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761485&width=680&sig=HUu%2Fsw2DGmunHbRvsH9m7QgFc8GzIxr%2FJZA3NHZlrT4%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/499/57a7b9b17953654978e728b688680c7f_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781233814&width=680&sig=uHvstQyDvtcnYAeVPqTd9jBdx9AufDGQJLr9JAvfUNw%3D)

### Specifications

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/569/ccee825879c9be1b590fe59a4f988cf4_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761506&width=680&sig=q9HJL1l%2FACraWH3t2EVZje1F%2BrEb282lgK9YipheOKQ%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/509/e6bd8b5c738ecce542ed797991017e6c_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781233887&width=680&sig=mEc6G1iR9IbcXZ1HBqZcln%2FUsjv5oIPffTRu1F1ETkw%3D)

### Design

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/574/67723df88a8e5c5d9081cd217e1eef7d_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761527&width=680&sig=S09%2BqAz3FVIAhoVS0lmCpN0s6jfHpke644ct9AoyWVg%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/517/9f2598ca748c85a2f7b28e6c1637853c_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781233952&width=680&sig=dBEa8X9Ax4BnglerGGj3LKK4RKZ0zHUtlD839F%2FJkPo%3D)

### Timeline

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/151/576/891e87afe40404833bfac8b5396ef96e_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781761542&width=680&sig=kKtureoCgBGqPOOypbiRnV0gjU6t0KPewTTZABGxn0A%3D)

![](https://i.kickstarter.com/assets/054/080/522/2d0ff91fff39b9353661aa8881a8d0f0_original.jpg?fit=scale-down&origin=ugc&q=92&v=1781233974&width=680&sig=Q0nHaLxEGswasBnCO0fGTH0zSlyUQTHiHHWehESvk34%3D)

## Risks and challenges

Bringing EVERLITE flashlight to market involves real execution challenges, including component sourcing, production scheduling, assembly consistency, and shipping coordination. To reduce uncertainty, we have already conducted the pilot production to make sure we will ship on time once our campaign is funded and then ends.

[Learn about accountability on Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/help/hc/sections/115001107133)

Questions about this project? [Check out the FAQ](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/23831970/everlite-3-in-1-outdoor-flashlight//faqs)

[Report this project to Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/login?then=%2Fprojects%2F23831970%2Feverlite-3-in-1-outdoor-flashlight#report-this-project)

projects.ai_intro_en: EVERLITE is a dual-light outdoor flashlight that combines a 100m long-distance beam with a 360° soft ambient glow, plus RGB color modes for campsite atmosphere. It features a magnetic tail for hands-free use, a rechargeable 3500mAh battery delivering up to 40 hours of runtime, and an IP65 water-resistant aerospace aluminum body, making it a versatile lighting tool for any outdoor adventure.
ai_highlights_en: 100m long-range beam and 360° soft ambient light for versatile illumination
Magnetic tail for hands-free lighting and RGB modes for campsite ambiance
Rechargeable 3500mAh battery with up to 40 hours runtime, IP65 water-resistant
projects.ai_risks_en: Bringing EVERLITE to market involves execution challenges including component sourcing, production scheduling, assembly consistency, and shipping coordination. The team has already conducted pilot production to reduce uncertainty and ensure on-time delivery once the campaign is funded.
projects.ai_creator_bio_en: We build rugged, 3-in-1 outdoor lights designed to keep up with your adventures. Our 1000LM beam, RGB mood lighting, and 40H runtime replace 3 devices in one. Back us for reliable light, no matter where you go.
projects.ai_description_en:
EVERLITE is a dual-light outdoor flashlight that combines a powerful long-range beam with a versatile 360° ambient taillight, designed to handle every outdoor lighting scenario in one compact tool. The main spotlight delivers a 100-meter beam distance for trail navigation and spotting at range, while the secondary taillight serves triple duty—offering a 360° soft natural white glow for area lighting, a fantasy RGB mode to set a colorful campsite atmosphere, and three dedicated white-light experiences: 2700K warm white for winding down, 4000K natural white for task visibility like cooking or gear organization, and a calming breathing mode for a peaceful nighttime feel.

What sets EVERLITE apart is its magnetic tail cap, which gives users hands-free lighting by sticking securely to any metal surface—perfect for setting up camp, working under a vehicle cover, or hanging from a tent frame. Built around a rechargeable 3500mAh battery, the flashlight provides up to 40 hours of runtime, reducing the need for disposable cells on extended trips. The body is constructed from aerospace-grade aluminum alloy and rated IP65 water-resistant, ensuring durability against rain, splashes, and rough handling in the field.

The flashlight is available in four reward tiers: Super Early Bird at $39 (limited to 100 units, 55 remaining), Early Bird at $49, a Duo Pack at $89 for two units, and a Triple Pack at $129 for three units, with all tiers shipping worldwide in August 2026. Backers can also make a pledge at any level to support the project without selecting a reward tier.
